name: Royce White
subject: You don’t need a nice guy. You need a sledgehammer.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
The insiders are cozy. We're coming with a sledgehammer. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9175d9ab3538481d82fb7a45d3c07e2a&_e=7SImU611hnTitmGVxQyESLQbS40YAf3JbrSe57FPk_-mEnxk4WsQVPDloi_ZKUf1jUWpICgFZl_9aRwuiJoDKlL8zRvO5ftjKFDW56D9laEwEXkx9W37VG17GsGaQ6GkcZKLR3oyvJFlqlRAKZ22x38O6n-vMEArBPvbeW-CM0-Z-YhznCmNlPYgAYS_CSdbhHkhkEvPGp6MdvVe-6V2Cfsu2DFGEr1GZnBAixwF6Oq6el_DNsY7SQvNBwz_R1qzWtr04_yEbbfaHdac1QFF9xcuTgegS5Iar7fzeH5R2sMPe0jkMRFdh5bvjkRpu_z8k40NlYUsCSmBmlaONbRVRsGsaKdsRIwgNLFqsDHwNysJJGG5Mab1B-Tvk7eGUwiN8S_ENrhmLKDiPbyY1P_llAyZr0j8N4eu4QmgYh9GeeQM7w8ejBvNlD2VCQ5S4Zcs8i-u6xjVURhJ0VJgA5CBMpadEXGAcLtIUAosrSz7_HS-coPJ6jg-Xvigo2cDTi6zOeY2pSqIaNpRJxN9wGKOXPAVzMVe0HliRAsYYKb_aLitt7UJ1CSjIU6bmj11dSaU)
---

Peter,

They call it “Minnesota nice.” I call it what it is — a polite lie to cover corruption, backroom deals, and a system rigged against the people.

You don’t need another soft-spoken moderate. You don’t need a man who plays by their rules. You need a sledgehammer.

I’m not here to shake hands and make friends in Washington. I’m here to swing hard but a sledgehammer needs hands to grip it. **[Will you grab it with me?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9175d9ab3538481d82fb7a45d3c07e2a&_e=7SImU611hnTitmGVxQyESLQbS40YAf3JbrSe57FPk_-mEnxk4WsQVPDloi_ZKUf1jUWpICgFZl_9aRwuiJoDKlL8zRvO5ftjKFDW56D9laEwEXkx9W37VG17GsGaQ6GkcZKLR3oyvJFlqlRAKZ22x38O6n-vMEArBPvbeW-CM0-Z-YhznCmNlPYgAYS_CSdb6dyqI7jWTJeracGzwTRUdTK1MUGpv0zm-pf338gqbFVjC-rhY1MMKW17X7FzHC35GkmjGPOfZDFBzOOGHmAYpsHAYKEBtrFRZYxqiy019btX7xJR9Xb58d36s4T_yf0KJngA6nPJz6pcLk41BOsqPN4BQJ75sBGBqOOL-vQ_wZllj28UAgugKztVc51ktTHtB3MaluL7kYeKA8WmGevjnCPNtsDU-T7cRwMmAkKRLGkwsWm68n5DJy1rlwLHXlBpvyKURQs7cH3jJaSziVTkL3122ux3EB91veJUm2dQPZRJ5ivVb6uThrAWR7XUJBU57VeUB-H7JqLbfGagwqmQvtlZK_imK2oQK6wlclODzclhqL7NwVsypPRtlHAWovEV)**

**[Your $5 fuels the fight against the media machine, the career politicians, and every coward who sold out this state.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9175d9ab3538481d82fb7a45d3c07e2a&_e=7SImU611hnTitmGVxQyESLQbS40YAf3JbrSe57FPk_-mEnxk4WsQVPDloi_ZKUf1jUWpICgFZl_9aRwuiJoDKlL8zRvO5ftjKFDW56D9laEwEXkx9W37VG17GsGaQ6GkMd8rQ5R1Lqz0oIM6AZvEe6M7z6DhW4cbEED1u_D5N7BZH5EL3Ll-hfuvwhkPl-WYBEbdY2XLhAvxtZGcFDPkCPuX6Nd_DkUTo6nLJh_6oLv19Tz3EXB9T6AQKbB6kY4zXcQDDaS5ITgWWm0bZ0R9vUjNdVf0RW1PcSGy9NsMDPM8D3ys6EpxB5c9iXwO7GGRk7y_iTk2ogJ2_hXCYMX7t3ZzgYusvhCv5Ma1BjXy-t5A0KQosJT96heaxdPDUeDQV2fwJJMlKZrbqzS9dYB6M1zGFoafRKfFVX3ymYC1Wg9-eNonPeQEq1xKHnxnNjbea65WVwvlon05657SHFRacQYw8H6gLwDAoj0fR7G-B3rrnJRnoUiVmKnFCZpUtzXwzfyv4s5WUKqjaoGX54ui3maTaIyueblxxsgx-E60G3M%3D)**

Let’s stop the polite theft of Minnesota. Let’s take it back with force.

Let’s ride,
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9175d9ab3538481d82fb7a45d3c07e2a&_e=7SImU611hnTitmGVxQyESLQbS40YAf3JbrSe57FPk_-mEnxk4WsQVPDloi_ZKUf1jUWpICgFZl_9aRwuiJoDKlL8zRvO5ftjKFDW56D9laEwEXkx9W37VG17GsGaQ6GkcZKLR3oyvJFlqlRAKZ22x38O6n-vMEArBPvbeW-CM0-Z-YhznCmNlPYgAYS_CSdb9B_W_gsbVRqIzbcD6PkRWC7os4rv9xA2UZfEvQusHI741GFCcUwWUComk0irs0ml-LyV2E70KzYb738KNRNwZOS1FqD_qrv6l54OQNNCfUd5re354f6cvvnRky6Eakry2on3_R2VeJdM6hGjrlRoa17BTgAl3oyftQnD6vgkNPf7GTGI2dCYij0c5TN4YGYr_h-ttIXLjMbvTH--BywfkOfxT0PD91RWKJPpr_xeK8ixvCGYeL5dvatuxeOgSkiRrZsnaKVxqbuh0ES5T7G_ekFsmZzjiUzwARmAbtVgC8d6YBIwxJzKJkN3OgXR_e6Y-M1q7SSe4vIu4LRGL6HFyqzEE8zrq9vaFVBXiVUjFtG5jsLTC4W7l7x7fOOosqm7)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9175d9ab3538481d82fb7a45d3c07e2a&_e=7SImU611hnTitmGVxQyESLQbS40YAf3JbrSe57FPk_-mEnxk4WsQVPDloi_ZKUf1jUWpICgFZl_9aRwuiJoDKlL8zRvO5ftjKFDW56D9laEwEXkx9W37VG17GsGaQ6GkcZKLR3oyvJFlqlRAKZ22x38O6n-vMEArBPvbeW-CM0-Z-YhznCmNlPYgAYS_CSdbD1pLCCo-GKHALjZTToQDE65UNMEBScQnjw2WsZPitnWB6yKTO81oCcyeAbF7c-_Rph3JVOVTy0lIScQT_kM5CPXPfJyeOGj8i1Viawd3TJp7-QtdubKo9RmaJHHUamR1M3Pftr8Yeb6cWYLshCvM9yRq5HDZPinfFiFt2dPidfdHOQ6tmer1ttsvg7vXheMt6dlDTDRXXYyYGi-Ole_Y5vCRwn29jn01PvGkPilDve4Gg40qvCb8Go-4bM3DOiOKBkB-YEqz7OwxMeExp3d0JvYTSpKEjmDi9FH2veX5gXNxncYzxl4K3rLn7WE37mwcLJI6S2bprdjZtVQPF8wDEUCc0jXGPiNA3JfjnqOFsXuyhQp_xkvSF1PzlmOpg_Eq)

clean_body: | | | Last week, we closed the books on our most recent fundraising deadline — and thanks to you, we crushed it. Together, we showed that grassroots supporters can power a campaign that takes on big-money Republicans and national special interests. But here’s the truth: we can’t stop now. The other side isn’t slowing down, and every day they’re spending more to try and flip this seat. That’s why I’m asking you to stay with us. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Your continued support ensures we can: Keep canvassers knocking on doors Fuel volunteers making phone calls Run targeted outreach to voters in every corner of the district * Show that this campaign is stronger than the billionaire-backed opposition Thank you for standing with us. Together, we can keep Virginia moving forward — and prove once again that people power wins. With gratitude, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. name: Team Benson
subject: Michiganders don’t want Medicaid cuts — but Mike Duggan’s corporate donors do.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=798%2E181023%2EsTG_Da)
There is a health care affordability crisis in this country.
And it’s only made worse by D.C. Republicans like Donald Trump and John James rigging the system against our families and in favor of corporate interests.
**That’s why it’s so alarming that third-party candidate Mike Duggan _agrees_ with Trump, stating that these cuts “are not as bad as they look.”**
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251006_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=798%2E181023%2EsTG_Da)
_Really, Mike?_ More than 700,000 people across the state are set to lose health care coverage. Medicaid cuts will devastate rural hospitals already facing strained budgets.
**Michiganders don’t want Medicaid cuts — but Mike Duggan’s corporate donors do.**
Jocelyn Benson will stand up for Medicaid and fight for more affordable, accessible health care. [**Help her defeat Mike Duggan, John James, and any candidate who gets in the way of our ability to see a doctor.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251006_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=798%2E181023%2EsTG_Da)

Jocelyn believes in a government that’s efficient, accountable, and works for you. _One where health care is patient-driven, not profit-driven._
Too many people across Michigan are struggling — especially when it comes to accessing the affordable health care they need and deserve.
Jocelyn hears from families across the state, from Detroit to Iron River and everywhere in between, that healthcare costs are too high and access is out of reach.
We can’t trust Mike Duggan to protect Medicaid or our health care access. **That’s why we need to defeat him, and why we’re urgently asking:**
**[Will you pitch in to Jocelyn’s campaign for governor of Michigan? She’s a proven leader ready to bring more affordable care to our state.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2140?t=10&akid=798%2E181023%2EsTG_Da)**

name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: Why Speaker Johnson is blocking me from serving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116748511/574311040/-634747134?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-10-06_AGR_DMJ_ES-32805&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGI3MzZiMi0xMmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFRKrIlJG36IsJ58hisMl3nebqrsIy2oT2KyYGzo0IA=)
---
Hi Peter, it's Adelita Grijalva.I want to thank Zoe Lofgren for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files.This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most.As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. _**[Peter, will you split a donation of $25 or whatever you can today between my campaign and Zoe Lofgren to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116748512/574311061/-634747134?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-10-06_AGR_DMJ_ES-32805&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGI3MzZiMi0xMmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFRKrIlJG36IsJ58hisMl3nebqrsIy2oT2KyYGzo0IA=)**_

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Trump wants a civil war
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Donald Trump wants to invade Democratic states he doesn’t like with Guard Troops from Republican states he does like.
#
Peter —there’s something we need you to take very seriously.
We've told you all about Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth turning the Department of Defense into the Department of Forever War. Whether it is an illegal war against Venezuela, or his desire to send Troops back into Afghanistan, this is hardly a “peace” president.
Now, Trump has his eyes on another war — at home.
He just federalized the Texas State Guard and, and he’s trying to deploy them to Illinois and Oregon. Saying it like that might not sound so bad, but what if we put it this way: **Donald Trump wants to invade Democratic states he doesn’t like with Guard Troops from Republican states he does like.**
This is the President of the United States militarizing American cities against their will for absolutely no reason, other than as a show of force. It is illegal. It is outrageous. It’s against everything this country stands for. And it would put American Soldiers in a place they should never be — facing off against American citizens.
And while Donald Trump is trying everything in his power to antagonize people into conflict, Troops don’t want to be used for political fights.
It's not why these men and women joined the Guard. They signed up to serve, to help out during disasters, and to defend American citizens with their lives, if necessary. But Trump and Pete Hegseth are doing everything they can to destroy the Military and remake it in their image. It’s absolutely sick.
We are not going to sit by and let them do this to our brothers and sisters.
VoteVets is on the frontline of every political fight involving our Troops and Donald Trump’s abuse. We’re one of the only organizations that can do this work. And we truly need your assistance.
[**If you can afford it, make a donation to VoteVets and support our mission as we continue to square off against Trump and his administration on Capitol Hill, in the court room, and at the ballot box.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.PLXLty&refcode=em251006-1-120&t=1&akid=34669%2E3013755%2Eydqgb0)

We got real about the dysfunction in Washington, the corruption at the heart of the Trump machine, and how we can build a better Democratic Party and a strong country together. This is one of those conversations you'll want to watch all the way through:
Here's what we got into:
* **[00:01:36]** The Supreme Court rejects Ghislaine Maxwell and Laura Loomer--and what it says about power, lies, and proximity to Trump.
* **[00:06:26]** Malcolm drops a moving, must-hear reflection on why he became a Democrat--and how politics should be about what _actually matters_ in our lives.
* **[00:13:02]** We dig into Trump's grotesque opportunism in Gaza and foreign policy corruption that's hurting everyday Americans.
* **[00:24:01]** Connecting global aid and local relief: how support for Ukraine and Africa benefits _your_ grocery bill and job security.
* **[00:32:06]** Malcolm's powerful call to resist division and fight for a government that gives a damn about _us_ --not billionaires, not fascists.

--Mike

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Why Your Doctor Left New Mexico (And Won't Come Back)
body:
Government shutdown continues, AG candidate exposed for violent texts, but New Mexico's healthcare crisis hits closer to home. New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=78037bbb96&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |

It's been a [wild week](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b2d8e5e7d4&e=567664f14c) \- the federal government remains shut down, and a Virginia Democrat running for Attorney General got exposed for sending disturbing texts about harming political opponents and their families.

But the story that should matter most to New Mexicans is this: **Nearly 6 out of 10 Albuquerque residents can't get doctor appointments when they need them** , and your legislature just refused to fix it.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1fb278627c&e=567664f14c)
| |
🏥 **59% CAN'T ACCESS HEALTHCARE - LEGISLATURE DOES NOTHING
** New polling reveals 59% of Albuquerque residents can't get doctor appointments when needed. The numbers are even worse for young families: 73% of adults ages 18-34 can't access care.
An addiction specialist who moved back to New Mexico to help his home state just had his insurance cancelled - despite never having a single malpractice claim in his career. His insurer simply said "they no longer want to offer physician policies here in this state."
Why? New Mexico has the 2nd highest malpractice insurance rates in America. Trial lawyer senators blocked medical compacts during the special session that would have brought telehealth doctors to help - even though the Governor, House Speaker, and every Republican supported it.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8ac82031a&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🚨 **GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN CONTINUES: DEMOCRATS BLOCK FUNDING**
Democrats continue refusing to pass a clean continuing resolution to reopen the federal government. They're demanding hundreds of billions in additional spending on top of Biden budget levels - despite America drowning in $37 trillion of debt.
The math is simple: Republicans have 53 Senate votes but need 60 for cloture. Only 2 Democrats (Fetterman and Cortez Masto) crossed party lines. Martin Heinrich and Ben Ray Lujan both voted to keep the shutdown going.
Even Van Jones admitted on CNN the strategy is backfiring: "We decided to shut the entire government down so now people are gonna be mad about things Republicans can blame on us."
CBS polling shows 48% of Democrats support the shutdown versus only 5% of Republicans. 65% of all Americans oppose government shutdowns - but Democrats are doing it anyway.
💀 **VIRGINIA AG CANDIDATE'S SHOCKING TEXT MESSAGES**
Jay Jones, a Democrat running to be Virginia's Attorney General (the state's top law enforcement officer), sent text messages to a Republican colleague about GOP Speaker Todd Gilbert that are genuinely disturbing.
Jones compared Gilbert to Hitler and Pol Pot, expressed hope that Gilbert's family would experience tragedy to change his politics, called Gilbert and his wife "evil," and accused them of raising future extremists. When the colleague pushed back in horror, Jones justified it by saying "only when people feel pain personally do they move on policy."
His response when exposed? Blame "Trump-controlled media organizations" instead of apologizing.
Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin and the Democrat gubernatorial candidate both called for Jones to drop out of the race. He's still running.
Additional detail: Jones also got busted going 116 MPH in a 70 zone, then served his court-ordered community service hours at his own political fundraising organization that works to elect him.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0d6b178047&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
We also cover Tim Keller's new campaign ad bragging about his ICE warning hotline, CNN's Abby Phillips claiming Portland violence is "just one block," and Fat Bear Week champion "Chunk" who weighs 1,400 pounds with a broken jaw.
Contact your state legislators TODAY and demand they pass medical compacts in January.
---
|
---
| | ✅ **LIKE** the episode on [YouTube ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a8600b94f8&e=567664f14c)[
](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=88cadf9f06&e=567664f14c)
✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=33f5127df4&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0b92b1d8fe&e=567664f14c)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=156912a47e&e=567664f14c)

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **

subject: He's laughing at YOU!
body:

| | |

| He's laughing at **YOU,** Peter. I could hardly believe my opponent would stoop this low. Mark Warner, the **FAR-LEFT** Senator from Virginia just voted to keep the Government shut down, and he thinks it's funny. ** _NOW our brave men and women in uniform will have to work without pay._** It goes to show that all his outrage is just for show. Deep down he gets a kick out of watching our country struggle. I want to hold him accountable, but I'll need your help. My name is Bryce Reeves. I've served my country as a U.S. Army Ranger and I've served the great Commonwealth of Virginia as a State Senator. Now I'm ready to serve my country again in the U.S. Senate and get rid of **RADICAL LIBERAL MARK WARNER!**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Here’s why I’m asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2674%2E4032634%2E-ZvTvK)
---
Hey there, it’s Deb Haaland and I’m running for governor of New Mexico. We’re heading into one of the most defining moments of this race yet — so Elizabeth said I could reach out to you. The final New Mexico fundraising deadline of the year is tonight. After that, every candidate, including me, will be required to publicly report our fundraising totals. **When Washington abandons people, governors are the first line of defense — and we’re seeing that now more than ever.** With a Republican government shutdown, costs rising, rural hospitals on the brink, and thousands at risk of losing coverage — state governments are on the front lines. New Mexicans deserve a leader who truly understands their struggles and will fight fiercely to protect them. I’m ready to fight and deliver every day for New Mexicans. My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crime so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state. I am ready to bring the bold solutions we need. But to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve, I can’t do it without supporters like you. **Unfortunately, we’re facing a crowded and expensive race. One of my self-funding opponents is already airing TV ads, and Republicans are closely watching our campaign. And right now, we’re racing against the clock to prove we can raise what it takes to win.** [**With the government shut down and affordability more uncertain than ever, I completely understand if now’s not the right time to make a donation. But if your budget allows for it, can you split a contribution of $28 or anything you can today between Elizabeth Warren and me to help us reach our goal before midnight tonight?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3164?amount=28&t=8&akid=2674%2E4032634%2E-ZvTvK)

name: Powered by People
subject: Greg Abbott is at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Let’s be clear: there is no crisis in Illinois, Oregon, or other states that justifies sending troops into our communities.
#
Greg Abbott just gave Donald Trump the green light to deploy the Texas National Guard into our American cities.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251006.OxXFnT&refcode=ema20251006-240391&t=2&akid=240391%2E444211%2Ei1nAOi)
Let’s be clear: there is no crisis in Illinois, Oregon, or other states right now that justifies sending troops into our communities.
**Donald Trump and Greg Abbott are taking members of the Texas National Guard from their families and homes to use them as a political prop.** Instead of protecting Texans, these two extremists are fueling fear and dividing Americans to try and score political points.
**We need to get Texas back on track.** Instead of attacking American cities and the families who call them home, we should address the real crises we face: millions of people kicked off of their health insurance thanks to Trump’s cuts, thousands of kids going to underfunded public schools, people having to work two or three jobs to make ends meet, and the cost of living rising.
**That’s what Powered by People is fighting to change.** We’re registering voters and organizing neighbors to stand up for a Texas that works for everyone, not just an ultra-wealthy and powerful few. But to keep our work going and to vote Abbott out of office next November, we need your help.
[**Can you donate $3 to Powered by People to help us mobilize voters across Texas and show Abbott and Trump we won’t stand for their political games?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251006.OxXFnT&refcode=ema20251006-240391&t=3&akid=240391%2E444211%2Ei1nAOi)

Thank you,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251006-240391-footer&t=23&refcode2=240391_444211_i1nAOi&akid=240391%2E444211%2Ei1nAOi)**

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Propaganda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
A huge part of what the administration is doing in Chicago and Portland is based on propaganda and also creating propaganda.
Allegedly, Trump saw old videos of some of the protests in Portland from about 5 years ago and he was making decisions based on these old videos. And allegedly, the governor called Trump saying these videos that you're talking about aren't even contemporary.
**But the reason that things like this are successful is because there's so much propaganda.** It's not uncommon for very old videos to circulate and for people to claim that they are from the present day.
Some of it is just misinformation, it's people just not knowing that that's not true and amplifying it.
We see this happen all the time, especially in the fog of war. But now, with the National Guard, this is being used more and more as a technique.
**Especially in times like these, it's very important to document these sites and cities to show that they are not the crazy scenes that this administration is trying to portray.**
In solidarity,
Alexandria
Our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next few years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251006.H90Gaa&refcode=em20251006-9903-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9903%2E2526796%2EnjjCv1)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: This comes straight from my father…

* * *
Of all the unqualified extremists Trump has elevated, none is more dangerous than conspiracy theorist and anti-vaxxer RFK Jr. As Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS), he is systematically dismantling our nation’s public health system and replacing science with conspiracy quackery. He has fired thousands of experts at the Centers for Disease Control (CDC), canceled lifesaving mRNA research, gutted vaccine programs, stacked advisory panels with anti-vaccine activists, lied to Congress, and is even trying to roll back abortion access nationwide. **Democratic Rep. Haley Stevens says she’s drafting articles of impeachment against RFK Jr. Now Congress must show courage and ACT!** [**Tell your member of Congress: IMPEACH RFK Jr. and stop Trump’s most reckless enablers before more lives are lost!******](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39SxPzPzgCjQzEA0S-QL1sMTUC_YVpE0WsqgK7TGK5EWo4mAtOQ9EvQyU5F2bSqCxXIbZ5rgrkUKrsBhvt2Q6STpHwbEj2v5MQYFvY14mokkDcsdE4VaxFDbdIhd_CeSf6LJZ5Sq1rcTw2LFxuJOZ-oBDtF6M86XQ27MnrKUwqRxO76N3MTLyy47CuEyo3AFHZFUF9xSbGcG7nrQyhSl3zE5rQ5u78q0SLHAk3wlRBT6NDAtQEQ6CyDvf4cPlXzAHv9XSg8o9j_2AidxhYSOJ8hhMjpkUVVNlToa7D-xG_7PR5p10Me29knZvP4KaigI3k/4kj/-RO50hCASU2IHayI5VajtQ/h2/h001.PAclmAdj2lO84YtoeOf-ApTQ8qMW5pRKkrnAqQCbNBQ) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39SxPzPzgCjQzEA0S-QL1sMTUC_YVpE0WsqgK7TGK5EWo4mAtOQ9EvQyU5F2bSqCxXIbZ5rgrkUKrsBhvt2Q6STpHwbEj2v5MQYFvY14mokkDcsdE4VaxFDbdIhd_CeSf6_iSg9O-7wjVbF_66TgIxqAygvgYxvP406kRJcjDfIeMwnpDpIb8ZbYe_HNvuQqCtCc3n2clH9F1POf64f2gVsAyn_0mw5u4at_Og0e3jgXKJt1swwlmbdyWGDipSCU-C-klLzXAJlQyhW8nrcrV2qyTVLYFJsOCvUwjnWCTCdoLDfbj-7NIUFUJVLPpe8uIU/4kj/-RO50hCASU2IHayI5VajtQ/h3/h001.TEuXryBylWhNe7yMbsz02QUvZk1JtlJgOheoC_tXMbM)

More than 1,000 current and former HHS employees, leading medical associations, and nine former CDC directors agree: RFK Jr. is a menace to public health.
This is not a policy debate, it is life and death. Children are losing vaccine protections. Families are losing Medicaid coverage. America is being left vulnerable to the next pandemic.
**Courage is contagious, and we are going to need it to repair all of the damage caused to our nation’s public health infrastructure.**
[**Sign on and tell Congress to show courage and support Rep. Haley Stevens’ articles of impeachment against RFK Jr. before it’s too late!******](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39SxPzPzgCjQzEA0S-QL1sMTUC_YVpE0WsqgK7TGK5EWo4mAtOQ9EvQyU5F2bSqCxXIbZ5rgrkUKrsBhvt2Q6STpHwbEj2v5MQYFvY14mokkDcsdE4VaxFDbdIhd_CeSf55ig3Lyqwbq777Tlvpl2FmFAG0vhvoKaoZX5LfgPYTxEhxBVhkVp3G6zmD52UD9eqhaOujKCjqwGX8rvlPMkki6WwEelvBmpKr3A4QO3QD18jkihsruguP1fSuldaz2JF9I1Sb5kwtuyGtlbqhcoXlDGE8UlzThrUxkT-Kzrrtx7snwq-Toe0ZLH8TBvXMriw/4kj/-RO50hCASU2IHayI5VajtQ/h4/h001.cT0s_8JiWXFAaXOOgMW-qQVsikZ5yXvg74CRX5ozNPs)

clean_body: | | | Have you had enough of RFK Jr.’s quackery? Of all the unqualified extremists Trump has elevated, none is more dangerous than conspiracy theorist and anti-vaxxer RFK Jr. As Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS), he is systematically dismantling our nation’s public health system and replacing science with conspiracy quackery. He has fired thousands of experts at the Centers for Disease Control (CDC), canceled lifesaving mRNA research, gutted vaccine programs, stacked advisory panels with anti-vaccine activists, lied to Congress, and is even trying to roll back abortion access nationwide. Democratic Rep. Haley Stevens says she’s drafting articles of impeachment against RFK Jr. Now Congress must show courage and ACT! | More than 1,000 current and former HHS employees, leading medical associations, and nine former CDC directors agree: RFK Jr. is a menace to public health. This is not a policy debate, it is life and death. Children are losing vaccine protections. Families are losing Medicaid coverage. America is being left vulnerable to the next pandemic. Courage is contagious, and we are going to need it to repair all of the damage caused to our nation’s public health infrastructure.** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Every big corporation started the same way a small business did–with an idea. Our country needs to start protecting small businesses the same way we see the current administration protecting big corporations. As Colorado State Treasurer, I am committed to supporting small businesses. **[With your help, we can make this happen.](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/mih_zhqvoBGaMtvtN9RQhXE9-Ie1lo2H9gPDwI5rb2M3xDHCVSlzXIn6MKh8dl4QRAdvmTFtjsCg4le_RL8egsqzt29DlG1naw2PLeG7cxsbacGeCzaq4LFwJXj3GERj4A_jUA-3oVW68YhS9kI3XKoXYsQz362NLEdxYx3JiXX4kMJ3lh1csNiv4Lp_u-IOZ4_FSO3JNx8i5O1pcshBTV3bLFk9ttGUxgm6XCIYxO09bnOPbv1hLuCzVoebnjtKauz0tuMGM4vz46LcLj3UyZexpq2CVCH-L9jmDzvJaQWupnaGzDG4QDRq4jNPqPU64FWdJVH1s0MQVYK4sEkTWnZImlaCbPse3j9EL0Z6kZGt6BTQ-wSMB654MGGj_g87TyktyhsDohySw7AU_7BOATAKzOUP0Em3A0gixTUfvaN6O7zjqdRUWCvY5N71ldXUkLdX25TjIwioA6WpBYluBYytb6EoSAqphTaVPEGXYkPQ0eE4XLpuaTyxhTEsvkoTtNzZmbjF3zIWW2dPAnS7MTl8gh8-bM-ijQAvMhtm6SvROQlvHsYdQGaijrUXg2v3U7qr0yqvK2edBOl_hgpnshWARkPGoXAd9oBeeYpRvdKMgNjO3MGp5iW-KDqIx7_-4XazxgICC4PKIh9dEIHw_jYNlfLAJUaM2zqNizpkjDw-66tLpWdGNZmoTBBCZcmo026iUInkdfwNZ0mjX3BllZPmkczhGd0QevBqKJJBOixY-p25H1YBCrnYTpAfiKTIdlxP2Q-T_tGPiwEkxTVCM9uXUm4ltosK_9zHZHH04GiNUaC2gfJBcYpjCylehGYkOQcLYuTYu46skyJuzfiKtXZubg-DvgIXxqOD0aBFPNuyz_AxytxWpJIDwv1rbV02Mb2DreXOLxm6ZIaS_-orTumnrlMkerurLtoYdYY89Fy9_PizGQzyeah5/AAg00DJD-mOn8gAlIN8zNWue2a6TXmdg/13)** Growing up, I saw my dad fight for fair wages and benefits as a union leader. I also started working at a young age–washing dishes, food prepping, landscaping–whatever job I could find. These experiences at a young age showed me how hard small business owners work to benefit our entire community, and why it’s so important that we support them. I want to use my experiences and knowledge to support our small businesses. Serving in the House of Representatives has taught me what it will take to protect Coloradans’ hard-earned money. I want to secure financial stability for all Coloradans–not just big corporations. My track record shows that when I put my mind to something, I get things done, no matter how big the challenge is. Too often, we see our politicians put the needs of our small businesses on the back burner. clean_body: Our country was built by small businesses, and they are the backbone of our country's economy. | | | Peter – Our country was built by small businesses, and they are the backbone of our country's economy. Every big corporation started the same way a small business did–with an idea. Our country needs to start protecting small businesses the same way we see the current administration protecting big corporations. As Colorado State Treasurer, I am committed to supporting small businesses. Growing up, I saw my dad fight for fair wages and benefits as a union leader. I also started working at a young age–washing dishes, food prepping, landscaping–whatever job I could find. These experiences at a young age showed me how hard small business owners work to benefit our entire community, and why it’s so important that we support them. I want to use my experiences and knowledge to support our small businesses. Serving in the House of Representatives has taught me what it will take to protect Coloradans’ hard-earned money. I want to secure financial stability for all Coloradans–not just big corporations. My track record shows that when I put my mind to something, I get things done, no matter how big the challenge is. Too often, we see our politicians put the needs of our small businesses on the back burner. Together, we can protect the small businesses that make our communities thrive. Let’s do this. Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. ****** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

clean_body: | | | Donald Trump just bellowed, “We have to take care of this little gnatcalledthe Democrats” ... even threatening military force. ** Friend, Trump wants you to be silent and roll over – and he’s willing to send in the military to ensure it. Trump made the following comments in front of thousands of U.S. Navy sailors on Sunday: “We have to take care of this little gnat called the Democrats. ” Trump told several hundred military generals last week to “handle” the “enemy from within.” Threatening military force against political enemies is r ight out of the dictator playbook. Trump’s already sending troops to Oregon and Illinois because those governors are unafraid to stand up against him. We need to take back Congress. We need to impeach Trump. And we need your help to support our billboard and organizing projects to defend democracy and FIGHT MAGA. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Team Dixie
subject: ’Twas the night before Election Day…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
’Twas the night before Election Day, and all through TN-7

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qqjolwdZP03jn0SeQVh3dQ~~/AAUS1hA~/Wj9iY4w8Qj-pFcTQY0q2T6jXbXVKaY4Da38j32-o3vuSqvwB8Qa48sPgJOdh6oxq8E5cLxOAz6cP3bQqBZFUpt2_43Vio2fr78Q8aawR0299vRNv8-ddCOLYPckIdCLE1cMqECXLnGHD3Zrn2VbzuQ1RzEd2McVwTi5t7asLOzE~)
| | | | **’Twas the night before Election Day,** and all through TN-7,
Our canvassers were knocking from seven to eleven.
The yard signs were planted, the palm cards were shared,
In hopes that a Vincent victory would soon be declared. The voters were nestled, snug in their beds,
While visions of change danced in their heads.
And Vincent in his sneakers, with our team in the fight,
**We were ready to work through the long, final night.** But we still need your help to keep this campaign in motion.
[**So we’re asking tonight: will you make a small donation?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sLtcVpE-xLlEyGrniT0QPg~~/AAUS1hA~/aE6DFsODLnDpRJlOSb1OOAG5OpQuoGb-Iw4Dyx4KnsMltmeyGB5a3Oo8gXuEHzKIY7qDZ9jH9z9EbPLCEKzPnrYMByLE8Qaq6eERk1rN11VfoqCWo8wjtpa_0itq2X6jesXTiJKhlTTwOw-IPQ9AoCFEPq895NwhNMipzJHV6NQ~) Tomorrow decides it. The future’s at stake.
We’ve got to give everything, no matter what it takes. Let’s make history in TN-7. -Team Dixie
* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sLtcVpE-xLlEyGrniT0QPg~~/AAUS1hA~/aE6DFsODLnDpRJlOSb1OOAG5OpQuoGb-Iw4Dyx4KnsMltmeyGB5a3Oo8gXuEHzKIY7qDZ9jH9z9EbPLCEKzPnrYMByLE8Qaq6eERk1rN11VfoqCWo8wjtpa_0itq2X6jesXTiJKhlTTwOw-IPQ9AoCFEPq895NwhNMipzJHV6NQ~) ** **

name: Matthew Frohlich, Executive Director
subject: The Golden Era Beckons: WAGOP Annual Fall Dinner Set for Friday, Oct. 24, 2025
body:
The Golden Era Beckons: WAGOP Annual Fall Dinner Set for Friday, Oct. 24, 2025

| | | | | [|
---](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=61f13f3060&e=6a281f566d)
| | | | |
---
| |

Please join the Washington State Republican Party (WAGOP) as we celebrate our 48th annual dinner at the Bellevue Hyatt on Friday evening Oct. 24th from 5:30-9:30 pm.

Gather and mingle with like-minded conservatives and high-profile speakers and guests, including Fox News contributor and former Congressman from Utah Jason Chaffetz who served on the House Oversight Committee.
For too long, Republicans across WA have been in the political wilderness, but a resurgence is afoot—enthusiasm and momentum are building. Hear from Chairman Rep. Jim Walsh on the party's plans to takeback our state.

Washington is worth fighting for. With your help, we will win! For more information on the WAGOP 2025 Annual Fall Dinner please click [here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bd55395347&e=6a281f566d).
Thank you.

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: A moral crisis
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
We need leaders who are willing to stand up for what's right

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6l47uff8gu1bi5kjpm2flktkcjagu59f3kvpjeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
It’s Kendall Qualls, candidate for governor in Minnesota. I was absolutely disgusted when I read the text messages from Virginia’s Democrat Attorney General candidate Jay Jones; messages where he fantasized about killing his Republican opponent and his two children.
The messages themselves were sickening. But what’s even more disturbing is the silence that has followed. Where are the Democrats willing to say this is wrong? Where are the leaders with the courage to condemn it? Where are the progressives willing to pull their endorsements over this?
_Where is Tim Walz?_
For years we’ve been told by the left that “silence is violence.” Well, their silence on this is deafening, and deeply disappointing. We need leaders with the moral courage to demand accountability, acknowledge right and wrong, and value common decency above partisan politics.
How can you stand with Jay Jones one minute and look your kids in the eye the next and teach them right and wrong? The short answer: You can’t.
**America faces a moral crisis. When one party refuses to condemn evil even when it’s right in front of them, that’s not politics, that’s decay. And it’s a clear sign that we can’t afford to wait any longer to turn this country around.**
If Tim Walz can’t find it in himself to condemn Jay Jones, then he doesn’t deserve to be governor for another term.
I’m running for governor to save Minnesota, restore common sense, and ignite the American Dream.
And with your help, we’ll take our state - and country - back from the radical left. The fight starts now. _[Are you with me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaaogot71pft68fi09ermknte17brpg19e9lkne0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)_
-Kendall

---
[SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpf58ro8vbev24akfim37me50g94groto16i4lho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj4qb7j0dlpmflabvb86m0u3sb4vongcsi3j0rq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1lg99k5qgr6skpegvvq7cg97383qi7u1iv9rls0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zom8svpagk7b7s5rbc0a0tl3838f2peco2vkeiqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqba7h2moip7oopdsbkqcamhgkkaouapilpmu7hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zchk9374jsbe498japh77vekgpgbeajgsa3t81r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

---
[SHOP THE STORE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeu4j3f0ohh5vesv6aduqsqllgpr56qkkma6b1h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj1cdh2bs)
| |

---

For years we’ve been told by the left that “silence is violence.” Well, their silence on this is deafening, and deeply disappointing. We need leaders with the moral courage to demand accountability, acknowledge right and wrong, and value common decency above partisan politics.
How can you stand with Jay Jones one minute and look your kids in the eye the next and teach them right and wrong? The short answer: You can’t.
**America faces a moral crisis. When one party refuses to condemn evil even when it’s right in front of them, that’s not politics, that’s decay. And it’s a clear sign that we can’t afford to wait any longer to turn this country around.**
If Tim Walz can’t find it in himself to condemn Jay Jones, then he doesn’t deserve to be governor for another term.
I’m running for governor to save Minnesota, restore common sense, and ignite the American Dream.
And with your help, we’ll take our state - and country - back from the radical left. The fight starts now. _[Are you with me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1tlspla466a15m2sp35l068cerq8ur7ca4fr3io_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj0s5h2bs)_
-Kendall

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh5euhrmhocrlojmuampk8de1nn3frmfad48j660_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj0s5h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Be a part of history
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7gpk31l0ph5gsh55mq1ovl6glffkmic730ts6dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4g7t8hucp6p6rt6vjj7tcdlq6902mnaquh8qsag_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtem4u4qsmrqcf2vgru1rier3aou7j1dki84s8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z762i4m0fjmakp4sav368dp1sush53d7eo6ea6jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjskpqc6uuqkouglj0pfje7sr99roti0c52b7lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1l70kp58fhvp0tcm68ibd3fdkndon3taqcced18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8otdhgathutpfv01l3o5en5rdd1snh3rh002rk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc0v4j7uga31m893l1f1mrq9g7625paubsmj070_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zooo9agnpq0oi1kmn2a53p0rralbgktaoo091928_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ies43unmfnt17rsci17t1f4kgpv9g2osart8bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j68oj3cdh2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

| | Friend,
It’s Kendall Qualls, candidate for governor in Minnesota. I was absolutely disgusted when I read the text messages from Virginia’s Democrat Attorney General candidate Jay Jones; messages where he fantasized about killing his Republican opponent and his two children.
The messages themselves were sickening. But what’s even more disturbing is the silence that has followed. Where are the Democrats willing to say this is wrong? Where are the leaders with the courage to condemn it? Where are the progressives willing to pull their endorsements over this?
_Where is Tim Walz?_
For years we’ve been told by the left that “silence is violence.” Well, their silence on this is deafening, and deeply disappointing. We need leaders with the moral courage to demand accountability, acknowledge right and wrong, and value common decency above partisan politics.
How can you stand with Jay Jones one minute and look your kids in the eye the next and teach them right and wrong? The short answer: You can’t.
**America faces a moral crisis. When one party refuses to condemn evil even when it’s right in front of them, that’s not politics, that’s decay. And it’s a clear sign that we can’t afford to wait any longer to turn this country around.**
If Tim Walz can’t find it in himself to condemn Jay Jones, then he doesn’t deserve to be governor for another term.
I’m running for governor to save Minnesota, restore common sense, and ignite the American Dream.
And with your help, we’ll take our state - and country - back from the radical left. The fight starts now. _[Are you with me?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9e6fbpkr7llhdnejeu4pd28canq2srjujv3ghe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j64p32c5h2bs)_

clean_body: We need leaders who are willing to stand up for what's right | | | | | | Friend, It’s Kendall Qualls, candidate for governor in Minnesota. I was absolutely disgusted when I read the text messages from Virginia’s Democrat Attorney General candidate Jay Jones; messages where he fantasized about killing his Republican opponent and his two children. The messages themselves were sickening. But what’s even more disturbing is the silence that has followed. Where are the Democrats willing to say this is wrong? Where are the leaders with the courage to condemn it? Where are the progressives willing to pull their endorsements over this? Where is Tim Walz? For years we’ve been told by the left that “silence is violence.” Well, their silence on this is deafening, and deeply disappointing. We need leaders with the moral courage to demand accountability, acknowledge right and wrong, and value common decency above partisan politics. How can you stand with Jay Jones one minute and look your kids in the eye the next and teach them right and wrong? The short answer: You can’t. America faces a moral crisis. When one party refuses to condemn evil even when it’s right in front of them, that’s not politics, that’s decay. And it’s a clear sign that we can’t afford to wait any longer to turn this country around. If Tim Walz can’t find it in himself to condemn Jay Jones, then he doesn’t deserve to be governor for another term. I’m running for governor to save Minnesota, restore common sense, and ignite the American Dream. And with your help, we’ll take our state - and country - back from the radical left. The fight starts now. -Kendall | | | | | My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school. I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit. Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation. We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities. That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. With gratitude,Kendall Qualls | | | | | The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts. When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go. Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together. | | | | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082 | | **The appearance of Kendall Qualls in military uniform does not imply or constitute endorsement by the U.S. Army or U.S. Department of Defense. Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: I’m not going to sit on the bench
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC
body:
I hate to be so direct, but progressive Gavin Newsom and his Democrat henchmen are planning to wipe out FIVE GOP-held Congressional seats.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsoafish264djs01qn97eo4ir3lpojpcpqpc20bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j64p32c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend, I hate to be so direct, but progressive Gavin Newsom and his Democrat henchmen are planning to wipe out FIVE GOP-held Congressional seats. Republicans represent about 40% of the vote, yet Newsom wants to take our congressional districts to only 8%. [I need your urgent help to fight back.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqu41439ree5km4vvalslf6kdd6r9nqimsk14fd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j64p32c9h2bs)

---
Today, I’ve made it the mission of You Gotta Believe PAC to help these five Republican Congressmen “hold the line” on their seats, and I can’t do it without your help. This is a blatant power grab and retaliation against President Trump. Radical Gavin Newsom would rather lie, cheat, and steal than play the game by the rules. Here’s the deal: during my career with the Los Angeles Dodgers, I played by the rules. **_But_ _I_ _played_ _hardball_**. I’m not going to sit on the bench while Far-Left Gavin Newsom tries to illegally re-write the rules and steal our Republican House Majority out from under our noses. [I need your support to do two critical things:](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi06cvccogth5nl5a80jsf5erb0rk5neabnmj3ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3j64p32c9h2bs)
---
1. Give these five Republican Congressmen as much cash on hand as possible so they can be prepared for the massive fight they have ahead of them.
2. Build statewide public outrage against radical Gavin Newsom's Redistricting Power Grab to steal our rightfully-elected Republican Majority

---
With your help last year, I built a historic statewide coalition of Republicans and fed-up Californians – **I even received the most votes of any Republican candidate in California's _history_.** If you can help me mobilize these same folks again... ... I strongly believe we can build a movement so loud that Newsom and his Democrat buddies in the state legislature will be forced to back down (or face consequences at the ballot box). We must be alert. We must build our team. We must stop Gavin Newsom’s gross plot to erase your voice in Washington.

body:
Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa tours the war-torn area surrounding Holy Family Church with the parish’s pastor in Gaza, Father Gabriel Romanelli. / Credit: Photo courtesy of Latin Patriarchate of Jerusalem CNA Staff, Oct 6, 2025 / 17:13 pm (CNA). Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa, the Latin patriarch of Jerusalem, called the Israel-Hamas ceasefire deal brokered by the U.S. a “first step” toward peace.In a statement, the terrorist group Hamas agreed to release the remaining Israeli hostages, living and dead, in the first steps of a peace deal brokered by U.S. President Donald Trump. Twenty living hostages and the bodies of 28 dead hostages are believed to remain in Gaza as the second anniversary of the Oct. 7, 2023, Hamas attack — the largest massacre of Jews since World War II — approaches. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/6lsvnJ3SamcZwMf70EWXug)

name: INGOP
subject: Statement from Chairwoman Keesling on Beau Bayh’s Secretary of State Announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
"Gosh, I spent tons of money on furniture, which sucks, but it's coming in pieces, so hopefully by, like, mid-October, I'll be fully moved in."
"Gosh, I spent tons of money on furniture, which sucks, but it's coming in pieces, so hopefully by, like, mid-October, I'll be fully moved in." No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-m/) **For Immediate Release: **October 6, 2025**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **_[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:greid@indiana.gop)_****Statement from Chairwoman Keesling on Beau Bayh's Secretary of State Announcement****Indianapolis, IN** - Indiana Republican Party Chairwoman Lana Keesling released the following statement regarding the candidacy of liberal Democrat Beau Bayh for Secretary of State:**" Beau Bayh gave his first, official interview from a folding camp chair in an empty Indianapolis condo he recently rented. His verbatim quote right out of the gate was, "Gosh, I spent tons of money on furniture, which sucks, but it's coming in pieces, so hopefully by, like, mid-October, I'll be fully moved in."****When you couple that with Beau Bayh voting by mail 14-times, it leaves a lot of questions on when, exactly, he moved here from Washington, D.C.****The reality is, Beau Bayh is a Washington insider who's banking on his father's money and donors to win a race he is in no way qualified for. His professional experience amounts to clerking for a far-left Obama-appointed judge, and being a far-left political nepo baby. ****Beau is a trust fund kid who wants to pretend he's the working-class pick, and Hoosiers can see right past it. Even his own father reportedly doubts his son can win. If the Indiana Democrats' comeback plan is to reinstate the Bayh family's failed political dynasty, they really are out of ideas." ****BACKGROUND ...****Indianapolis Star 's liberal columnist James Briggs predicts Beau Bayh cannot win a statewide election.**"I would not put money on Beau Bayh winning a statewide election in Indiana next year." ([The Indianapolis Star](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-r/), 09/03/25)**Even his father, Evan Bayh has doubts his son can win.** "Beau Bayh is taking on Diego Morales in a Republican-dominated state -- and even his father, former U.S. Sen. Evan Bayh, has doubts." ([The Indianapolis Star](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-y/), 10/06/25) **Beau Bayh is running on the name of a man who Hoosier's rejected because he was out of touch. **"Bayh's dynastic lineage is weakened currency. Voters rejected Evan Bayh when he attempted a political comeback in 2016, losing the U.S. Senate race to Todd Young. Evan Bayh came across as out of touch at the time." ([The Indianapolis Star](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-j/), 09/03/25)

**Beau Bayh clerked for a liberal judge appointed by Barack Obama.** "Our son, Beau, was selected by Judge David Hamilton of the U.S. 7th Circuit Court of Appeals for a clerkship following his graduation from @Harvard_Law next May." (Evan Bayh, [Facebook](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-t/), Accessed 10/06/25)**According to the Indianapolis Star, Beau Bayh is banking on access to his father 's money and liberal fundraising network. **"Bayh would have access to his father's cash and a fundraising network unavailable to almost any other conceivable first-time Democratic candidate." ([The Indianapolis Star](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-i/), 09/03/25)### [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-d/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-k/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-u/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-p/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-x/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-qhyuuit-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-c) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-qhyuuit-hhlljjcji-q/)

His verbatim quote right out of the gate was, "Gosh, I spent tons of money on furniture, which sucks, but it's coming in pieces, so hopefully by, like, mid-October, I'll be fully moved in."When you couple that with Beau Bayh voting by mail 14-times, it leaves a lot of questions on when, exactly, he moved here from Washington, D.C.The reality is, Beau Bayh is a Washington insider who's banking on his father's money and donors to win a race he is in no way qualified for. His professional experience amounts to clerking for a far-left Obama-appointed judge, and being a far-left political nepo baby. Beau is a trust fund kid who wants to pretend he's the working-class pick, and Hoosiers can see right past it. Even his own father reportedly doubts his son can win. If the Indiana Democrats' comeback plan is to reinstate the Bayh family's failed political dynasty, they really are out of ideas." BACKGROUND ...Indianapolis Star 's liberal columnist James Briggs predicts Beau Bayh cannot win a statewide election."I would not put money on Beau Bayh winning a statewide election in Indiana next year." (, 09/03/25)Even his father, Evan Bayh has doubts his son can win. "Beau Bayh is taking on Diego Morales in a Republican-dominated state -- and even his father, former U.S. Sen. Evan Bayh, has doubts." (, 10/06/25) Beau Bayh is running on the name of a man who Hoosier's rejected because he was out of touch. "Bayh's dynastic lineage is weakened currency. Voters rejected Evan Bayh when he attempted a political comeback in 2016, losing the U.S. Senate race to Todd Young. Evan Bayh came across as out of touch at the time." (, 09/03/25) Beau Bayh clerked for a liberal judge appointed by Barack Obama. "Our son, Beau, was selected by Judge David Hamilton of the U.S. 7th Circuit Court of Appeals for a clerkship following his graduation from @Harvard_Law next May." (Evan Bayh, , Accessed 10/06/25)According to the Indianapolis Star, Beau Bayh is banking on access to his father 's money and liberal fundraising network. "Bayh would have access to his father's cash and a fundraising network unavailable to almost any other conceivable first-time Democratic candidate." (, 09/03/25)### PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

name: Troy Downing
subject: This is the email I've waited all my life to send.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwN19ITS1CVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjIzNTgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDdfSE0tQlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIyMzU4LTI4OTkifQ/z4gPb0Y2qKKwjacFA2KjxA)**This is the email I've waited all my life to send.**
I put so much hope into my last message - but it didn't work.
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.
**Peter, I'm Troy Downing.** I bet you've never heard of me, but that's OK. I never thought in a million years I'd be sending you this final message pleading for your help.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.

**[I'm also the conservative Republican running for re-election for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwN19ITS1CVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjIzNTgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDdfSE0tQlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIyMzU4LTI4OTkifQ/kz9tFn2-yRCVFkuq1NHsbw)**

Phony Republicans & the DC swamp have sold you out. That's NOT me. I'm making a simple promise to everyone reading this message:******I'll always tell the truth. ****
****I'll always put America First. ****
****I'll always have a backbone.** This is exactly why the lefties in Washington will smear me in the media, lie about me & end my run. They already have a $40 million in cash on hand to destroy every Republican like me.
I am swallowing my pride & pleading for your help. I'm not used to asking like this, so here it goes: [Do you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwN19ITS1CVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjIzNTgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDdfSE0tQlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIyMzU4LTI4OTkifQ/A7C45joReJ0257bva4m69A)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwN19ITS1CVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjIzNTgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDdfSE0tQlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIyMzU4LTI4OTkifQ/tSgnBXMSP9L7xEa-Wqrdww) I don't have the flashy campaign slogans or the high-tech stuff - I'm taking a leap of faith & praying that a few people read this message & are willing to stand with me.

Most people will count me out, but if we WIN this race it will bring the Radical Left to its knees.

I'm praying for a comeback, Peter - [will you help a combat vet like me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwN19ITS1CVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjIzNTgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDdfSE0tQlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIyMzU4LTI4OTkifQ/O_5EIm2EjfVdYPRAwyGZEA)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwN19ITS1CVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjIzNTgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDdfSE0tQlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIyMzU4LTI4OTkifQ/He28ShGH-s4tf5k_SdsN_g) I'll never forget you helping me today.
Thank you & God bless.
Troy Downing****| |

name: Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
subject: Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom Announces Campaign for Governor of Alaska
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Governor
body:
Today, Lieutenant Governor Nancy Dahlstrom announced her campaign for
Governor of Alaska.

<https://dfx1kn0n80mx5.cloudfront.net/email/image/38a812090dab476bbfc51c
861fd19e94.png>
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
CONTACT: press@nancyforalaska.com
October 7, 2025
Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom Announces Campaign for Governor of Alaska
ANCHORAGE, AK – Today, Lieutenant Governor Nancy Dahlstrom announced
her campaign for Governor of Alaska.

WATCH HERE OR BELOW:
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84799&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81182>

<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84799&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81182>
On her decision to run, Dahlstrom said:

“I’m stepping forward to lead Alaska because I believe in its future,
and I want our kids and grandkids to see theirs here. I’ve spent years
serving this state with grit, honesty, and a commitment to getting
things done. As Lieutenant Governor, I’ve fought to expand our energy
opportunities and safeguard the freedoms that define life in Alaska. As
Commissioner of Corrections, I overturned soft-on-crime policies that
weakened public safety. And in the Legislature, I stood up for Alaskans
and protected the Permanent Fund Dividend.

“Now, I’m running for Governor to bring experience, determination, and
common sense to the job. My promise is simple: I’ll work every day to
make Alaska a place where families can put down roots, businesses can
grow, and communities can thrive.”

Nancy currently serves as Alaska’s Lieutenant Governor, where she has
stood up for election integrity, budget discipline, and defended
Alaska’s values and interests. She previously served as Commissioner of
the Department of Corrections and as a member of the State Legislature.

Nancy’s Alaska story began at 18, when a two-week summer job turned
into a lifetime commitment. After working on the pipeline that summer,
she fell in love with Alaska’s independence and spirit of community.
She and her husband, Kit, raised four children, built a small business,
and are now the proud grandparents of eleven. Through Kit’s experience
as a business owner, Nancy saw firsthand the obstacles that
entrepreneurs face in Alaska — and the resilience it takes to overcome
them.

Today, she brings that same resilience to public service. Working
alongside Governor Mike Dunleavy, Nancy has led on energy development,
responsible budgeting, and protecting the values Alaskans hold dear.

Nancy and Kit live in Eagle River.

To learn more about Dahlstrom’s campaign, visit nancyforalaska.com and
be sure to follow her on Facebook
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84799&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81184> and X
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84799&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81185> .

###
nancyforalaska.com
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84799&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81186>

Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Governor

<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/open?s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC3-A904
-E168017696C1&c=84799>

**Good Morning!** On this day in 2023, the Palestinian terrorist group Hamas [launched an attack on Israel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2K5DAQhJ_GzmT045-ZQMElzubSC41G3bL6TrYGqW-M337xssHmGxQUfFBV1J_H8nCUaF9_uw0th7zseNSEzFiWQGtk2tf1vysA-Er53HDnui5a6kEoKeS0gKN0Ln0LNiBqNC1aNQ33m1HjoNpoIQA4YyD0fpBj_wSttPSgwDzByJtqyV5pSsrpkpEdhoCDmTze76ORfmp6iUCcS_c3084RQzrzG0vn89YmG5lftTG_Gj03ej6Oo4tUOZfz4o2eOVIV4E5Bu_gijZ6z5_zEIqbvXkS3uSocs_P_BNXiMLXFwuuglKiO15R1c5Q-q_lHf72t_ggAAP__R1aBNA) by land, sea, and air, killing nearly 1,200 Israelis and foreign nationals, and taking 251 hostages into Gaza. Today's _Flyover Podcast_ explores the surprising power of walking, from sparking creativity to building strength--proof that simple steps can deliver serious benefits. [Listen to the story here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFqwzAQhp9G3mJknS3Hg4ZCydCSToG2k1Ckk6wiW8G-2Pjti_oKHe6G74fvh__zqq8mpjiHDzOhIp_1jPuakAgX7WMYKc4hPM3iHD5SPiacaQ1acNGdGn7ivXYmpkO3lVMeUSBUqJq-G87QyK6pRnV2AvjdSjdYayTe27a8rpO9bM4cXBVVsTWc9-WA1-g9dtBbHAYJ3Pas5egi5aX-yXGmEX068oZLbfNUJTUSPVYGL0xcmLjs-14f-UnPO5a8EEN2ZHDZGLzC1_sbd_n7drNMSCpEwFotyj32mFJcZWkLk4npz07_mmRT4jcAAP__zFdz5g). Do you enjoy walking or have a regular route that helps you clear your head? Reply to this email and tell us--we'd love to hear about it. If securing a comfortable retirement is on your mind, today's sponsor [SmartAsset](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT2P3CAQhn8N7m6FYfFHQZHo5O7SphxhPNhEfAnGd9p_HzmbFFunoHpfnplH8_MDPowPPu0_TERNLkPCrxaQCCs4vx_k076fpm4blpAfERO1HQQX6q3nb3yEzfjwgHu3aYcoUHao-1HNk-wH1XeHnmahpFI4CbwPdnTrxKeRr_3K74NdxdB5fdF6zsfrSX5D51DJ0eI8D5Lbkd05bp5yvf3KPtGBLjzyJ9abzbEL-iAqjclvTCxMLD61a-t2a9FUMq0hXT0mls23ehZicjkpQstntcjk-18YpMDEYGJh8vuVWxOL8Xt6NgCcCRZsToSJ4B_q5cMzY_K9X6GRqXQWqCtQLi89whpfxsKlLVRX9Va-fAi-DZfyHo0PfxTpv-7yqcXvAAAA__8Xlqae) offers a free tool that can connect you with trusted financial advisors who know how to help you make the most of your money.
