## Oregon, Illinois Challenge Guard Deployment
Illinois and Oregon are suing the Trump administration over what they argue are unauthorized [deployments of the National Guard ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQQL8Gd6ww2OvbgmKjyN1dkyLprDkY7EkwWDB71v59xFbpU4z0pJFm9N7P9-UdKFJaP2BHyyEvCc8akRnLEmjdmNK6PqB4j0fMzx0T13XRSo-yV1JNiweKz2XovA2IGk2Htp_G25vpr2PfbdYPk3f9-DkM3rjh8zZo0Ppt8gGu4IPBjmy71is1tTHqgiHgaCaHt9vVKDeJQaEnzuXyO1PiDUN85i8sF5f3LtqN-ajC3IWehZ7P87zsNbWd0DMm-ahCz01K6PnIkZhcw8rAKCOCx1Kli1A3eRJvkstjPyT4nRJVLsCUk2zvZHoxRPnqIf8JIvQMRd7v_cevPxmEmbMjL8z3by0snvUHlqMr1h8nxUj12pTWHSi-FPi_un9Z_TcAAP__sGabsw)to their states. In Oregon, a federal judge blocked Trump’s activation of 200 state Guard troops, then [issued a second ruling](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMuq5CAQhp_G7Axecl246GHIrhtmGGaWwdHS2MdoMKZD3v5gb84DnEVBQRU___f9u8936bwL9iFXENnEOcC5e8gZ0mycXbIL1h4yaQ2bj9cKIe92ZoS1mBJM-llL56-5qbQwAAx4BYL27Thw2rW0WoTS0EsDnaHNYFRHmGwkVSMfCBuYpk3lREmjhPRlOKnBGGh5r2AcO05UjxoC2uWY6md0IS9g_BVfkGoV18qLJedtR_yG2ITYdJ5nve6h3BCbIOBjR2wqUIhN7_15aAs4R_zfR_WBv7hwNFiGCweZXQzS4zd3-YwJbAzYBexlBhyKF5yO4g2xSSZ8u9HH719_DsSnqJxG_OeP4hTO_S-krUpCb6fz3u1dobGrdP7dPn9L-UuwzwAAAP__RJ6X_Q) stopping the administration’s workaround—sending troops from Texas and California instead. President Trump said Monday he may [invoke the Insurrection Act](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O4yAURJ8GOkf8GDsUFNu4y7ZbWsRczF1hsOAmUd5-5X2Fr5hqpKOZ8-exPjxmLPtvf4CjWNcCn56BCNoacU-EZd9fvoUAZ67fAwr1fVVCmUGKQcxr8Ji_68iDiwAKNAcnZ2PvWk5G8uSMV9smjRejlPAEFa21oJ9PfbceVJg5uosmhZivaHGDGMHoeQNrJy22mY0CAlJtt78VCyWI-Vvf0G5bPXh2iejsTP9iamFqoQQJc746ppZUD7gOMbUYM8pJ3IezNsq-hOFslaBTH6i9jnPA0l-twUZYC1MLby6cH8wZ-3Qt2A-P_6mcfqTp7dS_AAAA__9qT32a) to deploy federal troops to Portland, calling ongoing protests there a form of “criminal insurrection.” The Insurrection Act permits the federal deployment of troops in extreme cases. Illinois [filed a parallel suit](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb8GM6YQRhwDgk3IZtMNLdQGex-CJe1M-fevmOR9wAu6k1t16t7z7zk-HUZM4a_bwJDPY4J3iUAEx-gxrIQphNMdywJ7zNcGiUoYpZAdbwUX_bg4jNd4bxbjASSoBkzbd8NDtbprm9VocNMkpvo6LR9eqUcPQrfiLoYe9NKgqbRWiL6eEjfwHjrVzzAMWom5Z3cBC1I-bv8zJlrBxyu_4LjNeWuiWYn2wtQfJi2TNl17LlQjJm0FM2lbwaQVmkl7Fl73MWkxRkwZCy8nFE6ZTzHPX5yOc9sL_xnLs-fJEebkIv-I4Jj4vOLsQmbSNodZ9nelFV2bhs1h_DSjX-l8GfkdAAD__5XGigU), saying the deployment to Chicago lacks a legal basis and is tied to limited protest activity near a suburban ICE facility. However, a federal judge on Monday refused to immediately block the National Guard's operation in Chicago.
## US Still Hurricane-Free in 2025
As of early October, [no hurricanes have made landfall](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykULuO5CAQ_Bo7w2rDYGYCgkuczaUXWhw0pldtGGFmLP_9yvsLG5RUUkn1-vdcno6Y8vrXbWhbLEvGY2dsDesSaU2N8rq-XQ0BX1zODXPb10WC1GIEAWYJjvhcbn2wEVGi6tGORj_uapz02CcbjFISRh-UVLfJB9RqknD_D0pB9HDvyV5uI4C5oGDAGFEr4_HxmBR4090AA7VSh69CuSWMfJYP1sGXrWebWnvtnfrTybmT83Ecw-lSKZfayfma08nZ1Uae8aK5iPSulbzLKNjlEB3zLqKr4kinkFJPAEabIbWN-2rD6yBm2qeryLo54p_g9qu3PlZ-BwAA__-QnX4e) in the U.S. in 2025—a rare calm that hasn’t happened since 2015. Despite multiple Category 4 and 5 storms forming in the Atlantic, systems like Humberto, Gabrielle, and Imelda have curved away from the U.S., thanks to a [confluence of unusual weather conditions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO3CAQhZ8Gd6y4LGa3oEhD96dNaU1gsImwWcHsWn77iETKC6SY0UhzvrmcH1_LF-SSj_U77Ogo1eXAsxckwrakvG6Uj3V9Q4sRX6VeOx7U10UJZbgUXNglQi7Xcp-iS4gK9YROWvN8aDkbOW1u1jaGgDamJKUNkEzEnwBGqXs0UeopuzFNCmFHaHHDlNBoG_D5nLUIlt0Fxky13X7VfNCGqVz1g-0W6j4VtxG9OtPfmPJM-fM8b-8OVCNcQ8CU71TbNVoItGFjym_v1nKAA5nyYzlTXjxHPVIqteUIfGB75xdC6_zMtNU38X8kp1ZfOUD5q-MFjpigFKb8Y75L89BCCMuUn5qLrzOXkvs8Xll3yOXP6fRffn-c-h0AAP__VgqVcg). Florida, often the bullseye, has stayed untouched so far, though the state saw brutal hits in both 2023 and 2024. With La Niña conditions forming and Gulf waters unusually warm, forecasters say late-season threats, especially from the western Caribbean, remain very much on the radar.
## List: Charting Government Shutdowns
The U.S. entered its [15th federal government shutdown](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAUhZ9GOxxAXdaCIo3dpk3pELnAzSA4cF3Ht8-YV0hxujPf-fl6LS-DEZP_NBtocnlJcNYIRFAWhz4QJu8PU6yFPeZrg0TVL5LLkQnOuFqswXgtQ2u1A5DQt6CFGqdnLx6jaIOWVgyTFE_nVgXCAre8d8O3mkAZIaRrUd80wbm61fMOnIOxVytM06Pnq2oGDhYpl-4nY6IALl75DaVb89ZGHYj22vQfjZwbOZ_n2b2xHiauZkcyESvdxkbOazCFwDIKwAJWyuVi2bGDVeZvXrrHsRoOsvlMtZFzW7TdT4wR6-Ou4TeD8S-W_vXVW8vfAAAA__-gWoDH) on Oct. 1, 2025, after lawmakers failed to reach a funding deal. Since 1981—when a legal opinion clarified that federal agencies must stop work during funding gaps—shutdowns have totaled 97 days across 15 events. Ronald Reagan presided over eight, most lasting just a day or two; Bill Clinton had two, including a 21-day stretch in 1995; and Barack Obama had one for 16 days. President Trump has had three, including the longest in U.S. history at 35 days in 2018, and the current one now nearing its second week. [See the chart here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAUhZ9GOxxAXdaCIo3dpk3pELnAzSA4cF3Ht8-YV0hxujPf-fl6LS-DEZP_NBtocnlJcNYIRFAWhz4QJu8PU6yFPeZrg0TVL5LLkQnOuFqswXgtQ2u1A5DQt6CFGqdnLx6jaIOWVgyTFE_nVgXCAre8d8O3mkAZIaRrUd80wbm61fMOnIOxVytM06Pnq2oGDhYpl-4nY6IALl75DaVb89ZGHYj22vQfjZwbOZ_n2b2xHiauZkcyESvdxkbOazCFwDIKwAJWyuVi2bGDVeZvXrrHsRoOsvlMtZFzW7TdT4wR6-Ou4TeD8S-W_vXVW8vfAAAA__-gWoDH).

Since 1981—when a legal opinion clarified that federal agencies must stop work during funding gaps—shutdowns have totaled 97 days across 15 events. Ronald Reagan presided over eight, most lasting just a day or two; Bill Clinton had two, including a 21-day stretch in 1995; and Barack Obama had one for 16 days. body:
On November 4, 2025, MAGA is preparing for a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LWmpjtvz_0OILRmoqvUfVBQX0GdXh9lt9vkRhi0N7w-Zs36y3Pi_S7WjYw9a66v1hbsb8CJbA0NCrT4CV0z7GNe-fC5VKzB0oUywy5qdICj7Uat7fUtHsxhTmFJbxbHdHQ8FOSM3urclcgz67U-CHBxOz8liIl2km5L5JUbygf_eWVVwFeVmXNiVbOFQXcucmi9AEN7VE6-SmvZoKOnL9YqQ3SDiZmzyL8JBKRCagAg=&c=8rxlGHyZdWZ8Xdlhrmfh07LXkaVHKVdckO01j-iF5dJQ_RKJzCu2FA==&ch=bNAq_1zTVvvCeWac8RCP0J1gj6EMey-sywheBO2WeRmTVunq8Xoi7A==)

| Peter,
Below are just a few selections of the deceptive messages specifically targeted to Democratic voters being mailed and aired on TV by MAGA-funded groups in the all important 2025 battle for control of the PA Supreme Court.
"You can defend democracy"
"Term limit the Supreme Court"
"Force an election for a new Supreme Court"
They are spreading these lies because Democrats coming out in this election is an existential threat to the GOP's objectives for 2026 and 2028 because if they take the Pennsylvania Supreme Court they guarantee MAGA will win this state in 2026 and in 2028.
The group sharing these messages, Commonwealth Partners, is funded by Pennsylvania's richest man, Jeff Yass. Yass runs the Wall Street firm Susquehanna International Group and has a net worth of $65 billion. He has given huge sums of money to MAGA and now unfortunately owns a part of TikTok.
Now, with only weeks to go before Election Day, spending in this critical race has reached new records, exceeding any previous judicial retention election in Pennsylvania. And there is much, much more yet to come from the billionaires who helped Trump gain power last year.
On Tuesday, November 4, MAGA is preparing to make a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court by knocking out 3 Democratic justices in one election.
If we lose, MAGA activists will have the clearance they need to institute an extreme abortion ban--against the will of the voters--and to redistrict the PA congressional map to wipe away Democratic-held seats for good. Pennsylvania would become an uphill battle for Dems to win in a good year.
[But if we win, the GOP will have wasted millions of dollars and untold resources here if we do the work to win right now. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $5 to help us save Pennsylvania and deliver a crushing blow to MAGA this year?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LWmpjtvz_0OILRmoqvUfVBQX0GdXh9lt9vkRhi0N7w-Zs36y3Pi_S7WjYw9a66v1sFHirnJHV8jjw6ZbiIjSLsSY09ssPiAu6du3z_j3IxWLvluDQonb4qfpazouNKWnRLd6o5hUnG1dqNA9fF7FOCrM8sb-krvLV_nIhUMGmtUWjVPw8mPKaedynCr-7La_asX5cgId02RU9Od57bJoj7cXM9yHB-29_o2D8pxjWSYwUdX42eOngA==&c=8rxlGHyZdWZ8Xdlhrmfh07LXkaVHKVdckO01j-iF5dJQ_RKJzCu2FA==&ch=bNAq_1zTVvvCeWac8RCP0J1gj6EMey-sywheBO2WeRmTVunq8Xoi7A==)

body:
U.S. Rep. Wesley Hunt of Houston announced he is [running for the U.S. Senate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuOszAUBOCngc7IdszFhYu_ocvfbokcOIYT-YLskxDefsXuI2w90mi--bpPd4se4_rfBjD0cWmKcBQPRJCn7RXpmTCWAtESZDvDnAJknCSXLROc8X5aLPpzUvViHnzRogYj-lYPN6WFrDfTQucGoVqllX1wq5UbnH7oRUgO86BcjeYqE5z3QnChdOMWcdODFW2n5TDIrlIcFqSUG9qA4GOL82d6Q27mFGpvNqK9VLd_lRwrOR7H0bj0uRRXXslxTx4J51LJ0eZwsjdclMiCXS3LWDCurJDN7PkKe2EYKTGHkE-2pp390tmeMdh8sj15XxjhuhHEOptlP9B7LF1fKb4Gi_5nFf3ty7eR3wEAAP__VVyMog) on Monday, joining incumbent John Cornyn and Attorney General Ken Paxton in competing for the Republican nomination.

| | |

# Tuesday, October 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1943, military historian and political commentator [Oliver North](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2y2yAQQOGnQZ017AqBKCjSqLNTpmSwWKxNkPAg4p-3v-P7Crc8zVecP2d_Dpx5v13CRq69UvE7PY9MrVH16_-9_S28HwftoVENCy1lo8oeJY4nkCdpfAyc31510V1ltNCRAzPaaVAWsFsdmkGDSemqjVoUTAhG68UuIY2I4zV17D4YSGkAJCjbpwiDnQKM2uI0oRZKUuRWat9WavQKR8rv8qDaL2Xrsltbux9i-CVwFjjT3j_5H98pcuhLvQmcPy1w_p35QdVfSm1rV128PzlnPrQRSt62wPnbaz-78HD4FQAA__9kxXDx) was born in San Antonio. North was a Marine Corps platoon commander during the Vietnam War, and he helped orchestrate sales of arms to the Contra rebels in Nicaragua as a staffer for the National Security Council in the 1980s. After charges against him were dismissed, North ran for Congress, hosted radio and TV shows, and served as president of the National Rifle Association. This August, he [married Fawn Hall](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwW4MXBmEguJv7OZvtzQI15EJygTu6vj2G_cVtjvJSb7knK_H-HAxxe35361o6TPnccOjJiTCMi7fG71y3GrFzREW59HnFUscgcP9JviN92NwMZ2jbIKdeDCiQSv6u9GdNAKaxSrQk54daNUHUGpC4NK7SfYGzcyNaqK9MMF5LwQX0rRzEJ3RTtyVAa1BMckxRMqlpQUJP67O6cw7ltbntUl2IXpX1v1jMDAYjuNop8lfHYPhGsNgcIWiT3hF_-pO_Ox76mRuig3vI6YUq-qZ5M_VxfSr0t--2C38BAAA__8NxXLJ). A Texas startup got a massive contract to deliver 300 luxury jets without windows. Check out [the details](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAQQL8GOiN7MBgXLq6hy7VXojk8BkcGR_ZsSP5-lf2F7Z_ek96_23LDmOK5_cWDHL9CXk66aiJmKsv-dfI9x7NWOpGp4EprPqjEBSQMQkkhzeIxpveiW-_-S29VS06ZwU69tgra3VmDchy0Mj1JML0KAMqC6bXxEFaANrqPTElplJJK2y541dsJ1TBamCYYGy3JR86l452YXlhDeucnlW7NR5vczvyoTf-ngbmB-bquLqR3PLcDtw_RwBwSve7EIhdPpYpeSoGxrAUDi1DyITJzFkgl1weu1MDcFucfV0wp1tE0Wm4HxvTT499dejr4DgAA__-JO3u9) in today's _Business_ section. If you’re tired of mystery calls and feeling like your personal info isn’t private anymore, today's sponsor, [Incogni](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQhuGrwd1agAGbgiJS5G7TpkQEBnsiDCtg_-7-yKtzB6d8phi9-v5e7dVhwrz9cQeY_orFZni2BL1Dtfs99_8Fc2uQXYfqPPhyQEXLKZcXRi90tsFhelsxBPOPBs0GMGyWepmEZnzYDddBBa0WHaXU0mkQTEktFh0c817xAc35jFE6M0aZ0GMMbNKLY1JpvixcEUEhYC917Dt0eLkW07s8oI6-HEMye--3RqZfhK-ErwFcGjH7smUcsRC-uhitJ9NaYoRqMZDptyJcnecP2DSfvtf0bcJVK_fq4USFDUt26Qwcqgm3J6aETc1E0O1wmD4V_WfbPQz_CgAA__8K8IAC), can help you take back control by wiping your data from the web.

## Abbott Authorizes National Guard Deployment
Gov. Greg Abbott has authorized President Donald Trump to [deploy up to 400](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SnTAMhZ_GdLpjix9DQZGGbtOmZLy24CoxNmOL3b15-gz7Cqk_6Ztzzq-39c1x5LT_dAfN8rXlNdFnjSRCZX1eSX5nTrVSckLFefL5oMIrauzBaNB2DY7ja-2aML_rMJmGZmP7aWy7yWDznHuyQ9ttGslas5lgnZ-sn0JA3_bj8N7wfMuM1tYYbbrpsQXTTqMz_TDhOOKgOk2BJZeHPEnoy9UtvvIHlYfPRxPnp8hZVftD4aJwSa8zV7mRwuU2K1yMVrjoQeFyVbj7KVykXMcJlVLgtEOnNXyrITnhnFyE_XIlgJSczwqSgWPklLmCq-CSMLAnOEsWqlLB5yScLrovi9tvwvL3DxWFS1PmcH7e_3WwqtP74Th-h5f_m_xjxn8BAAD__8XIlyA) Texas National Guard members to other states to protect federal officials amid protests against immigration enforcement operations. "_You can either fully enforce protection for federal employees or get out of the way and let Texas Guard do it_ ," [Abbott said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OgyAUhZ8GdxjAH3TBohtX024nszIgV2WK0MC11reftK8wu5Oc5Ms53_d1vGrnXVhuegOFrzmOAY7sARHSuO4Bf6MLOUPQCElPMMUNkhsFEw3ljDI5Wu38OdaFVYbZnheguGz6rqp7LopVmVlIM8sGzCQ5b-ZqklPVTKaxPZ9bywun3jDOmOSc8bovZ8urvtO8aXvRdaIlNQPrMKYSV0B46Tz7Mz4hlVPcCq9WxEcm1YWIgYjhOI5yy-HdETFAoHsmYnifImL45GPVSDHSe4gH1SbuSD9UGjS6GLSny66TpRYePp4bBKTmpEt80iXBQrUxEZGIQSd6ufDbj71_FUnZx-G8d7mVpGbLpp3_zMP_SX0q8RcAAP__do-Nuw) in a Sunday social media post. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said the deployment to Illinois, Oregon, or other states would last up to 60 days. Later Sunday, a Trump-appointed judge blocked the administration from deploying National Guard troops from any state to Oregon, expanding a Saturday order that applied to the Oregon National Guard. On Monday, a Biden-appointed judge [declined](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuOozAUxvGngQ7ky8GXwsU2dNl2S2TwIXhlcMY-Ccnbj5hXmP6v3yd9_27TzccUj_tfv6Oj95qnA8-akAjLtD0P-p_jUSsenrD4BZe8Y4mTYGLoOOuYnoKP6TNBG9zMguUtOq4HayRYLtrNLbNZVy4lt8Eoaeyswa5aBwUeQKihje7COGOac8bB9mvg0hrPB2WFMUI1wDBEyqWnDQnfvq7pk19Y-iXvbXIb0aM28k8jxkaM53le3YIHYalfT1_w6hoxxpTikWNtxOgLxSXhZJSZLYDspA-mA5C6MxJYp1YMehiMXrjtN9pTW1x4nJdQlW6A3Xcf088-_e61lxPfAQAA__-x836W) to block the deployment of National Guard troops in Illinois. Oregon Gov. Tina Kotek [called the development](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULuSnDAQ_BqRaUsSICBQ4ITsnDqkBjQs49KDkmaP2793cbGzizroR3X3n4_lAyhQev6GiI6_9rwkvGpAZizL8Ur8N1OqFRMwFthwyxELLUaZXmol1bB4oPBeusa7VflJN-j00E9j203aNIeDVY-d3f2wwt7DaiZrVwse-7XVsFtoyN1hWqlBa6W76bF73U4j6N5OZhyNFZ1CT5zLgw9k_IK6h3f-xPLYcmyCO5jPKtpfwszCzNd1PdK63StuXpj5zIGYtirMzOUVTwk-UqLKBZhyEmbeINCeSyKQty9H-T-hTN8AQT5fULz0eIb8jphYli2BafvB2KY4f14UAlU7iE49I1D4Lso_u_fTmX8BAAD__y_olEM) an "_escalation of the President’s dangerous, un-American misuse of states' National Guard members and hard-earned taxpayer dollars_." Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker, meanwhile, characterized it as "Trump’s Invasion."
## Wesley Hunt Joins Senate Race
U.S. Rep. Wesley Hunt of Houston announced he is [running for the U.S. Senate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuOszAUBOCngc7IdszFhYu_ocvfbokcOIYT-YLskxDefsXuI2w90mi--bpPd4se4_rfBjD0cWmKcBQPRJCn7RXpmTCWAtESZDvDnAJknCSXLROc8X5aLPpzUvViHnzRogYj-lYPN6WFrDfTQucGoVqllX1wq5UbnH7oRUgO86BcjeYqE5z3QnChdOMWcdODFW2n5TDIrlIcFqSUG9qA4GOL82d6Q27mFGpvNqK9VLd_lRwrOR7H0bj0uRRXXslxTx4J51LJ0eZwsjdclMiCXS3LWDCurJDN7PkKe2EYKTGHkE-2pp390tmeMdh8sj15XxjhuhHEOptlP9B7LF1fKb4Gi_5nFf3ty7eR3wEAAP__VVyMog) on Monday, joining incumbent John Cornyn and Attorney General Ken Paxton in competing for the Republican nomination. Hunt, 43, flew helicopters in the Army after graduating from West Point, and he has represented a heavily Republican district in northwest Houston since 2023. He [said that he is](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9uwyAQgPGnwVsiDozhBoYu3tKpUrshHC4xEbYjuPx7-yp9ha7f8Bu-70M4xFzyev6MC3l-nraw0qMVYqYa5tvKly2vrdEamWo80nFbqOagpDI7kDtpQ4q5vELfJT_JhNCRB2vQ6R5BdbOXLiHqNBktp2ixhySNI0fJJed0b7rs3xhIaQEk9Lg_JdDoIpgBlXNqEL2klHmre56J6Rnbqby2O9X9cVu64mfmaxP6Q6hRqPH5rkKNU43pEr5-hBobR741oUZAa8DqwWkEqxARZFd9uj5yKbkNVvTyvMRc_mD-3467V78BAAD__-WjcGQ) "the most consistently conservative legislator representing Texas in Congress." "_The U.S. Senate race in Texas must be about more than a petty feud between two men who have spent months trading barbs_ ," [Hunt said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1ygzAQhU8jOjGS-C9UuCGV3SYds0YLKBErRpKNuX0G5wjpdma_3Xnf-7wOV7DO0nyDFXV6TX4g3KPDlDAMy4PSt7cUIxIkDDDi6FcMdlBCVVwKLprBgHXHUGZG34XpZIZaNlXXFmUnVbboybRKVI2QWNSyK8rStEoV5i6aepwaUJnV5zMpRCOlkGWXT0YWXQuyqjvVtqpmpUBjkw95WjDhC-LkDv_EkI9-zZxeUtoiKy5M9Uz1-77na6Rzx1SPxB-RqX7zziY7nuN8ntKKlE4ao8ODn6L8bcpnv_E_Xb4Fu0I4OMxgKZ7AQnz0gQ7iQIb_IPENXskTUz0EfrnI29dDfmRBm223ztlYN6wU8wrWvcOm_1X81Oo3AAD__3-ykmM) in a statement. “ _With my candidacy, this race will finally be about what's most important: Texas_.” A Cornyn spokesman dismissed Hunt's campaign as a "quixotic quest for relevancy" that would drain financial resources and "endanger the Trump agenda from being passed." Paxton, meanwhile, [welcomed Hunt](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSnCAUBeCnwY4duCJCQZHG7k-b0kG4riQIDrDr-vYZk0f463vnzPnOr6_5y4YY0vOn3dG0z5rnhGeN2BqWeXul9juHVCsm27BYhy7vWMIMDAbKGWXj7G2I1yw6bxbmNe_Q8HHQqheaQ7cZqZ1HbRfeD7DIQXrXC5AodI9sGdnaBXOHccZGzhkX-rF63mtl-SA1KAWSCIY-tFwebcOGH1vXeOU3lofLexfN1tpRSf-DwERgOs_z8WfLr_tIYLKlBReRwHS7CEwxOxvvP6wRL3oT6avS_0L6zAc9SthtuajLJV2JHvbTciIwgRooWA1Mc0a9WjgV6-KoXoBRNypYUUkhLHbF-OMMMYYqRyLYc7ch_uvavrfw28DfAAAA__-wsY59) to the race, saying "primaries are good for our party and our voters."
## TxDOT Building 6.5-Mile Tunnel in Austin
As part of a $4.5 billion project to expand I-35 through Austin, a 22-foot-wide drainage tunnel is being built [200 feet below ground](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ynDAQhE8jMm1J4j9Q4ITsOXVIDWhYxiVGW9LA2729C1_h5V3d_X1_vuYvoEj8_A0HenlvaWb8LhFFMM_7yfI3EZeCDIIZVlzTgZlmZ1yrrdGmnwNQ_MxNFfxiwmgr9LZvx6FuRuuq3YN1pquh64ehhaV2tVv6pluXbejXDhZbkb_LrDG9tcY242MLth4HsG03umFwnWoMBpKUH7Kj4BvKFj_pwvxY01FFv4u8iqp_KTcpN50cMD9zOjkQbxmK5HOVM-OdVm668ZSb7k3lpoIvwWPBrNwk75BEQ7iAVyz6gFLoQh0yEMMTtZzMGPWCjCC7Jl23mljDWYS4yj68vilGKl2vGvM8gOL_g_IzrZd3_wIAAP__ao6O2w) along 6.5 miles of the major corridor, which is being lowered by 65 feet. The project includes a pump station capable of moving 130,000 gallons of stormwater per minute. Two German-made boring machines will be delivered next spring to dig the tunnels. The "double shield" machines are expected to produce vibrations that can be felt at the surface while advancing up to 50 feet a day and installing pre-cast concrete panels that line the tunnel walls. TxDOT has [constructed nine drop shafts](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3S4yAQRE-DMlSAfgkINlHmTTdUjcXIml0ELhhb8u235Ct88avu6n5_bvMNKFB8_IYdHZ9rmiMeJSAz5nl7Rf6bKJaCERgzLLikHTPNRplOaiXVMHug8Jnbyru78lZX6PTQ2bFprTbV5sau0bbD5a4Gqyz2o_WrxlH30FizGlWRu8q0UoPWSre2Xr1u7Ai6660ZR9OLVqEnTrnmDRlPKGv4pDfmekl7FdzG_Cyi-SXMJMx0HEf974R4QWGm640wU0gLhItuH8mnTyzvLwoseaMiHwSR5ZYCyoiQJUXGXBgYZdPJZ4BYJKdvwss9ZRRmqrLzz4NCoNIPolWPHSh8B_HPNL6d-R8AAP__4OyIEA) along the tunnel route to provide access to the machines. "Crews anticipate working in these areas during the day, at night, and on the weekends" until the project's expected completion in 2029, TxDOT said. Before the work begins, the contractor will provide the public with an opportunity to see and touch the machines in person. Check out TxDOT’s [website](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2ypCAUQOHVYKYFKDYEBJOYvUkntK5wu-UVPxbcbnX3UzNbeBs4der787V-QYghv35DQkvXs6wZzxaRCOu6vzN9l5BbwwyEFRy6krCGVXKpesF7_lg9hHivU-ftxr0RHVrxUEaPkxGy2y2ClJvbuJZeb05Nfp6VAC24UaMxWnXB_osJzh9CcDGZ4enFaDQINRuptZzZxNEHKnWgHQkvaM94lw_WwZXURbsTHY2Nv5hcmFzO8xzo8oWGV_kwuaQ7lS3EQPeomFyOWr7RUWNycXDg1TvMVCEyufgKIcMLe3rnjLGH7PvjnY6-EVAoedgpxa5af5whxtDmB5v4K0GI_0foZ3wfK_8GAAD__09bhk8) for more information on the project.

On this day in 1943, military historian and political commentator was born in San Antonio. North was a Marine Corps platoon commander during the Vietnam War, and he helped orchestrate sales of arms to the Contra rebels in Nicaragua as a staffer for the National Security Council in the 1980s. After charges against him were dismissed, North ran for Congress, hosted radio and TV shows, and served as president of the National Rifle Association. This August, he . Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Abbott Authorizes National Guard Deployment Gov. Greg Abbott has authorized President Donald Trump to Texas National Guard members to other states to protect federal officials amid protests against immigration enforcement operations. "You can either fully enforce protection for federal employees or get out of the way and let Texas Guard do it ," in a Sunday social media post. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said the deployment to Illinois, Oregon, or other states would last up to 60 days. Later Sunday, a Trump-appointed judge blocked the administration from deploying National Guard troops from any state to Oregon, expanding a Saturday order that applied to the Oregon National Guard. On Monday, a Biden-appointed judge to block the deployment of National Guard troops in Illinois. Oregon Gov. Tina Kotek an "escalation of the President’s dangerous, un-American misuse of states' National Guard members and hard-earned taxpayer dollars." Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker, meanwhile, characterized it as "Trump’s Invasion." Wesley Hunt Joins Senate Race U.S. Rep. Wesley Hunt of Houston announced he is on Monday, joining incumbent John Cornyn and Attorney General Ken Paxton in competing for the Republican nomination. Hunt, 43, flew helicopters in the Army after graduating from West Point, and he has represented a heavily Republican district in northwest Houston since 2023. He "the most consistently conservative legislator representing Texas in Congress." "The U.S. Senate race in Texas must be about more than a petty feud between two men who have spent months trading barbs ," in a statement. “ With my candidacy, this race will finally be about what's most important: Texas.” A Cornyn spokesman dismissed Hunt's campaign as a "quixotic quest for relevancy" that would drain financial resources and "endanger the Trump agenda from being passed." Paxton, meanwhile, to the race, saying "primaries are good for our party and our voters." TxDOT Building 6.5-Mile Tunnel in Austin As part of a $4.5 billion project to expand I-35 through Austin, a 22-foot-wide drainage tunnel is being built along 6.5 miles of the major corridor, which is being lowered by 65 feet. The project includes a pump station capable of moving 130,000 gallons of stormwater per minute. Two German-made boring machines will be delivered next spring to dig the tunnels. The "double shield" machines are expected to produce vibrations that can be felt at the surface while advancing up to 50 feet a day and installing pre-cast concrete panels that line the tunnel walls. TxDOT has along the tunnel route to provide access to the machines. "Crews anticipate working in these areas during the day, at night, and on the weekends" until the project's expected completion in 2029, TxDOT said. Before the work begins, the contractor will provide the public with an opportunity to see and touch the machines in person. Check out TxDOT’s for more information on the project. | Flying together with our sponsor Unknown number calling? It’s not random... In just **18 days** , we gather in **Philadelphia** for the **Seed & Roots Summit: Faith, Family & The Future of Work** -- a day devoted to restoring purpose, dignity, and opportunity to the American story.

name: The New York Sun
subject: NY Times Fudges Coverage of Palestinian Terror Attack
body:
The New York Sun told you the truth.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2gfnad2tqldq62g038fjti5cbts7gp0qibcao9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3im4o72cth2bs)
---
|
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF THE PUBLISHER
---
| | Dear Friend,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from today, shows how the Times covered the story of a shocking terror attack in Israel. The Times makes no mention in the headline of who the perpetrators are. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less.**
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z03uo5r6467via1u6ql1jv7eqahck60l92kgvr30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3im4o72cth2bs)
---
| | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what **you** can do about it. The answer is simple: [Join The New York Sun today](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztk2613fd6m5mbc0j883log2ov910jlqvs4t30io_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3im4o72cth2bs). Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record!Don't wait. Join the movement to save American journalism now.
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhqdi8c8isl5bj29t1hc69trf93iunjbh8h7nuu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3im4o72cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjlu87f6m0ut89eksjbglc4mm6a1krgtuha81d0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3im4o72cth2bs)
---
|
---
| | **Dovid Efune**
Publisher, The New York Sun

# Aaron Siri LIVE in Central Texas!
---
| |
---
| **Join us for an Exclusive Event with Aaron Siri!** Texans for Vaccine Choice is thrilled to announce a **special evening with Aaron Siri** , America’s leading legal advocate for vaccine choice! Renowned for his relentless fight against Big Pharma and the corrupt regulatory machine in Washington, D.C., Mr. Siri recently **made waves exposing the hypocrisy** of Biden’s HHS during a powerful Capitol Hill testimony. Join us for an**inspiring keynote and Q &A with Aaron Siri** on his new book, _Vaccines, Amen: The Religion of Vaccines_ in Round Rock (near Austin) the evening of Wednesday, November 12. Each ticket includes a copy of the book. The **special VIP hour** will provide an opportunity to meet Mr. Siri in person and have your book signed. Mr. Siri’s groundbreaking legal work has held regulatory health agencies accountable, **exposing critical flaws in the vaccine program**. This is a rare opportunity to hear from a true champion of medical freedom LIVE! **Seating is limited!
*******Early bird pricing now through October 26*****

---
| | | [ Get Your Tickets HERE ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3NjAzNjYzMDUxNjg3NzU5LFwiclwiOjE2NzYwMzc0MDM0OTU2NDY4NH0iLCJzIjoiNzNkNWNhMmVlMmE4NjhlZiJ9)

name: Gut wrenching
subject: Dems could lose 3 key offices this 2025 in MAGA clean sweep
body:
On November 4, 2025, MAGA is preparing for a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UR5GYcFOj3MTAqTcp6axiMpac6I6W2wcUmMumq2bVvYYdOxUxmli3RD_0JGwKTYssEgouwLBB0mSrpST31RNQgqe4AiP3-ypp8AUhC6BKsMM2Oa8DJEqnq_XoUP8om5v2wJmGrZ7vwdl6dmc0MqJtWYWooNxnLtcLToux9VjWvt7aSbx6rP52WOjGRvaTSzHmt_ZldYgdMYuRUZS7QPN9RhHOD4emk3L5-195jV0S-k=&c=QiwDf8qma05CmxgPWRqy6LVWTxtK0poVOPCB6r3PJ3L0WwILJutZSA==&ch=LFJQ0TNBTxn0iyqG-BxuDTKTRRy8_5QR5MAnSSLVE9vaCINcqAuiqA==)
---
| Friend,
Below are just a few selections of the deceptive messages specifically targeted to Democratic voters being mailed and aired on TV by MAGA-funded groups in the all important 2025 battle for control of the PA supreme court.
"You can defend democracy"
"Term limit the Supreme Court"
"Force an election for a new Supreme Court"
They are spreading these lies because Democrats coming out in this election is an existential threat to the GOP's objectives for 2026 and 2028 because if they take the Pennsylvania Supreme Court they guarantee MAGA will win this state in 2026 and in 2028.
The group sharing these messages, Commonwealth Partners, is funded by Pennsylvania's richest man, Jeff Yass. Yass runs the Wall Street firm Susquehanna International Group and has a net worth of $65 billion. He has given huge sums of money to MAGA and now unfortunately owns a part of TikTok.
Now, with only weeks to go before Election Day, spending in this critical race has reached new records, exceeding any previous judicial retention election in Pennsylvania. And there is much, much more yet to come from the billionaires who helped Trump gain power last year.
On Tuesday, November 4, MAGA is preparing to make a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court by knocking out 3 Democratic justices in one election.
If we lose, MAGA activists will have the clearance they need to institute an extreme abortion ban--against the will of the voters--and to redistrict the PA congressional map to wipe away Democratic-held seats for good. Pennsylvania would become an uphill battle for Dems to win in a good year.
[But if we win, the GOP will have wasted millions of dollars and untold resources here if we do the work to win right now. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $5 to help us save Pennsylvania and deliver a crushing blow to MAGA this year?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UR5GYcFOj3MTAqTcp6axiMpac6I6W2wcUmMumq2bVvYYdOxUxmli3RD_0JGwKTYssEgouwLBB0mSrpST31RNQgqe4AiP3-ypp8AUhC6BKsMM2Oa8DJEqnq_XoUP8om5v2wJmGrZ7vwdl6dmc0MqJtWYWooNxnLtcLToux9VjWvt7aSbx6rP52WOjGRvaTSzHmt_ZldYgdMYuRUZS7QPN9RhHOD4emk3LQK9Td2qw590=&c=QiwDf8qma05CmxgPWRqy6LVWTxtK0poVOPCB6r3PJ3L0WwILJutZSA==&ch=LFJQ0TNBTxn0iyqG-BxuDTKTRRy8_5QR5MAnSSLVE9vaCINcqAuiqA==)

clean_body: On November 4, 2025, MAGA is preparing for a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court. | | | | | == | Friend, Below are just a few selections of the deceptive messages specifically targeted to Democratic voters being mailed and aired on TV by MAGA-funded groups in the all important 2025 battle for control of the PA supreme court. "You can defend democracy" "Term limit the Supreme Court" "Force an election for a new Supreme Court" They are spreading these lies because Democrats coming out in this election is an existential threat to the GOP's objectives for 2026 and 2028 because if they take the Pennsylvania Supreme Court they guarantee MAGA will win this state in 2026 and in 2028. The group sharing these messages, Commonwealth Partners, is funded by Pennsylvania's richest man, Jeff Yass. Yass runs the Wall Street firm Susquehanna International Group and has a net worth of $65 billion. He has given huge sums of money to MAGA and now unfortunately owns a part of TikTok. Now, with only weeks to go before Election Day, spending in this critical race has reached new records, exceeding any previous judicial retention election in Pennsylvania. And there is much, much more yet to come from the billionaires who helped Trump gain power last year. On Tuesday, November 4, MAGA is preparing to make a clean sweep: spending millions of dollars to strip Dems of their 5-2 majority on the state supreme court by knocking out 3 Democratic justices in one election. If we lose, MAGA activists will have the clearance they need to institute an extreme abortion ban--against the will of the voters--and to redistrict the PA congressional map to wipe away Democratic-held seats for good. Pennsylvania would become an uphill battle for Dems to win in a good year. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == We only have 28 days left to get this right. There is no time to waste. Every moment, and every dollar, counts. Thank you for your help. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: Demented
subject: Trump's thugs drag children out of bed, zip tie their hands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo—sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010uhScWNA1eIZaacIfxerx_5t0owcJcdEB32hX1HE1D28T4L6m_uMj7sdXy95mnvNZ7e6SmXPK0l6dGDanzUCV3NNuux0ASJ9_QH-rgvCCVqq9uZXdT9maJOSOiZyiwreY9HbHPKHM22zeE0iY7HIblIeLgEOa0sj91wsjx7lVZw6gL1KeeGo4E-V6DD0BVK30dNnqJ-2gP6_IWhNCY1Wng5Xl3c8K235lZlFv3FVOEw=&c=ow8-EI8KUPqxZ4c_FKZkaQKZe8XjXOSNKJl2RsQkum8RWOe-Z1sKxw==&ch=sSU4XfLD40VlW6FDiwYasPZYsAgoBvZFziO-dvuUC0w3jcpRreNI4A==)
---
| Peter,
On Sept. 30, in the dead of the night, ICE agents in full military gear and armed with assault rifles rappelled from a blackhawk helicopter on the roof of an apartment complex in Chicago.
ICE then proceeded to go door-to-door, busting down doors, dragging residents out of their bed, zip-tying their hands, and shoving them into the back of pitch black U-Haul.
They detained every single person in the apartment complex, including American citizens, and most egregiously, children:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010uhScWNA1eIZaacIfxerx_5t0owcJcdEB32hX1HE1D28T4L6m_uMj7sdXy95mnvNZ7e6SmXPK0l6dGDanzUCV3NNuux0ASJ9_QH-rgvCCVqq9uZXdT9maJOSOiZyiwreY9HbHPKHM22zeE0iY7HIblIeLgEOa0sj91wsjx7lVZw6gL1KeeGo4E-V6DD0BVK30dNnqJ-2gP6_IWhNCY1Wnlpe1ZnTYD_iwoM0u8BXMko=&c=ow8-EI8KUPqxZ4c_FKZkaQKZe8XjXOSNKJl2RsQkum8RWOe-Z1sKxw==&ch=sSU4XfLD40VlW6FDiwYasPZYsAgoBvZFziO-dvuUC0w3jcpRreNI4A==)
---
| | | | Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo--sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence meant to scare his political enemies into submission.
This demented display of fascist violence in our cities is deeply unpopular with the American people, with 60% of Americans saying they oppose National Guard deployments in a recent New York Times/Sienna poll.
But Trump continues to escalate his war on America, expanding National Guard deployments to Chicago and Portland in just the past few days. He's acting as if he doesn't need to worry about backlash from voters, as if there isn't going to be another election.
And that is exactly what will happen if Trump takes the Pennsylvania Supreme Court from Democrats on November 4th.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010uhScWNA1eIZaacIfxerx_5t0owcJcdEB32hX1HE1D28T4L6m_uMj7sdXy95mnvNZ7e6SmXPK0l6dGDanzUCV3NNuux0ASJ9_QH-rgvCCVqq9uZXdT9maJOSOiZyiwreY9HbHPKHM22zeE0iY7HIblIeLgEOa0sj91wsjx7lVZw6gL1KeeGo4E-V6DD0BVK30dNnqJ-2gP6_IWhNCY1WnvgObOWw-L1hbyq-Rnymh6Y=&c=ow8-EI8KUPqxZ4c_FKZkaQKZe8XjXOSNKJl2RsQkum8RWOe-Z1sKxw==&ch=sSU4XfLD40VlW6FDiwYasPZYsAgoBvZFziO-dvuUC0w3jcpRreNI4A==)
---
| | | | If Trump topples the democratic majority on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections.
He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether--all but locking down PA for MAGA and the path to the White House for when Trump runs for a third term.
And the most terrifying part is that if the election were held today, Trump would win. MAGA billionaires like Jeffrey Yass just launched a surprise attack in this obscure election while Democrats were asleep--suddenly spending tens of millions to oust the Democrats on the court.
Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the largest Democratic organizations working to stop MAGA's coup attempt in PA. But with only 28 days left until election day, we are still being outspent 10-1 while PA is being completely blanketed with MAGA propaganda about the upcoming election.
[Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 to help Defend Our Court's stop Trump's fascist war against America?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010uhScWNA1eIZaacIfxerx_5t0owcJcdEB32hX1HE1D28T4L6m_uMj7sdXy95mnvN7kz30FWDUY2ocK0DfhbEoEe0VuMdxE9X-j27rhgEw5OiF0FZPj-wB1OrxtjLSPmIBbt7m9yqLP0tCvZQyrYMaevsMx65-dukKbnpcHeTwzQYfYdwsOLLWR3KM3hK06UbXc-V4dKnVud9p3ozA9UdOATp0D7RLp9VCt2iVVWssYEaA7KSA5cjEg==&c=ow8-EI8KUPqxZ4c_FKZkaQKZe8XjXOSNKJl2RsQkum8RWOe-Z1sKxw==&ch=sSU4XfLD40VlW6FDiwYasPZYsAgoBvZFziO-dvuUC0w3jcpRreNI4A==)

clean_body: Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo—sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence | | | | | == | Peter, On Sept. 30, in the dead of the night, ICE agents in full military gear and armed with assault rifles rappelled from a blackhawk helicopter on the roof of an apartment complex in Chicago. ICE then proceeded to go door-to-door, busting down doors, dragging residents out of their bed, zip-tying their hands, and shoving them into the back of pitch black U-Haul. They detained every single person in the apartment complex, including American citizens, and most egregiously, children: | | == | | | | Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo--sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence meant to scare his political enemies into submission. This demented display of fascist violence in our cities is deeply unpopular with the American people, with 60% of Americans saying they oppose National Guard deployments in a recent New York Times/Sienna poll. But Trump continues to escalate his war on America, expanding National Guard deployments to Chicago and Portland in just the past few days. He's acting as if he doesn't need to worry about backlash from voters, as if there isn't going to be another election. And that is exactly what will happen if Trump takes the Pennsylvania Supreme Court from Democrats on November 4th. | | == | | | | If Trump topples the democratic majority on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether--all but locking down PA for MAGA and the path to the White House for when Trump runs for a third term. And the most terrifying part is that if the election were held today, Trump would win. MAGA billionaires like Jeffrey Yass just launched a surprise attack in this obscure election while Democrats were asleep--suddenly spending tens of millions to oust the Democrats on the court. Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the largest Democratic organizations working to stop MAGA's coup attempt in PA. But with only 28 days left until election day, we are still being outspent 10-1 while PA is being completely blanketed with MAGA propaganda about the upcoming election. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == If this is just Trump acting as if there will be no competitive elections, imagine what it will be like when that is the actual reality. And that will be reality if the PA Supreme Court falls. We cannot let that happen. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

# _Choose USAF Veteran, Devoted Husband, Father and Successful Houston Entrepreneur - Warren Howell for Harris County Judge_

| |
Dear Friends and Neighbors,
Let’s talk signage.
As many of you know, visibility in every corner of our county matters. From neighborhoods to rural county farm-to-market roads, yard signs help show that our campaign is strong, organized, and backed by real people — _**not special interests**_.
We're ready to roll out a new wave of signs, but we need your help. We’re aiming to raise **$5,000** this week to cover printing and distribution costs across the county.
Can you pitch in $15, $30, or whatever you can to help us put signs in yards, along roadsides, and in front of local businesses?
DONATE TODAY 👉 [www.howellforharriscounty.com](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=4b23e51e17&e=7c92d84deb)
Every sign placed is more than just a name — it's a message of trust, leadership, and a vision for our county's future.
Thank you for your continued support. We’re building something strong together — and it starts right here, right now.
Thank you again for your time and support. If you have any questions, or would like to host a fundraising event, **please don’t hesitate to reach out**.
P.S. Want a sign for your yard or business? Donate any amount and we will rush one over to you!
Respectfully,
**Kayla Hensley**
Fundraising Director
Warren Howell for County Judge
[**kaylahensley@howellforharriscounty.com**](mailto:kaylahensley@howellforharriscounty.com)**(c) 832-992-6242**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We're not letting Trump rig the 2026 elections without a fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,[janepac
body:
Here’s what Prop 50 means for our democracy

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116766690/574366404/1328794144?refcode=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxODk0Nzg3LTdkYTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FFj4LozQiKQNjA2hGVR2s8DOqH1tGQyq1WLGzxL1G5w=&emci=4f884cd2-2ca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
What if I told you we have a rare opportunity this November to defend our democracy from Donald Trump's authoritarian agenda? Let me explain. As you know, Trump and his Republican allies orchestrated a power grab in Texas. In August, the GOP redrew congressional district lines to gain five more House seats in the 2026 midterm elections — and now other GOP-led states are racing to follow their lead. They're counting on us to do absolutely nothing about it. But California has other plans. On November 4th, we have a chance to fight back with Proposition 50. **Prop 50, also known as the Election Rigging Response Act, is a California ballot initiative that lets voters decide whether the state should redraw its own congressional maps to counter Trump's power grab in Texas.** If Republicans steal enough seats through gerrymandering, Trump gets two more years of unchecked power. Two more years to gut climate protections, destroy our First Amendment rights, attack immigrant families, and abandon working communities to corporate polluters. I refuse to let that happen. And I know you do too. **[Can I count on you to volunteer and help stop Trump’s power grab? There are remote phone bank shifts 6 days a week, so you can join from anywhere to help save our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116766691/574366405/603895596?utm_source=em_JPC_OTH_Prop50_100725&refcode=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxODk0Nzg3LTdkYTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FFj4LozQiKQNjA2hGVR2s8DOqH1tGQyq1WLGzxL1G5w=&emci=4f884cd2-2ca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)** | [**📲 JOIN A PHONEBANK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116766692/574366406/603895596?utm_source=em_JPC_OTH_Prop50_100725&refcode=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxODk0Nzg3LTdkYTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FFj4LozQiKQNjA2hGVR2s8DOqH1tGQyq1WLGzxL1G5w=&emci=4f884cd2-2ca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
Proposition 50 gives voters the power to level the playing field. When Trump rigs five seats in Texas, we respond by flipping up to five seats in California.
While the new maps will only be temporary and expire in 2030, they give Democrats a real chance to provide the checks and balances our democracy desperately needs right now.
This is exactly the kind of moment that defines our movement. Do we roll over when bullies abuse their power? Or do we stand up and fight back? I've spent my life choosing to fight. And right now, I need you to be one of the people to fight back, too.
JanePAC is mobilizing every resource we have to ensure California voters know what Prop 50 really is — our best chance to stop Trump from stealing the 2026 elections before they begin.
**We need volunteers across the country to make phone calls, have real conversations with voters, and make sure every Californian understands what's at stake on November 4th.**
**[What do you say? Every conversation you have could be the one that convinces a voter to choose democracy over authoritarianism.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116766693/574366407/603895596?utm_source=em_JPC_OTH_Prop50_100725&refcode=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxODk0Nzg3LTdkYTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FFj4LozQiKQNjA2hGVR2s8DOqH1tGQyq1WLGzxL1G5w=&emci=4f884cd2-2ca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)**
[**JOIN US →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116766694/574366435/603895596?utm_source=em_JPC_OTH_Prop50_100725&refcode=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxODk0Nzg3LTdkYTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FFj4LozQiKQNjA2hGVR2s8DOqH1tGQyq1WLGzxL1G5w=&emci=4f884cd2-2ca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=31894787-7da3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
We're not talking about normal political games here. We're talking about the future of our democracy.
In solidarity,
xx Jane

clean_body: Here’s what Prop 50 means for our democracy | What if I told you we have a rare opportunity this November to defend our democracy from Donald Trump's authoritarian agenda? Let me explain. As you know, Trump and his Republican allies orchestrated a power grab in Texas. In August, the GOP redrew congressional district lines to gain five more House seats in the 2026 midterm elections — and now other GOP-led states are racing to follow their lead. They're counting on us to do absolutely nothing about it. But California has other plans. On November 4th, we have a chance to fight back with Proposition 50. Prop 50, also known as the Election Rigging Response Act, is a California ballot initiative that lets voters decide whether the state should redraw its own congressional maps to counter Trump's power grab in Texas. If Republicans steal enough seats through gerrymandering, Trump gets two more years of unchecked power. Two more years to gut climate protections, destroy our First Amendment rights, attack immigrant families, and abandon working communities to corporate polluters. I refuse to let that happen. And I know you do too. | Proposition 50 gives voters the power to level the playing field. When Trump rigs five seats in Texas, we respond by flipping up to five seats in California. While the new maps will only be temporary and expire in 2030, they give Democrats a real chance to provide the checks and balances our democracy desperately needs right now. This is exactly the kind of moment that defines our movement. Do we roll over when bullies abuse their power? Or do we stand up and fight back? I've spent my life choosing to fight. And right now, I need you to be one of the people to fight back, too. JanePAC is mobilizing every resource we have to ensure California voters know what Prop 50 really is — our best chance to stop Trump from stealing the 2026 elections before they begin. We need volunteers across the country to make phone calls, have real conversations with voters, and make sure every Californian understands what's at stake on November 4th. We're not talking about normal political games here. We're talking about the future of our democracy. In solidarity, xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,. Authorized by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Not authorized by any other federal, state, or local candidate or candidate’s committee. When I talk to voters at the doors, when I meet families at community events, when I see the growing strength of our grassroots campaign — it’s obvious we are building something powerful. **This isn’t just my campaign. clean_body: | | | Friend — I want to take a moment to thank you personally. In this toss-up race, we have a path to victory. Because of your support, I can feel the energy building all across our district — and for the first time, I see victory clearly in our sights. When I talk to voters at the doors, when I meet families at community events, when I see the growing strength of our grassroots campaign — it’s obvious we are building something powerful. This isn’t just my campaign. It’s our campaign. But I also know we can’t stop here. Charles Koch and Elon Musk and Ian Lovejoy and Donald Trump are watching our success, and they will throw everything they have at us in the final stretch. That’s why I need you with me now more than ever. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. If we keep pushing — if we keep knocking on doors, making calls, and powering this campaign with grassroots donations — I know we will win. I am so proud of the campaign we are building together. Let’s finish strong. With gratitude, Elizabeth Guzman P.S. ** | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | **BREAKING NEWS: DEMOCRATIC REPRESENTATIVES AND GOVERNORS CALL FOR USING THE 25TH AMENDMENT TO REMOVE DONALD TRUMP FROM OFFICE »**

[**We need to know if Democrats in your state agree: Should Congress invoke the 25th amendment to REMOVE Donald Trump from office? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251007_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21399%2E878179%2EJi7E3Q) | [YES, ADD MY NAME: DEMAND CONGRESS INVOKE THE 25TH AMENDMENT TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE WHITE HOUSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251007_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21399%2E878179%2EJi7E3Q)
---
Trump said he would be a ‘dictator on Day 1’ and that’s _exactly_ what he’s done:

**He GUTTED Medicaid for MILLIONS of Americans!
He BANNED DEI events like Pride and Black History Month!
He sent the MARINES to Los Angeles and the National Guard to DC!
And he wants to serve an unprecedented _THIRD TERM_ as President!**

He is DANGEROUS, folks — _but we can only do so much without your help._

[**That’s why we need to know: Will you add your name to our time-sensitive petition calling on Congress to invoke the 25th Amendment and REMOVE Trump from the White House? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251007_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21399%2E878179%2EJi7E3Q)

Hi Peter,

Aftyn Behn’s primary election is **TODAY** , and she needs our support to win so she can deliver the women of Tennessee the representation they deserve (and desperately need).

Tennessee ranks among the lowest for maternal care outcomes AND female representation in government. **We know we need women in the rooms where decisions are being made about OUR bodies – and Tennessee is a perfect example of what happens when men are the ones making all the laws.**

Tennessee has a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. However, in her role as State Representative, Aftyn Behn has bravely and successfully blocked dangerous legislation about abortion access from getting passed. By sending a fiercely pro-choice and pro-women WOMAN to Congress, we will have a fighting chance of protecting and defending the women of Tennessee from the whims of a sexist, “pro-life”, majority-male government.

Click here to make a quick $10 split donation between HBM and Aftyn Behn: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251006BehnC_DB_NO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=10)**

You can join this historic and important movement to change the situation for women in the South.

For ALL women,

Diana Bula
Political Manager, Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Peter –

Aftyn Behn will be the __only__ __woman__ on the ballot out of 16 candidates. The rest are men. She also has the most experience advocating for the women of Tennessee – and winning important fights that have protected thousands of Tennessee women.

** Her primary is _this_ _TUESDAY._ We can help advance the only proven pro-choice champion through the primary in this critical opportunity for Democrats to secure another seat in the U.S. Congress. **

In the official ranking of states based on women in government, Tennessee ranks 46th out of 50 states. Tennessee has nine House seats in Washington – only one is occupied by a woman.

Additionally, in Tennessee, Black women are nearly three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women — most of them preventable. **TN ranks among the bottom nationally for maternal health outcomes,** and the women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

[**It’s dangerous to be a woman in Tennessee, and Aftyn has been doing everything she possibly can to change that. She needs to raise an additional $10,000 before her primary election on Tuesday to reach as many voters as possible and advance to the General Election later this year. Rush a split $20.25 contribution between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251006BehnC_DB_NO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25)

Before serving in the TN legislature, Aftyn organized with reproductive justice and healthcare access advocates across Tennessee and the South. She has worked closely with groups on the ground to expand access to healthcare, combat stigma, and defend reproductive freedom in some of the toughest turf in the country. But earlier this week, she told us that **she has been able to accomplish more in her time as an elected lawmaker than she ever could have imagined as a rural organizer.** We NEED her voice and her tireless determination in **_government_** , where it belongs.

This seat is in a red district in Tennessee, but recent polling indicates that of all the Democrats vying for the seat, **Aftyn would be the candidate with the best chances of winning against the Republican** in the General Election. If you were looking for a chance to elect a phenomenal woman _and_ flip a federal seat.... **This is it. Your support could make all the difference.**

[**Join Aftyn’s deeply needed movement in Tennessee by splitting $20.25 or more between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign RIGHT NOW.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251006BehnC_DB_NO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25)

Together,

Diana Bula
Political Manager, Her Bold Move

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

| Hi Peter,
While Democratic governors from across the nation spend the day rubbing elbows at a luxury "policy conference" in Boston, our Republican farm team is out knocking doors, making calls, and doing the real, hard work it takes to win elections.
The contrast couldn't be clearer.
⛔ They're sipping cocktails and giving speeches to each other, about each other.
✅ We're talking to voters face-to-face about the issues discussed at the dinner table: the economy, border security, family, and freedoms.
Let them throw fancy parties. We're busy building a movement.
But here's the truth: grassroots operations like ours don't run on cocktail chatter.
The GOP runs on real support from real people like you.

Let them have their laughs at their fancy conference, because we'll have the last word at the ballot box. | == | To Victory! | | | Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party | | | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7a7a3929-7491-49b7-9f1b-c6aebc8a7380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The city of Portland, Oregon is no stranger to being in the national spotlight due to the city's strong Antifa presence. While they have made headlines this past summer for what Antifa was doing outside of the ICE facility in the southern portion of the city, the Portland Police Bureau has been the receiving end of scathing criticisms because of what they are _not_ doing.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..5Fl_gOXFuIZ9iUd3_kkRIZRSr9pn_RWUOESf8a8Trko?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=175519579)
The Portland police's inaction to enforce basic laws outside of the ICE facility has been a growing problem, not just for the federal agents assigned to work and protect it, but also the residents of a low-income apartment complex just across the street. The city was taken to court over the issue by some of the residents, but the judge ruled the local cops are not obligated to do crowd control outside the federal building.
With the judiciary on their side, Antifa continued their siege of the courthouse, mainly at night. That changed this past week with the deployment of Oregon National Guardsmen being officially requested, on orders from President Donald Trump. If the city and state are not going to do its part, then the federal government will. This move by the War Department predictably angered the local radicals and they redoubled their efforts.
Antifa mostly blamed conservative reporters, namely Katie Daviscourt of the Post Millennial, for "falsely" portraying what they are doing in order to spur the military to be activated. Which is not the case.
But facts do not matter to these anarcho-communists. So they attacked Daviscourt and got away with it, all thanks to the Portland Police Bureau. Daviscourt followed her attacker, pointed her out to an officer, but the officer just let the suspect go. This was all caught on video.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/4e27c176-0f25-44e1-8bc4-6f6a7b9cffc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Reset Can Give Birth To America's Greatest Era Yet](https://substack.com/redirect/4e27c176-0f25-44e1-8bc4-6f6a7b9cffc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e27c176-0f25-44e1-8bc4-6f6a7b9cffc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/4e27c176-0f25-44e1-8bc4-6f6a7b9cffc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

**Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset.**
However, only those who download a copy of our **2025 Wealth Protection Guide** will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset.
**[Claim Your FREE Guide Now](https://substack.com/redirect/4e27c176-0f25-44e1-8bc4-6f6a7b9cffc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and discover how to position yourself for this golden opportunity.**
[Claim My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/4e27c176-0f25-44e1-8bc4-6f6a7b9cffc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Then comes the arrest of Nick Sortor, a journalist who uses X to report. Sortor was also documenting what was happening and, like Daviscourt, attacked him. While he defended himself as best he could while being outnumbered, he was arrested by Portland police officers, who seemed to suddenly remember they have the power to arrest people. Just not actual lawbreakers.
This understandably caused a firestorm aimed not so much at Antifa this time, but the people who are charged with keeping the city safe. Portland Police Chief Bob Day downplayed the violence towards federal agents at the ICE facility because "this is one city block."
He also dismissed videos by Daviscourt and others showing the months-long attacks by Antifa because the videos are "30-second, 20-second, 15-second" clips.
Day has a history for being an advocate and consultant for DEI policies.
The "one city block" excuse was also used by Antifa's defenders locally and in the mainstream media during the federal courthouse siege in Portland during the 2020 riots. Antifa took a break from attacking PPB stations and attacked the federal courthouse on a nightly basis. But because it was "one block" it was not a problem, according to leftists. Similar to what is happening today south of downtown, PPB was forbidden from responding to the violence. The feds were left on their own. This allowed the mob to attack and then easily retreat once agents went into the streets to chase after them. After the commotion died down by the courthouse, Antifa went back to targeting PPB stations.
Time will tell if the National Guard deployment will solve this year's siege. Despite it being late for riot season, once the weather turns cooler, large crowds are expected off for the rest of October. It might have to take the full effects of winter to finally put an end to this hotspot, but their tactics will almost certainly shift.
* * *

Let's start with a simple truth we've forgotten: parents educated their children long before the government built a building. For most of history, kids learned at the kitchen table, at church, on the farm, or as an apprentice.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8aacd470-b9d8-4283-9c08-f65eadf5522a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [sofatutor](https://substack.com/redirect/52ce336e-169f-4cdf-8c4f-11622fb379c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/0d04561e-19ad-4ff7-b0be-482a10ad79f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's start with a simple truth we've forgotten: **parents educated their children long before the government built a building.** For most of history, kids learned at the kitchen table, at church, on the farm, or as an apprentice. Compulsory, one-size-fits-all schooling is the new idea. Parents teaching their own children is the old idea--and in many cases, the better one.
## Why homeschool works
Homeschooling gives a child what a bureaucracy can't: **time, attention, and standards.**
* If a student struggles, you slow down **today** , not next year.
* If a student is ready to move, you move.
* You shape character and habits along with math and history.

You don't need a stack of mandates to do that. You need a plan, a kitchen table, and parents who care.
## "But what about results?"
Look at what actually happens to homeschoolers when they reach college and the workplace. Study after study finds they perform **as well or better** than public-school graduates on academics. Many post **higher first-year GPAs** , keep that edge through senior year, and **graduate at higher rates**. Employers regularly praise their maturity and work ethic. Are there exceptions? Of course. But the overall picture is solid: a well-run home education holds its own--and often wins.
## "What about socialization?"
This is the laziest objection I heard in the Legislature. Homeschoolers play sports, join 4-H, work part-time, serve in church, and talk with adults every day. That's real socialization--across ages, not just a hallway of kids the same age repeating the same lines.
## Mississippi gets this right
Mississippi's homeschool law is simple and respectful. Families file a short notice each year and get to work. No maze of paperwork. No permission slip from Jackson. And support is everywhere--co-ops, church schools, tutoring pods, online and classical curricula. If a student wants AP calculus, welding, or both, you can build that path without begging for approval.
## The comparison that matters
The public system measures success by **inputs** --dollars, buildings, headcount. Families measure success by **outputs** --what a child actually knows and who they become. That's the difference. Taxpayers can pour more money into a system forever and never fix a bad fit for a single child. Parents can fix that in one decision.
## Why homeschool is often the best way
* **It fits the child, not the system.** Pacing, curriculum, and expectations match the student, not a statewide average.
* **It guards values.** Families can teach virtue, faith, and work ethic alongside academics--no apologies.
* **It 's efficient.** One focused hour at the table can beat three hours of classroom drift.
* **It builds adults.** Responsibility, self-direction, and real conversation with adults aren't "extras"--they're the point.

## A Mississippi plan that respects parents
If we want more kids to thrive, we should stop treating homeschoolers like a side note and start treating parents like partners.
1. **Protect homeschool freedom.** Keep the law simple. Every new mandate punishes the families who are actually doing the work.
2. **Let funding follow the student.** Education Savings Accounts should work for homeschoolers, not just systems.
3. **Open doors to dual enrollment and apprenticeships.** A 17-year-old should finish with a transcript **and** marketable skills or college credits.

Homeschooling isn't anti-school. It's **pro-child**. It trusts the people who love that child most--the parents--to make the decisions and carry the load. Mississippi should keep backing those parents, not systems, and let every family choose the path that gets their child ready for life.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

body:
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.
Donald Trump just attacked me on Truth Social.
_I will not be rattled._
I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians and shut down the federal government.
_Trump is attacking me because he feels threatened._
He knows that I will call out the chaos he's unleashed as President. He knows that I will stand up for Virginia at every opportunity as Governor. And he knows that we are on the verge of flipping the Governor's office from red to blue on November 4th.
**[But I can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to help us stand up to Trump's attacks by splitting a $10 contribution between our campaign and Heartland Patriots? name: Amy McGrath
subject: I just made this official:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116777692/574401231/-895354081?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.07_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmQwYzM1YS04NGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLPKOQxFtXEUkJSrT7cFyvUVKQ-vRGuN1oJURQTHHSM=) Folks,

We're at an inflection point in our country's history.

Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That's still my North Star. And every day, we're watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends.

And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering.

Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears.

**I'm announcing that I'm running for U.S. Senate.** We need leaders who won't be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country's foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don't scare me.

As you know, I've run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn't go our way. But in my line of work, you don't quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country.

Just like you, I'm sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they're throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn't know a backbone if it hit them in the face.

That's why I'm running. Because we deserve leaders who aren't afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. **That's what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Maggie Hassan, I'm not alone.**

Look, I know this race won't be easy. But here's the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we're brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn't had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell.

And I intend to win it.

**But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. _[Will you split a donation between me and Maggie Hassan to kickstart this campaign and help us wage a real fight for the future of our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116777693/574401232/-895354081?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.07_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmQwYzM1YS04NGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLPKOQxFtXEUkJSrT7cFyvUVKQ-vRGuN1oJURQTHHSM=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116777694/574401233/-895354081?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.07_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmQwYzM1YS04NGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLPKOQxFtXEUkJSrT7cFyvUVKQ-vRGuN1oJURQTHHSM=)

clean_body: = Folks, We're at an inflection point in our country's history. Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That's still my North Star. And every day, we're watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends. And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering. Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears. I'm announcing that I'm running for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who won't be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country's foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don't scare me. As you know, I've run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn't go our way. But in my line of work, you don't quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country. Just like you, I'm sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they're throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn't know a backbone if it hit them in the face. That's why I'm running. Because we deserve leaders who aren't afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. That's what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Maggie Hassan, I'm not alone. Look, I know this race won't be easy. But here's the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we're brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn't had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell. And I intend to win it. But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = For that and for everything to come in this campaign, thank you. Amy If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: How low will they go?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
Is there nothing Greg Abbott won’t do for Donald Trump? Is there no red line? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/fed-up-14189592?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=938ebbd1eb&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , **Is there nothing Greg Abbott won’t do for Donald Trump? Is there no red line?** Gerrymandering five congressional seats was only the beginning. Now, after being blocked by a federal judge from deploying the Oregon National Guard, Trump has turned to Texas, asking for 400 of our National Guard troops to go to war against American citizens in Portland and Chicago because he calls them “Antifa.” That's been blocked, too, of course. **This conduct is outrageous and worthy of immediate impeachment.** And our Governor? Greg Abbott is a politician desperate to keep Trump’s favor. He knows he can’t win his primary if Trump denounces him, so he gives Trump everything he wants, no matter the cost to Texans. Where’s our Attorney General in all this? Nowhere to be found. Ken Paxton has already sold out. He’s too busy chasing a seat in the U.S. Senate and boasting about his loyalty to Trump. His opponent, Senator John Cornyn, is doing the same. A third Republican contender for the U.S. Senate joined the primary race this week, so expect more of the same. It’s pathetic. Three men tripping over each other for Trump’s attention while ignoring the people they’re supposed to serve. These career politicians have no boundaries, no red lines, and no shame. _But Texas voters do._ **I’m Joe Jaworski. I’m ready. I’m unafraid. And I’m running to be your next Texas Attorney General to fight the bullies, stand up to Trump’s extreme and unconstitutional agenda, and restore integrity to this office.** Texas deserves courage, not cowardice. [**It's time for action. Will you join me in this fight? Donate today.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=278371b896&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,

****
