clean_body: Is there nothing Greg Abbott won’t do for Donald Trump? Is there no red line? | | | | | | | , Is there nothing Greg Abbott won’t do for Donald Trump? Is there no red line? Gerrymandering five congressional seats was only the beginning. Now, after being blocked by a federal judge from deploying the Oregon National Guard, Trump has turned to Texas, asking for 400 of our National Guard troops to go to war against American citizens in Portland and Chicago because he calls them “Antifa.” That's been blocked, too, of course. This conduct is outrageous and worthy of immediate impeachment. And our Governor? Greg Abbott is a politician desperate to keep Trump’s favor. He knows he can’t win his primary if Trump denounces him, so he gives Trump everything he wants, no matter the cost to Texans. Where’s our Attorney General in all this? Nowhere to be found. Ken Paxton has already sold out. He’s too busy chasing a seat in the U.S. Senate and boasting about his loyalty to Trump. His opponent, Senator John Cornyn, is doing the same. A third Republican contender for the U.S. Senate joined the primary race this week, so expect more of the same. It’s pathetic. Three men tripping over each other for Trump’s attention while ignoring the people they’re supposed to serve. These career politicians have no boundaries, no red lines, and no shame. But Texas voters do. I’m Joe Jaworski. I’m ready. I’m unafraid. And I’m running to be your next Texas Attorney General to fight the bullies, stand up to Trump’s extreme and unconstitutional agenda, and restore integrity to this office. Texas deserves courage, not cowardice. We'll still keep you updated on the fight for Virginia’s future. Hi Peter – This shutdown is not an accident. This is a direct assault on our Commonwealth. Washington Republicans shut down the federal government and left more than 200,000 Virginia federal workers and military families without paychecks. Trump has already stripped health care from hundreds of thousands, spiked premiums, and cheered on policies that put Virginia hospitals at risk. Now MAGA Republicans are making our workforce collateral damage in their chaos — and even threatening permanent firings. Here’s what that looks like on the ground:
* Delayed pay for defense, military, and contractors
* Families already stretched thin are getting squeezed harder
* Communities are losing spending power as paychecks dry up

This isn’t about budgets. It’s about power. And Republicans are willing to use shutdowns as a weapon, even if it means hurting Virginia’s economy and punishing our federal workforce. **Republicans in D.C. made their choice. Democrats in Virginia are making ours: defend and expand our Assembly majority so Virginians have leaders who will govern, not grandstand.** **[But here’s the truth: we can’t go on the offense or the defense without resources. What we raise now will determine the strength of our October field program. Help us stay focused in these final, most important days of the election by chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116779516/574407802/-1741199268?&refcode=E15558-20251004-FederalWorkers-SL-Shutdown&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWJkNmFlYS04NWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qxH8QEvchbqdQsXuZgqDC6F_oQMRaoI6f5jDt3xDSy8=)** | **************[Choose Virginia](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116779518/574407804/-1741199268?&refcode=E15558-20251004-FederalWorkers-SB-Shutdown&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWJkNmFlYS04NWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qxH8QEvchbqdQsXuZgqDC6F_oQMRaoI6f5jDt3xDSy8=)**************

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeavs9bcccpa5qkiduhmvk23t61eks2cd5d1k6o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm0o36cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd9sks9bu3n5ekq7m0beva2nut2v5pr9hd9a6mho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm0o36cph2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc5fdballsloiotakgu6i70l49nrsca420tm3rag_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm0o36cph2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

clean_body: My last chance. My Hail Mary. | Friend, Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice... As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – and KNOW – was RIGHT. The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Friend, The very fate of our Democracy and the electoral future of the Democratic party rests upon a Democratic victory in the sleepy and often overlooked **2025 ****Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election. ** If we lose this court, MAGA will seize control of Pennsylvania and will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict the PA congressional map making it blood red, and rig the '26 midterms and '28 presidential in the ultimate swing state - 19 electoral college votes down the drain. **Republicans pulled off a shocking lightning breakthrough last month and early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for.** These three factors explain why the GOP is winning: 1\. **Voter registration****** \- over the Summer, the Pennsylvania GOP shrunk the million voter registration gap that Democrats once held over Republicans to just a 50,000 vote lead. If these trends continue they will surpass Democrats before our November 4th Election Day. 2\. **Spending** \- bankrolled by the likes of Jeff Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania, Elon Musk, and Tristan Tate, accused human trafficker and brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate, the GOP effort to seize this court boasts a 10-1 spending advantage over Democrats. 3\. **Voter persuasion** \- because of their spending advantage Republicans are flooding airwaves, mailboxes, and social media, with disinformation. The Democratic persuasion program is overextended and struggling to contain the GOPs massive breakthrough with has no resources to go on the offensive. There is, however, a tangible path for Democrats to regain our advantage on each of these fronts and mount a comeback. **Defend Our Courts****,** the Democratic organization coordinating the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court's liberal majority, is working to contest the GOP on each of these fronts but we need to rapidly scale our program in the remaining 30 days until election day. The short runway and millions that will be required to salvage this race may seem daunting but our movement has done it in the past and we can do it again. In 2021, millions of Democrats from across the nation poured in small dollar donations to support Senators Ossoff and Warnock pull off stunning victories in the **Georgia Senate runoffs.** And in Spring 2025, Dems rallied around the **Wisconsin State Supreme Court race****,** a race with near identical stakes to ours, and successfully outraised and defeated Elon Musk and MAGA. This is a desperate call for all Democrats to rally around Pennsylvania like we did Georgia and Wisconsin. **[Can we count on you to split a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 between No Dem Left Behind and Defend Our Courts to help prevent a catastrophic defeat and propel historic Democratic wins? _We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how you win a swing state:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Join me in this campaign.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116781917/574414936/673566103?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_CooperSplit_251007_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzRjOTc0NC04OWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntOG2jfSSsD2ODvHThvGRhv6hH2Yexf1SCFBvUhVHqE=) Derek — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._

It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community and the commitment to stand for the rights that people hold dear.

**I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.**

As a U.S. Senator, I will protect our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.

And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are.

I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Derek. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. name: Demented
subject: Trump's thugs drag children out of bed, zip tie their hands
body:
Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo—sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence meant to scare his political enemie
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001opLi_EUIc6oSDvIfu6gUf6HbeUfi7Vi80QyO8m9xXwU-KLv6TaD2AI_n2M18EvniL1RgcQRUaNBDQ4qrPPVhv7JhZFLiee3fjfIzxl3K8j4h0f36Cimf5sa5JBaCp8qThtsJtFVMN9j5SnGI4JrfzEYjruN7kFg7JrGiVexeywt2R_5zxmgIcInX7GB99YAyLbUXA0GY0dlJMzA0CUzeu6Ojb9hZxk0XA-hVWmLYIU0=&c=v__0STceiIzV5BUOiyaBL_a6oygd0jA8TFHyS1HBYXDVM_5hGrrnnQ==&ch=sURLHU4rDsrc8gTEQmMaPf2mE-HAfuxRLSCXlqFS2nQxE3Ti6I9Jng==)
---
| Friend,
On Sept. 30, in the dead of the night, ICE agents in full military gear and armed with assault rifles rappelled from a blackhawk helicopter on the roof of an apartment complex in Chicago.
ICE then proceeded to go door-to-door, busting down doors, dragging residents out of their bed, zip-tying their hands, and shoving them into the back of pitch black U-Haul.
They detained every single person in the apartment complex, including American citizens, and most egregiously, children:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001opLi_EUIc6oSDvIfu6gUf6HbeUfi7Vi80QyO8m9xXwU-KLv6TaD2AI_n2M18EvniL1RgcQRUaNBDQ4qrPPVhv7JhZFLiee3fjfIzxl3K8j4h0f36Cimf5sa5JBaCp8qThtsJtFVMN9j5SnGI4JrfzEYjruN7kFg7JrGiVexeywt2R_5zxmgIcInX7GB99YAyLbUXA0GY0dlJMzA0CUzeu9lcAATqPk-RTBQzwCRAEcE=&c=v__0STceiIzV5BUOiyaBL_a6oygd0jA8TFHyS1HBYXDVM_5hGrrnnQ==&ch=sURLHU4rDsrc8gTEQmMaPf2mE-HAfuxRLSCXlqFS2nQxE3Ti6I9Jng==)
---
| Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo--sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence meant to scare his political enemies into submission.
This demented display of fascist violence in our cities is deeply unpopular with the American people, with 60% of Americans saying they oppose National Guard deployments in a recent New York Times/Sienna poll.
But Trump continues to escalate his war on America, expanding National Guard deployments to Chicago and Portland in just the past few days. He's acting as if he doesn't need to worry about backlash from voters, as if there isn't going to be another election.
And that is exactly what will happen if Trump takes the Pennsylvania Supreme Court from Democrats on November 4th.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001opLi_EUIc6oSDvIfu6gUf6HbeUfi7Vi80QyO8m9xXwU-KLv6TaD2AI_n2M18EvniL1RgcQRUaNBDQ4qrPPVhv7JhZFLiee3fjfIzxl3K8j4h0f36Cimf5sa5JBaCp8qThtsJtFVMN9j5SnGI4JrfzEYjruN7kFg7JrGiVexeywt2R_5zxmgIcInX7GB99YAyLbUXA0GY0dlJMzA0CUzeu-UcuwAlvzoWfQGLGz5nVXg=&c=v__0STceiIzV5BUOiyaBL_a6oygd0jA8TFHyS1HBYXDVM_5hGrrnnQ==&ch=sURLHU4rDsrc8gTEQmMaPf2mE-HAfuxRLSCXlqFS2nQxE3Ti6I9Jng==)
---
If Trump topples the democratic majority on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections.
He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether--all but locking down PA for MAGA and the path to the White House for when Trump runs for a third term.
And the most terrifying part is that if the election were held today, Trump would win. MAGA billionaires like Jeffrey Yass just launched a surprise attack in this obscure election while Democrats were asleep--suddenly spending tens of millions to oust the Democrats on the court.
Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the largest Democratic organizations working to stop MAGA's coup attempt in PA. But with only 28 days left until election day, we are still being outspent 10-1 while PA is being completely blanketed with MAGA propaganda about the upcoming election. [Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5 to help Defend Our Court's stop Trump's fascist war against America?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001opLi_EUIc6oSDvIfu6gUf6HbeUfi7Vi80QyO8m9xXwU-KLv6TaD2AI_n2M18EvniDn7-mDzyKBzAqnokD633VpsQOe-on3_VhK2SEcu1LeIj153mV2VbS1N_-884EbiQzTPbEGemZQa4ZI90XxapG64RBWJT7m152DpWqLBla5GaLNXQ0gIDGZAr9EFhV9NroNJaUVoCj9SCJZ87qPZdNEsP7SqAJgFMz5DbijFPxgOG-SOLlcJ9bA==&c=v__0STceiIzV5BUOiyaBL_a6oygd0jA8TFHyS1HBYXDVM_5hGrrnnQ==&ch=sURLHU4rDsrc8gTEQmMaPf2mE-HAfuxRLSCXlqFS2nQxE3Ti6I9Jng==)

clean_body: Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo—sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence meant to scare his political enemie | | | | | == | Friend, On Sept. 30, in the dead of the night, ICE agents in full military gear and armed with assault rifles rappelled from a blackhawk helicopter on the roof of an apartment complex in Chicago. ICE then proceeded to go door-to-door, busting down doors, dragging residents out of their bed, zip-tying their hands, and shoving them into the back of pitch black U-Haul. They detained every single person in the apartment complex, including American citizens, and most egregiously, children: | | == | Trump is using ICE as his personal gestapo--sending his thugs to drag children out of their beds in the middle of the night in some sick and twisted show of violence meant to scare his political enemies into submission. This demented display of fascist violence in our cities is deeply unpopular with the American people, with 60% of Americans saying they oppose National Guard deployments in a recent New York Times/Sienna poll. But Trump continues to escalate his war on America, expanding National Guard deployments to Chicago and Portland in just the past few days. He's acting as if he doesn't need to worry about backlash from voters, as if there isn't going to be another election. And that is exactly what will happen if Trump takes the Pennsylvania Supreme Court from Democrats on November 4th. | | == If Trump topples the democratic majority on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether--all but locking down PA for MAGA and the path to the White House for when Trump runs for a third term. And the most terrifying part is that if the election were held today, Trump would win. MAGA billionaires like Jeffrey Yass just launched a surprise attack in this obscure election while Democrats were asleep--suddenly spending tens of millions to oust the Democrats on the court. Defend Our Courts has been warning about the coming threat for months, and we are one of the largest Democratic organizations working to stop MAGA's coup attempt in PA. But with only 28 days left until election day, we are still being outspent 10-1 while PA is being completely blanketed with MAGA propaganda about the upcoming election. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == If this is just Trump acting as if there will be no competitive elections, imagine what it will be like when that is the actual reality. And that will be reality if the PA Supreme Court falls. We cannot let that happen. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

body:
Then he wished death upon young children. This is truly sick. | | | [](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=cda70753c12d41d49f0ae8b376d64772&_e=UmYCr8PyC3ccbyjXrrEahJreMyOk9noBeoCuJ_G2j_P7IXwlbYmCn8MoZEfKPEovQE28Vpl-_gtv_SXlMPvcTpGkqRUKdNhKbFGj3M7cm2dVcbjWejkoA49aNwgDgfPi6K8fzAR9DAnA00HNxYCCQdGZoqysV63PxZm8x3hA8CCFyYuUyUF5WFtIRR8g9w9lnz3MR39HgpCPXzTnQzbqF7lQzWkOGD2E1s12Y4J1wyJGBiycZH32payj7sNUC1tm1sNw1GQ4eBXuyacP6i6sOdLCZPPOicRwkaQSCDlO3lWO_KgqxxC4yqc2uv9SP6WYZDk3IvC2qvZ8ZlB-oT7GQb43Rg9UveM_q__T6gOFKmz6J3sVrHii-pWQT_ArbGbb6TrvPAcwcI4ZNPZS33wx_1v4xgcSIi7P0e5La9AJrfjwkPd_5c-Tezvnxty8OKv_4zqt6GjpOqNu-fg3QPBT_TYCyupH9Z0UL0XUMv5sW80vzONxYocgLVVS14Sa-P8lSnHGPgPM_4ZEuXL7soNggs9OkNL981PbMWiBEEe0mikls6et4XhGK3jt3HTtc7f9wiNIKfPQWYJhjRRDqTWk8sLweM6Lbp5OVtCEEgGfBRsDa5uyAx_GkowHeqTI2u9fkfCafG3PobG7X351kvgnBw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General.

But **nothing** prepared me for what **Jay Jones** said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages.

Jay Jones fantasized about **shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head,** choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. Then he called **Gilbert's young children "little fascists" who should be killed — in their weeping mother’s arms.**
---
[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=cda70753c12d41d49f0ae8b376d64772&_e=UmYCr8PyC3ccbyjXrrEahJreMyOk9noBeoCuJ_G2j_P7IXwlbYmCn8MoZEfKPEovQE28Vpl-_gtv_SXlMPvcTpGkqRUKdNhKbFGj3M7cm2dVcbjWejkoA49aNwgDgfPi6K8fzAR9DAnA00HNxYCCQdGZoqysV63PxZm8x3hA8CCFyYuUyUF5WFtIRR8g9w9lnz3MR39HgpCPXzTnQzbqF7lQzWkOGD2E1s12Y4J1wyJZk5XXh9u5Uka4KZczEg2VlryDrgLpJ1pPxJjoAe6brGX4Op5xF7uynDFd06a-ktifzOQTsa8H2yTOWMrthUM7DJZnTrxJiHmVYTay4tMdGEB1cE6SH3YqIgpuFLS0xvMt_a-WLMWH7ILFRlLfUBwv_igIWImTgW7n0-bUCKl9PpT9_7lLi0ncJ9ukYJ7YyxsRpr6wrYKsjQd4mKEaPOpduLbAh47vVMurW3urSD_WIrDX88DDRL6CumQ7ia4PldxCYZWvUQBhewr0OYhncKToXpoTZIl1B64kydpqKPW9IVDDOgKNkat_tB4ihsRz1Qa6UaTgsRRq_AIdl_BLCirqCaqPMkeBpsQOEXCqqFgyl2LBLRLXmh3FVr-fB2wpbWVyWCQjmSoBO6Qc6PVAQEKNdMDHI9TAU89K-cUZ2J-FVw%3D%3D)
---
This isn't politics. **This is the unhinged, sick fantasy of a dangerous person.**
---
[ **STOP JAY JONES RIGHT NOW** ](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=cda70753c12d41d49f0ae8b376d64772&_e=UmYCr8PyC3ccbyjXrrEahJreMyOk9noBeoCuJ_G2j_P7IXwlbYmCn8MoZEfKPEovQE28Vpl-_gtv_SXlMPvcTpGkqRUKdNhKbFGj3M7cm2dVcbjWejkoA49aNwgDgfPi6K8fzAR9DAnA00HNxYCCQdGZoqysV63PxZm8x3hA8CCFyYuUyUF5WFtIRR8g9w9lnz3MR39HgpCPXzTnQzbqF7lQzWkOGD2E1s12Y4J1wyJeL1B0NzRzefCOb3kyJCwwQWHvdfJfdDnyknneSBKnkZfW7d6919oOtcJOOGBcEtDZ-EMOl2oSDvT3Ap6z4RDUqC7J6ywwhRKnTlQitx1ZCCZkfDQ1Dh66TgWLOezH1fHp-MHNiQ8K4mrlxi9RCBCjMPxkRKE3hjXehsB3qKUuDcei3z9ZFQ4BVnMOFg41yFMozuOBdEPN05D8PTH8CmRoF0yIQD5N5IYVwDUP8znjmxj19S3n5WXSGp8FZohBOQA4w2x0FJ_iQ4qBns1uUKK8FpZfQ67ti5ESgBwC5-DQCaUcbSH4GbNHb31UYTcDRHStzafBE6rKWjRoZEPezeSHGTMvc_2434CD8ivqOZfKY3lToaJN8bTBFHDtEECwKXLnSTrJOTxAqtE1570YAG1D6RZR0GvpFQPxOlVla6MPNQ%3D%3D)

_Every parent in Virginia should be horrified._ Jones dreams about executing his political opponents and having their children killed.

No decent human being fantasizes about shooting their colleagues and killing their children. **Jones is clearly disqualified — not just from being Attorney General, but from holding any office across Virginia or our country.**

This deranged individual cannot be trusted with a badge, let alone the power to prosecute Virginians.

**🚨[Help me expose Jay Jones and defend our families from his twisted, murderous fantasies.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=cda70753c12d41d49f0ae8b376d64772&_e=UmYCr8PyC3ccbyjXrrEahJreMyOk9noBeoCuJ_G2j_P7IXwlbYmCn8MoZEfKPEovQE28Vpl-_gtv_SXlMPvcTpGkqRUKdNhKbFGj3M7cm2dVcbjWejkoA49aNwgDgfPi6K8fzAR9DAnA00HNxYCCQdGZoqysV63PxZm8x3hA8CCFyYuUyUF5WFtIRR8g9w9lnz3MR39HgpCPXzTnQzbqF7lQzWkOGD2E1s12Y4J1wyKRQRJZnw84pTMt2SQj4d68ei_X07YZDD7JmLRHz33QwFqncfdtKqe7xyAFRlPjJm1zUcvFb06zhWRtUjVtRfquZj7lUSQOLNxcLkeKNuE1Qxzocqij1kAY_yUi-bFwjINS2u2iFzWU3mebQGSj1l0hjVE2AvEPdie5i9MwtQsYGQYdeQBuTpIebiIFxOkc2LivJkgZfzECjDiAxIf2cYUmqMR6woVT_FD5N11G7t7aSenS86rfYRDxIRWDFXngxM7_Vb14TSMpb7ratIUajIF-MBwLSy2guwgFLI1HyvZ-9nEni5JVm0pFv0C6jAMrjnU-cDuQQonQrUzPfTcQGOVh920E5tm2HYX4dIaUeF_aFv8_LYt_Pu1GUiS4KP73N_ozNJbd1pU1I90GnCxlfB-ahCbzHqVKRk90KairyI6pMw%3D%3D)**

name: Tim Walz
subject: How you can stop Mike Lindell
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

Joining the Moms for America Podcast is one of the most prominent conservatives in the United States today: Dinesh D'Souza. He is
the man behind many of the most important documentaries of our time. He discusses his new film, The Dragon Prophecy, which
connects the current turmoil in the Middle East with ancient Biblical conflict. Are we witnessing the end times?

Cassiopeia Fletcher, Executive Director of Membership and Education for Moms for America also joins us to discuss her personal
perspective on her recent trip to Israel. Like, subscribe and share.

How to Combat Groomers by Identifying Their Strategies

Grooming is on the rise, and it’s no longer a secret. Mamas, you can safeguard your children, and you must. There’s a fine line
between staying safe – and creating paranoia in your child, so be careful not to teach your child that everyone they meet is
unsafe but help them develop safe habits and discernment.

We're sharing the six ways that groomers and predators tend to operate. When you know the common strategies, you can prepare your
kids and know what to look out for. Forewarned is forearmed!

clean_body: This week, Dinesh D'Souza joined the Moms for America Podcast to discuss his new film, The Dragon's Prophecy. You will not see the Middle East the same way! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] October 6, 2025 • Newsletter Dinesh D'Souza: The Dragon's Prophecy Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [-] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Joining the Moms for America Podcast is one of the most prominent conservatives in the United States today: Dinesh D'Souza. He is the man behind many of the most important documentaries of our time. He discusses his new film, The Dragon Prophecy, which connects the current turmoil in the Middle East with ancient Biblical conflict. Are we witnessing the end times? Cassiopeia Fletcher, Executive Director of Membership and Education for Moms for America also joins us to discuss her personal perspective on her recent trip to Israel. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [-] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] How to Combat Groomers by Identifying Their Strategies Grooming is on the rise, and it’s no longer a secret. Mamas, you can safeguard your children, and you must. There’s a fine line between staying safe – and creating paranoia in your child, so be careful not to teach your child that everyone they meet is unsafe but help them develop safe habits and discernment. We're sharing the six ways that groomers and predators tend to operate. When you know the common strategies, you can prepare your kids and know what to look out for. Forewarned is forearmed! Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. name: The Democratic Party
subject: A brief explanation:
body:
[1]Democrats[2]Join us.
Team,

It’s clearer every day: Trump wants people to be afraid of opposing him. He wants to intimidate us into silence. He and his allies are counting on Democrats completely giving up.

We can’t let that happen.

At the end of the month, we will be required to report how much we’ve raised. Those numbers will tell a story: A lot of contributions will show the strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and his agenda. They’ll show we aren’t done fighting.

So, we’re asking: Can you chip in to the DNC today to show Republicans that Trump’s threats won’t stop you — or thousands of other grassroots supporters just like you — from fighting back?

http://ak.democrats.org/go/19828?t=1001&akid=4772%2E22930333%2EW6K68q

Thank you,

The Democrats

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Judge Chris Taylor needs you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk tried to buy seats on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and nearly succeeded.
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5772?t=1&akid=5632%2E196590%2E4Pp_G6)
---
Folks,

Last April, right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk tried to buy seats on the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and nearly succeeded.

They spent so much that they broke the record for the most expensive judicial election in _our nation’s history._

Now, they’re eyeballing Judge Chris Taylor’s race.

Without notice, right-wing special interests could start funneling money into Wisconsin to buy a seat on our state’s highest court. We can’t let that happen.

That’s why I’m reaching out today. Chris has spent her whole career on the side of people, from her years as a public servant to her work on the bench.

**But this race won’t be won on values alone. It’s going to take all of us coming together to stand up to right-wing special interests and protect our progressive majority.**

[_**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign and The Long Run PAC? Every dollar helps.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5772?t=2&akid=5632%2E196590%2E4Pp_G6)

Tammy

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: ¡Feliz Mes de la Herencia Hispana!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, Across the country and especially right here in Arizona, Hispanic and Latino communities continue to shape our history, culture, and the future of our country. Diversity is a strength, Peter, and the contributions of Latino and Hispanic Americans are everywhere; whether through food, traditions, or trailblazing for the betterment of workers’ rights, the footprint of these communities will shape our future. I’m honoring Hispanic Heritage Month by spotlighting incredible small businesses across our district that are feeling the impacts of Trump’s tariffs — like Del Sol Furniture, a store that provides affordable and beautiful home furnishings for Arizonans in our district, and Amour Collective, a space where Latina entrepreneurs can learn and thrive. This month, and every month, I’m fighting to stand up for small businesses like these and the diverse communities that make our district vibrant. ¡Feliz Mes de la Herencia Hispana! — Yassamin Ansari

name: Scott P. Brown
subject: It’s not always easy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
Nothing in my life has ever been handed to me.
I aspired to be a good husband and a good dad — the American Dream.
| | Fellow Patriot, It often comes as a surprise to people I meet on the campaign trail that I didn’t grow up with aspirations of becoming an Ambassador or U.S. Senator growing up. **_I aspired to be a good husband, and a good dad. I aspired to have a happy family life and live the American Dream._** I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced 4 times, and my dad was married and divorced 3 times. My dad was not always there to help guide me and all my stepfathers told me that I would never amount to anything.
---
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3f9ea7c5f2b54034811233173bec8836&_e=FD8XoU-hukCncKXYYbK0mFeLq8C63g8XtoIvofHBZrpQv6nry6oDr_zpBlIUjpvn6gagbSh_OXLRUoVrruAD31aqRC9lI0E3XZJmxu8e-vAO8EimexrWs1nrNCiSCiCbn2nBFX5YTFHqH06J6Xjazyec7Jq4tSpKaInAHXO6vJXsU0aPWmdE6dMDGRlijMfs_y0-kPSrFm48m1M_5E5fQgVFd1VUftwc2KLzELg5zsQu3hjlQBIEHGF8Mv4-x2OR2IVyMCX7vRFigVhNGczsyHbPPSc3aDNiBECCVzonvnVnF-P9OOfY1N7KZwgS3PwLUxkB7u75F_Wi4_BFJ2X4oQZFuwQ7X0zPUgUmIO5I71xd5QRZRuQjHuneESNMc39chDj3H1d1lvqJ5inXe0XUox_KEiDlTQgWm6nfV_fIsQw5KvASkihcsEnpM6BDf2wI47zv4hD7fq6xlLuOhDD7E8Qqjikg2jvCSZCXozLaUd0CZhq1Y3LxklUjjHrvmnPdoIK7HSNVcz9pOGWdWALn17N55v1ROoq_14GyeZCnMpnH2tg8Rp7JjAR3Z1Sl-Enu_LJKSci3aMiUH26Z1YqgddgS-7nKD4J00GntrvfM0qzZKEfOkxgRt5cnFwykus0GgUyqHkekqNO4hEpLZxwc7YhBydKJ4FvbVDyzPP8QAHsT4HSn4piKHay-y0eY-8J0axkJczMhJwO1ZJ4ioMQ9lAa4-HrT4zSm_mPNvVwym1V_Q8uZdU0N-hKGDKdI2P2DhqMlogM_pQeE5B-nZ1nxwSIeHCfDI3W5rjoTwmEOTITEpNgb8micStiPPk4p5QMDzGUnTXKtDlkcx9aBWemjpZfKGdd5YdGjIoaQEXsq8W3swjzeNeIxnHKKMDtOQL8TacSKRn2TYbpO7TZBQPkt4WFjoiEZj6pqdmFi5Qx0w5jLvkPykOICrEfe-4RhbyP_)
---
It’s fair to say they were not support systems. But I really wouldn't change a thing. Those early struggles taught me grit, resilience, and the value of hard work. **_Nothing was ever handed to me._** I worked my way through college and law school, and at 19 I joined the Army National Guard, where I served proudly for nearly 40 years before retiring as a Colonel.
---

](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3f9ea7c5f2b54034811233173bec8836&_e=FD8XoU-hukCncKXYYbK0mFeLq8C63g8XtoIvofHBZrpQv6nry6oDr_zpBlIUjpvn6gagbSh_OXLRUoVrruAD31aqRC9lI0E3XZJmxu8e-vAO8EimexrWs1nrNCiSCiCbn2nBFX5YTFHqH06J6Xjazyec7Jq4tSpKaInAHXO6vJXsU0aPWmdE6dMDGRlijMfs_y0-kPSrFm48m1M_5E5fQgVFd1VUftwc2KLzELg5zsQu3hjlQBIEHGF8Mv4-x2OR2IVyMCX7vRFigVhNGczsyHbPPSc3aDNiBECCVzonvnVnF-P9OOfY1N7KZwgS3PwLUxkB7u75F_Wi4_BFJ2X4oQZFuwQ7X0zPUgUmIO5I71xd5QRZRuQjHuneESNMc39c9ZL5WH7l55vXl_p8ZqZ3WhGPgrHBXMP1ND9cw1cwGabEcYJCu99R5DkC-SMHkiBnSMz8kY1WNpnTD_2hFllfEOtfYU7Q0bUiQnXpVXMe1GMcGvO9lmLZZOdtRshHgZVJWq81Q4LX7-3Tu9QG0LR2atOH4CwxvEcs7FEmPitiD_ciAEbqDODtyWzavifywNZ6ZPfsGNpWaTBV3x-DCBFbTmnq6BRNBMIHU5BTm4XhGEjga0A5ateSeC1SZQAvvI1wMOlGdgDIjlsbWDkyQo676bwoYxo4qN8JIhpoXsc5vwXrbTjvx1V2_4PTxURHMg9WXlk6qgDTEeLJ9UTtJP2pwk5VgrlYwtjnz5b2lqHP0CSjc4i9THEK46ejM2iD4ygHxcNXY9D9UXiPSI4nJHDsO-Jo3QWPoPxLEJLVwEG4aykc_zEEBbJqy2KkGpT1YGfJp4gacatSg5lteBN4Oq5Z4Ex0ERiIZNxl_iAKEMmTnYxLXz6j6rRRQLpVUkkomM-hwUFgEitB2eSDXmEHAdn-qWwlhdFMMXSjSDUbCeYyyVbRH6vkFmYt2cRSPfxSqtLj)
---
In 2010, I took a leap of faith and ran for U.S. Senate. With grassroots supporters like you and a lot of miles on my old GMC truck, we shocked the political world with a historic upset. I was the guy that STOPPED the Democrats’ supermajority in the Senate. In Washington, I refused to play insider games—and that made me a target. Democrats poured millions into defeating me, and eventually, they did.

If we lose, the Democrats will seize the Senate and launch a relentless campaign to cripple his presidency – political lawfare, sham investigations, and a total blockade on his policies. _**We have no time to waste if we’re going to show the Radical Left they don’t stand a CHANCE of flipping the Senate majority.**_ I understand money can be tight these days, Fellow Patriot. That’s why I would not ask if it was not absolutely necessary to raise early funds NOW in order to win this seat.

clean_body: Nothing in my life has ever been handed to me. I aspired to be a good husband and a good dad — the American Dream. | | Fellow Patriot, It often comes as a surprise to people I meet on the campaign trail that I didn’t grow up with aspirations of becoming an Ambassador or U.S. Senator growing up. I aspired to be a good husband, and a good dad. I aspired to have a happy family life and live the American Dream. I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced 4 times, and my dad was married and divorced 3 times. My dad was not always there to help guide me and all my stepfathers told me that I would never amount to anything. It’s fair to say they were not support systems. But I really wouldn't change a thing. Those early struggles taught me grit, resilience, and the value of hard work. Nothing was ever handed to me. I worked my way through college and law school, and at 19 I joined the Army National Guard, where I served proudly for nearly 40 years before retiring as a Colonel. In 2010, I took a leap of faith and ran for U.S. Senate. With grassroots supporters like you and a lot of miles on my old GMC truck, we shocked the political world with a historic upset. I was the guy that STOPPED the Democrats’ supermajority in the Senate. In Washington, I refused to play insider games—and that made me a target. Democrats poured millions into defeating me, and eventually, they did. But I never stopped serving. I became a grandfather, poured myself into my New Hampshire community, and later represented America as U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand and Samoa. If we’ve learned anything over the last few years, it’s this: when Democrats are in control, things fall apart FAST. > >Inflation spikes, our borders are left WIDE OPEN to criminals and terrorists, our standing on the world stage weakens, and hardworking families are left behind. >> That’s why I’m stepping back into the fight — because we must keep the Senate in Republican hands, and we must keep electing strong, conservative leaders who will stand up for American values. I know the value of a dollar, and how hard you and I have worked every day of our lives to create prosperity for ourselves and our families , so I wouldn’t be asking you today if your URGENT donation did not make a BIG difference in flipping this Senate seat. The New Hampshire Senate race could tip control of the entire U.S. Senate and finally halt the “lawfare” targeting President Trump, his team, and YOUR freedoms. If we win in New Hampshire, we can stop the Left’s agenda in its tracks. If we lose... they’ll have free rein for years to come. Every patriot’s support is critical. If we win, we keep President Trump’s majority. If we lose, the Democrats will seize the Senate and launch a relentless campaign to cripple his presidency – political lawfare, sham investigations, and a total blockade on his policies. We have no time to waste if we’re going to show the Radical Left they don’t stand a CHANCE of flipping the Senate majority. I understand money can be tight these days, Fellow Patriot. That’s why I would not ask if it was not absolutely necessary to raise early funds NOW in order to win this seat. Your support means the world to me, and I’m so grateful. If you’re unable to give at this time, I understand. But if you can spare any amount, now is the time to do so. Thank you for your time, for reading my story, and for joining this fight for the future of America. Scott P. Brown Candidate for U.S. Senate New Hampshire Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc. Scott Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Army or the Department of Defense. PO Box 606 Rye, NH 03870

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This is not just a foreign policy issue. It’s a moral test.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
If we can prove that a grassroots, people-powered campaign in Michigan can withstand AIPAC’s millions, we’ll send an unmistakable message to the Democratic establishment.
Peter,
Two years ago this month, Netanyahu’s military launched a ground invasion of Gaza.
Since then, the world has watched tragedy unfold in real time.
At least 60,000 Palestinians have been killed, including over 18,500 children.
Nearly every home in Gaza has either been destroyed or damaged.
It is unconscionable. It is wrong.
**Yet it has continued because politicians in both parties have chosen to send billions of our tax dollars to fund this senseless war — instead of demanding an immediate ceasefire.**
And if you’re asking yourself, _“Why on Earth are politicians in Washington continuing to add fuel to the fire?”_ the answer is money.
**AIPAC is funneling millions of dollars into campaigns in exchange for loyalty.** Last cycle, they spent over $100 million boosting their preferred candidates across the country.
**Now, AIPAC is meddling with our race here in Michigan.** I’m one of the few major Senate candidates who isn’t afraid to call what’s happening in Gaza a genocide — and because of that, I’m one of AIPAC’s top targets to defeat.
This is not just a foreign policy issue. It’s a moral test. And whether Democrats pass or fail will determine if we can build a party capable of defeating Trump and the forces of authoritarianism.
So, how do we show moral clarity and change the course? By winning races like this one.
If we can prove that a grassroots, people-powered campaign in Michigan can withstand AIPAC’s millions, we’ll send an unmistakable message to the Democratic establishment: **The future of our party must be principled and unbought.**
I’ll be honest, this is a fight AIPAC doesn’t think we can win. They’re astroturfing a pro-Israel candidate in the primary to try and beat us. But if we keep this momentum going, we can overcome these forces.
**If you can, please make a contribution today to support our campaign:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20251007-1-ak**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20251007-1-ak?amount=5&refcode=em20251007-1061&refcode2=1066_251025_86e1yl&akid=1066%2E251025%2E86e1yl)
In solidarity,
Abdul

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=2&akid=1066%2E251025%2E86e1yl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1066%2E251025%2E86e1yl)

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

body:
|

**➤➤ BREAKING: Lawsuit reveals massive Trump voter surveillance system** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116790331/574440126/-1865942533?refcode=em-10.7.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmQzMDc3ZC05MmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y0QllZOXbUPvM6qVtc2MPMUPvf0z-2n4wdvkZOe9P0M=)**
* * *
Friend, Civil rights groups just filed a **federal class-action lawsuit** exposing a secret, sprawling data operation within the Trump administration: a system that consolidates **Social Security numbers, medical records, biometric data, even children's case files** across multiple federal agencies. **All without public notice. All without legal authority.** And now? That data is being handed to election officials across the country to **purge voter rolls and launch criminal investigations** under the false flag of “election integrity.” Lawsuits now allege the administration secretly pooled data from the IRS, HHS, SSA, DHS, DOJ, and Department of Labor, **without public consent and in violation of federal law.** **Democratic Secretaries of State are our first and last line of defense against this dangerous overreach.** They’re the ones saying NO – to illegal data demands, to voter intimidation, to unconstitutional power grabs. But they cannot fight alone. **[Will you rush a donation of $3 or whatever you can to the DASS Legal Fund to help stop this voter surveillance scheme and protect election privacy nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116790333/574440127/292117375?refcode=em-10.7.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmQzMDc3ZC05MmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y0QllZOXbUPvM6qVtc2MPMUPvf0z-2n4wdvkZOe9P0M=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116790337/574440128/292117375?refcode=em-10.7.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmQzMDc3ZC05MmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y0QllZOXbUPvM6qVtc2MPMUPvf0z-2n4wdvkZOe9P0M=)**

| Peter,
With MAGA controlling the House, Senate, Presidency, and SCOTUS, our state and local Courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full blown implementation of Trump's violent authoritarian agenda.
Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing critical voter data, lost her home in a fire that is being investigated as arson following weeks of death threats she received her ruling.
Our justice system and judges are facing nothing short of a full on assault. If you side against MAGA--there are consequences.
---

| | | | Nowhere is this more apparent than in the upcoming November Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election where MAGA is making history with their unprecedented full court press to seize this court.
The stakes couldn't be higher. If the GOP's lightning blitz is successful they can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections, uphold an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander out all blue seats on PA's congressional map.
Early polling is showing that the situation on the ground for Democrats is dire. We are being out spent 10-1 by MAGA and if the election were held today we would lose.
There's still time for Democrats from across the country to turn the tide, we've done it before and we can do it again.
Look at what we did in the 2021 Georgia Senate Runoffs, in the timespan of a month, millions of Democrats from across the country poured in small dollar donations to propel Senators Ossoff and Warnock to stunning victories against all odds.

clean_body: Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing voter data, lost their home in a fire that is being investigated as arson following weeks of death | | | | | == | Peter, With MAGA controlling the House, Senate, Presidency, and SCOTUS, our state and local Courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full blown implementation of Trump's violent authoritarian agenda. Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing critical voter data, lost her home in a fire that is being investigated as arson following weeks of death threats she received her ruling. Our justice system and judges are facing nothing short of a full on assault. If you side against MAGA--there are consequences. | | == | | | | Nowhere is this more apparent than in the upcoming November Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election where MAGA is making history with their unprecedented full court press to seize this court. The stakes couldn't be higher. If the GOP's lightning blitz is successful they can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections, uphold an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander out all blue seats on PA's congressional map. Early polling is showing that the situation on the ground for Democrats is dire. We are being out spent 10-1 by MAGA and if the election were held today we would lose. There's still time for Democrats from across the country to turn the tide, we've done it before and we can do it again. Look at what we did in the 2021 Georgia Senate Runoffs, in the timespan of a month, millions of Democrats from across the country poured in small dollar donations to propel Senators Ossoff and Warnock to stunning victories against all odds. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you, we appreciate you more than you know. Friend, The details are disturbing, but you deserve to know the full truth about who Democrats want as Virginia's top law enforcement officer.

Jay Jones didn't just fantasize about violence in those murderous messages. He described **exactly** how he'd execute our former House Speaker: _**"Gilbert gets two bullets to the head."**_

When given a choice between shooting Todd Gilbert or two of history's worst dictators — Adolf Hitler and Pol Pot — Jones said he'd **"shoot Gilbert every time"** and give him **"both bullets."** He then said he would **“piss on his grave.”**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/F6_ePw-ymALnOZuI1TPbs01JhQfoGcn7XPIQNH-gc3m8NM2ZJ98iusejegiWuDlwP4eEpCWSYXdqgzSnM0PWDyQiSpYF2TNsEuMtkGE5nN45VRAtOnost2odkvTREC7TYGLDL_VTlA0ioqQ_PyX--djENOBpo6l6op1ZB9uzWpRHIUT_bOdgYhC2Xvh2Q1IhCI522bJAQy1S3HrxrpGzKtS88UR0qE9acwlFlWZHVW7kgQ1UEuzbsUU5FXHXhS3--kcH99ZvDHVo1yO1dt6IM3s3FW_3DuNhFX2eIKZP-zNpngv2MqEGXfAj2akza-O1reVFr_Kbdy7w1WPnI811YtfCV1yCi3eLI9ivi6zmq51jGEQSYmLJDdLNXrkqUU8pe51qqCU59Mt5kS12yfotg6GMtLWHFztbtvaHeolBNHJKd4YUtstwEnkmaoqylGxuouBeF4PRnW6JqgVBvRUqp4XfHlZGF9zgBJjlfJeRYmwO1E-xGYG7Y-Esq_nFLmys3xrhogLGNXwCUO8kkXbvePAJECWwWA4DbLyftYT__E42kw9I-JB-Qw20TCFcAyOqiht9gqWxfaI35s7GgSuwNFJPY2kZDVsjTyFXTE3X61LLoKSGLy2q_sPzyHwc/d1CGp0-Gl5mMEa61O7CihiOjWGH2rsqb/13)
---
**Then he went after Gilbert's family.** Jones called Todd Gilbert's wife and **young children** "little fascists" who are "breeding" evil and _**should be eliminated.**_

This isn't normal political anger, friend. **These are the fantasies of someone who is clearly dangerous.**

Any rational person who harbors these kinds of violent delusions about colleagues and their children should not seek public office.

**Jay Jones is too dangerous and disqualified to hold any office in Virginia, let alone be our Commonwealth's top law enforcement officer.**

**Would you trust this man with a badge and the power to prosecute your family?**

I know I don’t. [_**Chip in anything you can to protect Virginia.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/5b7HDFDuQbyKeNtIJr-J8SU7PNA43TNdBh-YYffN3p30IbJEnPCPecAwK_YzbrOo8BazKnnQV_BvAWc7mLXJkDLuP8v0zpkSmbhDUSuYeLO5uxb9s0MWQ_yJl8x32g1JdPPcJGLznJpeLUjBKHaopjIRqkdtb8xf6O5cofv5KGEKb8QU_cbFmmoGoW8yE-KANacgJ-J_tXj5ka2F6MALfgs5yLKx7GCHe9Qq1-NH3vpvJmEfI3LMCGASGVcaecKrx02fpA3xCrLFMoG5y5Lyw3_l2Gi6J8NiwiPRALuVikRnlx6QDXWiffrt9OO3v26F4NBhvbR184txS05ZTbShsfmBk2zFbvhy_En9rR5nYBKzzYYU80IOB6Qr9nLrqwLNlBR-eIwPlD22P4pYbcfc35EBWs6T69GmrhyVBwp4qTyUmgu9yherkt5vwyEn3xV0GdHBHB6LaNiNsw95-9o0RgdmKM8V7KYKhEmZEDrj0hnIKzsshdmv5r5wZSHJ0L2uczZQb_oxqmaRbqi263N1rnLMtAS8ajll8kH92wr3YC6Vje6V4-bGq4oPh-EoJvh7VLvbHrCjh2RAgEX-8QwMutsb0FH3EUkCefP3bVKCdBnumJr_6MJX71tMOqle/T8jC8PEVv9D4CQAHszTSHrM6o_eAvTxR/13)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Supreme Court Countdown: 24 HOURS
body:
T-Minus 24 hours. That’s when your Judicial Watch presents oral arguments before the Supreme Court of the United States in our monumental Election Integrity case.

| Dear Fellow American,

**_T-Minus 24 hours._** That's when your Judicial Watch presents oral arguments before the Supreme Court of the United States in our monumental Election Integrity case.
In case you weren't able to read my previous message detailing what's at stake, I've re-sent it below for you to review.
_What will the results of our Supreme Court case influence?_

* **The integrity of Election Day in America**
* **Whether ballots received AFTER Election Day should be counted**
* **Whether or not candidates are allowed to challenge unjust election laws**

If that makes you think this could turn out to be one of the most impactful cases Judicial Watch has ever litigated...you'd be right.
__And this enormous case kicks off in just 24 hours.__
With the stakes of this Supreme Court case being so high** _, there could not be a more impactful hour to join the legions of other patriotic Americans in the ranks of Judicial Watch 's financial supporters_**.
Your donation could not only help us in THIS fight to re-establish one Election Day in America...
It would sustain our work litigating a full caseload of other high-stakes election integrity cases, and fighting to uphold the rule of law in America for decades to come.
_[So please, consider making your first generous financial contribution to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_.
Thank you for considering.
Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

* * *

**From:** Tom Fitton
**Date:** Thur, Oct 2, 2025 at 9:14 AM
**Subject:** Supreme Court Countdown: 6 Days
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ | |
---
|
--- ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11) |
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**In just 6 days, your Judicial Watch heads to the Supreme Court of the United States to present oral arguments in _(Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568))._**
**It’s an historic honor for Judicial Watch and a historic opportunity to fight for honest elections at the highest court in the land.**
First, thank you for being a part of Judicial Watch. It’s through the passion Americans like you show for our work as the nation’s public interest conservative law firm that my team does that work so diligently and tirelessly. Getting a case to the Supreme Court is a testament to our team’s hard work, but it’s also a moment YOU (and all our financial supporters) should take great pride in.
The stakes in this case are huge. **__The integrity of Election Day in America, whether ballots received AFTER Election Day should be counted, and whether or not candidates have the ability to challenge unjust election laws__** will all be influenced by the Supreme Court’s ruling.
| [Fuel Our Supreme Court Fight & Historic Election Integrity Caseload ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)
---

Here’s the background of the case: Under current law, the state of Illinois counts ballots received up to **_14 days_** after Election Day.

Imagine the chaos, confusion, and mistrust invited by an election changing hands due to ballots received AFTER Election Day (unfortunately, we don’t need to imagine it because it occurred in two California House races last year).

Unfortunately, the 7th Circuit Court of Appeals issued a misguided ruling that Rep. Bost and our other Illinois plaintiffs lacked standing to bring this case. We appealed the decision.

We’re very grateful to the United States Supreme Court for taking up our appeal and agreeing to hear the case.

**To be clear: The stakes are potentially much greater than the future of election laws in Illinois.**

A win before the Supreme Court has the potential to curb the counting of ballots received after Election Day nationwide and ensure that future candidates have the ability to challenge laws that impact their races.

These would be critical steps towards restoring the integrity of our elections by making them harder to steal.

We have momentum on our side. In May, the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that Mississippi’s state law allowing ballots received up to 5 days after Election Day violated federal law. But there is a great deal more work to do in the fight for honest elections... including _[our oral arguments before the Supreme Court just 6 days from now!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_

I’m sure I don’t need to tell you that battling state governments over election integrity litigation is a long and costly process, but it’s a fight Judicial Watch is honored to lead thanks to our loyal supporters.

As the clock counts down, will you consider _[making a special first-time financial contribution to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_ in recognition of the massive opportunity before us at the Supreme Court?

[Your Generous Support Makes Our Election Integrity Victories Possible ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)
---

Thank you for considering, and for all you do in our shared fight for honest elections.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

P.S. **Our case before the Supreme Court could be a critical step towards halting the reckless counting of ballots received after Election Day and ensuring the integrity of our elections.**_[With just 6 days to go before our Supreme Court appearance, please click here to help us fund this fight along with the rest of our historic election integrity caseload and all our work dedicated to upholding the rule of law](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77039&L=36205&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2NvdW50ZG93bi1jbG9jay1uZGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=1d374b3eecfa97d8ca38e333c4d7513eb9d8bce0160cf82b29f613f40df8bb11)_. Thank you.

|
---
|
---
Judicial Watch, Inc.
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
©2025, All Rights Reserved
Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
| |

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand Trump stop hiding the latest jobs report (and the evidence of his failure)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump hide the jobs report -- and the evidence of his failure](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd9a38cd-e859-49f8-9a4f-5a3ef2e83263/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f48ed91-efde-4c91-8b99-778e12bdcd7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f04d0d6-05f3-4fb1-ac7d-fa8ac315d6c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then share with friends to help build support!)_ **Trump is blocking the release of the latest[monthly jobs report](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae66fe0a-0c09-4bf5-a1c7-26cb36e72f36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) — one of the most important measures of how the U.S. economy is doing.** The data is already collected. All the Bureau of Labor Statistics needs to do is upload it to a website. But Trump said no. He’s blaming the government shutdown. But plans were already in place to release essential economic data, even during a shutdown. And this information — relied on by the Fed, businesses, and everyday Americans — is absolutely essential. Let’s call this what it is: a cover-up. Trump inherited a booming economy and turned it into chaos. Now he’s trying to hide the evidence. Don't let him. [**Tell Trump: "Release the jobs data! Stop hiding your failure!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc82c4be7-e7a9-4214-9341-a6601bc96ca3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e1d5d71-ea40-40d0-977a-55df2d36f848/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0834c90f-5fc4-4963-b24c-04d5448faa08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a8e7052-ab99-4e01-83a3-c07961fe4609/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Guy Ciarrocchi | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |

| **Guy Ciarrocchi: Questions that Democrats need to answer**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e6912074ae&e=b7b3eddce2)

| ''More and more Democrats are saying wackier things — and more dangerous things.

More and more are supporting — even screaming or suing for — wackier policies.

It’s happening more and more frequently. Look at Virginia just this weekend..."

| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9e5315db71&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")

## About Guy Ciarrocchi:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e71ee964b1&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
As a common-sense conservative thought-leader, **Guy Ciarrochi’s** writings provoke thought on important topics such as education, politics, culture, and anti-Semitism. Guy draws on decades of experience from South Philly to the Philadelphia suburbs to Pittsburgh, from Harrisburg to Washington, DC, having served at the highest levels of government, as a candidate and strategist, as well as Chamber CEO. Guy has been listening, observing and guiding his readers for years.
---
|
---
| | We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d6b83f3723&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

name: Travis Grantham
subject: Are you ready to join Team Grantham?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]()
body:
We are getting organized and need your feedback!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1d220927fc70/welcome-to-team-grantham-10141201?e=0b767f7f9d)
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=0ea6240a8e&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | | | | | Friend,
I’m reaching out because our campaign is gaining traction, raising money, and gathering endorsements. Still, we know we’re going to win this race on the ground, which is why we’re signing up volunteers across the district and building the best and most organized campaign for AZ-05!
We have a lot of areas where volunteers are making a difference! Is there one where you would be willing to help? Maybe you’re just putting a bumper sticker on your car, or you want to help us distribute yard signs to homes in your neighborhood? Maybe you want to join one of our coalitions (veterans, sportsmen, women, etc, for Grantham) or even take on a leadership role? Whatever level of involvement you’re interested in, we are sure to have a fit for you!
---
| [JOIN TEAM GRANTHAM](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=71c925bdce&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| |
One of the biggest reasons our campaign is doing so well is because of passionate, conservative Arizonans like you, who have donated and helped by signing our petition to get on the ballot. Ultimately, we need the best grassroots campaign we can build to ensure we win and get to take our America First values to Washington! That is where you come in!
---
| [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=413a58cf7e&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| |
We need your help and would love for you to assist us by knocking on doors, making phone calls, or amplifying our message on social media. To win this election, it will take all of us working together! Please sign up to help!
---
| [GET INVOLVED AND JOIN THE TEAM!](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=75be6981f9&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| | God Bless,
Travis GranthamRepublican Candidate for Congress[**GranthamForCongress.com**](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=c90ce1cc00&e=0b767f7f9d)

clean_body: We are getting organized and need your feedback! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I’m reaching out because our campaign is gaining traction, raising money, and gathering endorsements. Still, we know we’re going to win this race on the ground, which is why we’re signing up volunteers across the district and building the best and most organized campaign for AZ-05! We have a lot of areas where volunteers are making a difference! Is there one where you would be willing to help? Maybe you’re just putting a bumper sticker on your car, or you want to help us distribute yard signs to homes in your neighborhood? Maybe you want to join one of our coalitions (veterans, sportsmen, women, etc, for Grantham) or even take on a leadership role? Whatever level of involvement you’re interested in, we are sure to have a fit for you! | | | One of the biggest reasons our campaign is doing so well is because of passionate, conservative Arizonans like you, who have donated and helped by signing our petition to get on the ballot. Ultimately, we need the best grassroots campaign we can build to ensure we win and get to take our America First values to Washington! That is where you come in! | | | We need your help and would love for you to assist us by knocking on doors, making phone calls, or amplifying our message on social media. To win this election, it will take all of us working together! Please sign up to help! | | | God Bless, Travis GranthamRepublican Candidate for Congress | | | | | | | | | | | [PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]() | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Grantham For Congress. All rights reserved.

Patriot,

The Leftist Elite have hated Pete Hegseth since the beginning. They hate everything he stands for: a strong military, closed borders and sovereignty, and Christian, family values.

Friend, I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General.

But **nothing** prepared me for what **Jay Jones** said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages.

subject: Is it time for indictments?

body:
Explosive docs show Obama officials pushed false Russia narrative. Is it time for indictments?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
Barack Obama was named in a criminal referral tied to the origins of the Trump–Russia collusion hoax.
[According to declassified documents released by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard](https://trk.emails.troydowning._NdA), Obama and top members of his administration may have manufactured intelligence to create the narrative that Donald Trump colluded with Russia, despite knowing no such evidence existed.
**Now, the Department of Justice has launched a "strike force" to investigate. **
With Attorney General Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel leading the charge, every shred of evidence is being examined, and no name is off-limits.
_Obama. Brennan. Clapper. Comey. Rice. Clinton. McCabe._
The list goes on.
So we’re asking you, Peter, a top conservative supporter: [Should Barack Obama be investigated, indicted, and arrested?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._hGlSmOwE-REIvbA)[CAST YOUR VOTE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)This may be the biggest political scandal in American history, and justice cannot be selective.
If the evidence points to crimes, no one – **_not even a former President_** — is above the law.
Time is short, and the DOJ strike force is moving fast. Please submit your critical input before 11:59 p.m.
Thank you,
**GOP Alerts (via Team Downing)**| |

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Republicans are holding our health care hostage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We can't let them take away our health care without a fight.
| | |
---
Friend,
My dad often said: If you don’t have your health, you don’t have _anything. _
**It’s clear Donald Trump and Republicans are doing **_everything_**they can to take away health care from hardworking families to pay for their agenda of more tax cuts for the richest among us. ****And for millions of middle-class Americans who rely on the Affordable Care Act, your health care premiums are about to double.**
Make no mistake: Trump and Republicans shut down the government because they _refuse_ to talk with Democrats about stopping this massive spike in health care costs for hardworking families.
They’re holding the government and American people hostage to score political points. But we will not be bullied into sacrificing the health care of American families. Not now, not ever.
Everyone should have access to affordable health care. It is not a bargaining chip or a political weapon. It is a _lifeline_.
That’s why I’m urging my Republican colleagues in the Senate to do their jobs, fund the government, and ensure Americans maintain access to their health care. **But right now,**** I need to know you’re with me, ****friend.**
**That’s why my team has launched an urgent flash poll, and you were one of 500 supporters specifically selected to respond. But right now, it looks like you haven't shared where you stand.[Please, tell me now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116795673/574456182/-1051744375?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5618-su-nd&refcode=jtk5618-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE3NDI3OS05OWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQIwfSf1vU_rB_7UlNd3KNByKbfmM5GN-209pH90wiU=&emci=e28fe28f-93a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=81174279-99a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=3800590)**

clean_body: We can't let them take away our health care without a fight. | | | Friend, My dad often said: If you don’t have your health, you don’t have anything. It’s clear Donald Trump and Republicans are doing everythingthey can to take away health care from hardworking families to pay for their agenda of more tax cuts for the richest among us. And for millions of middle-class Americans who rely on the Affordable Care Act, your health care premiums are about to double. Make no mistake: Trump and Republicans shut down the government because they refuse to talk with Democrats about stopping this massive spike in health care costs for hardworking families. They’re holding the government and American people hostage to score political points. But we will not be bullied into sacrificing the health care of American families. Not now, not ever. Everyone should have access to affordable health care. It is not a bargaining chip or a political weapon. It is a lifeline. That’s why I’m urging my Republican colleagues in the Senate to do their jobs, fund the government, and ensure Americans maintain access to their health care. But right now, I need to know you’re with me, friend. That’s why my team has launched an urgent flash poll, and you were one of 500 supporters specifically selected to respond. But right now, it looks like you haven't shared where you stand. Do you think Washington Republicans should work with Democrats to prevent a spike in health care costs and reopen the government? | | | | Thank you. – Jacky Rosen | | = A note from Sen. name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s threat to deploy our troops against Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek, I was on MSNBC yesterday to talk about something that should alarm every American: Donald Trump’s threat to deploy our troops against Americans at home. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116795729/574456352/981825435?refcode=email_100725_msnbc&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjBkN2RhNC05OWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQ5oHSXtOw2CcRZgvlIEs9qlSg36D1lIUg3kdeOhsIo=) Trump has repeatedly shown a willingness to deploy troops against American citizens. He’s sent the National Guard into Los Angeles, DC, and Chicago, and tried to deploy troops in Portland this weekend. Worse still, he has threatened to deploy troops into “war” against our fellow Americans. Derek, I’m a veteran. I’ve worn our nation’s uniform and I know exactly what it means to see our country send troops into harm’s way. So let me make this incredibly clear: **This is dangerous and goes against our American traditions. We don’t need a president who has almost unlimited power. It’s dangerous for an American president to even talk about deploying American troops and call it a “war” against our own citizens on our own streets.** I also serve on the Armed Services Committee, where we have oversight over the Pentagon. I take those responsibilities and my oath seriously. It’s our job in Congress to serve as a check on the president—and that means updating the Insurrection Act, putting real guardrails in place, and making sure Trump (and any president) can never use our military as a political weapon. But my Republican colleagues in Washington? They’re doing nothing about this abuse of power. [**We can’t let Trump’s power grab go unchecked. This isn’t a partisan issue—it’s about protecting the rule of law, our Constitution, and the rights of every citizen. But in order to put up guardrails and stop Trump, we need to take back the House—and that starts with defending this battleground seat. So if you’re with me in the fight to defend our democracy, pitch in now to help me protect this battleground seat and flip the House blue →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116795730/574456353/981825435?refcode=email_100725_msnbc&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjBkN2RhNC05OWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQ5oHSXtOw2CcRZgvlIEs9qlSg36D1lIUg3kdeOhsIo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116795731/574456354/981825435?refcode=email_100725_msnbc&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjBkN2RhNC05OWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQ5oHSXtOw2CcRZgvlIEs9qlSg36D1lIUg3kdeOhsIo=)

## The left's latest violent behavior...
I want to talk today about something that hasn't gotten a ton of national coverage.
But here in Virginia, it's been causing waves.
Remember the "both sides" argument?
In the wake of Charlie Kirk's assassination, the left has insisted that political violence was an issue on both side of the aisle.
That argument fell flat when they made it, but after this week it's clearer than ever that that angle just isn't true.
Over the weekend, disgusting texts from Democrat Attorney General candidate Jay Jones came out.
In the texts, he fantasizes about shooting then VA Speaker of the House , and worse.
But that's not the only news from the left.
Saturday morning in Chicago, federal agents were rammed and trapped by anti-ICE attackers--and according to local officers, Chicago Police Department ordered its officers not to respond.
These are just the latest example of a political party that thinks violence is justified.
Let's break it down. ...

body:
Trump’s White House ballroom renovation has been declared “essential.” | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOuzWhMRYhpZRS1QqcdCNvGs3zJ-0Q2TUQW4yai_CmTeocc_g56_odMmESd2iIHKvaQEm0bPzK_luox9HOW38DzZSBhjg6LhrQLkQ61DBX03HJZd0xq425cpsqpTfFopf56d43zSJAH1v8uddZfphhJ9t5xO7vY6dKjtWwxY2mBo6MRnadUUZws5DwGCJVb52AjR2jb74nWL7fsgDtgZCjUfsHgb9pvDDFopG-9GQrZaTb1t0514V-cgiZe--O9pS4SpkSU3vWPOnX1_0yHrG0bIUFL5Vv5oLRDAuKcZ6Tgdq_HRwxeskKJSSWM8k0DOCT_ImgiKU72mG5KD1LuFK8HbTqRHXr8HX_bcSm2J_-Xhk/4kj/i21_kPn6QC6l6C1ZhfWQrg/h0/h001._fKrg2fNNE7Bs2arRonZM0C4xyvXI-g3_UlI6LAlrsc)Friend — The government is shut down. Workers are furloughed. Families are wondering how they’ll pay rent or put food on the table. And yet...Trump’s White House ballroom renovation has been declared “essential.” That’s right: **_while millions of Americans are being forced to go without a paycheck, Trump’s lavish ballroom construction continues — uninterrupted._** This is what Trump’s MAGA priorities look like:
* A gold-plated ballroom for the rich and powerful.
* Starvation and uncertainty for working people.
* Corruption and cruelty dressed up as “leadership.”
* Billionaire technocrats running the country while they let you eat cake.

**_We can’t let this stand._** If they can find endless money for Trump’s ballroom, then we can find the resources to fight back against their greed and abuse of power. It’s our tax dollars, after all. **[Cedar Key Progress is organizing to hold them accountable — but we need your help to do it. Can you chip in today to help us send a powerful message in the midterms?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOuzWhMRYhpZRS1QqcdCNvGne3MdKV-u9zJMdBY8WBZ5Nl4Y5nHp3lywf3Nq0krSg8G-v9Y-kMOCAwbhh5nm3Q8niommyMevEdWZ1s4N4Dgn69gqu3IynFpUEVHNfkhuU7kq3rgkJHzppPaKTZHtTn5zJRidaFgvoBD4TyOW7ktC-x9i6GUMlxDpQK9k1p6CPfagN5ohvlSTMU9ubu5bh2Ek4gUW1wsd7MQZJ1064EwwHpkOnTrfw2CVRXBMTF-4eLqg28mnYHI7aandv409VCIRsvn_fWrkN3tJF1cisGkaUPOBpoYo_cfcNCmR9xkParHZb1eZ6ezp7kBcFA46ifWssdXTCW9VC-weShvD_fLV0/4kj/i21_kPn6QC6l6C1ZhfWQrg/h1/h001.WiD-GRplsj2wzr0gbSR7FIerWzOXJxXMYmRvkj6wRsA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10
