clean_body: Trump’s White House ballroom renovation has been declared “essential.” | | | — The government is shut down. Workers are furloughed. Families are wondering how they’ll pay rent or put food on the table. And yet...Trump’s White House ballroom renovation has been declared “essential.” That’s right: while millions of Americans are being forced to go without a paycheck, Trump’s lavish ballroom construction continues — uninterrupted. This is what Trump’s MAGA priorities look like: A gold-plated ballroom for the rich and powerful. Starvation and uncertainty for working people. Corruption and cruelty dressed up as “leadership.” Billionaire technocrats running the country while they let you eat cake. We can’t let this stand. If they can find endless money for Trump’s ballroom, then we can find the resources to fight back against their greed and abuse of power. It’s our tax dollars, after all. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Every dollar you give helps us expose their hypocrisy, mobilize voters, and push back against an agenda that treats working people as disposable while pampering the powerful. name: Defend our Courts
subject: Was Dem judge that stood up to Trump DOJ targeted w/ Arson?
body:
Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing voter data, lost their home in a fire.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UpHoiAf7iRyyhgYVO3IaeE5aBNYL0_m_CpfFWQOUIzPF7HFkNZEWUhTnDwCHjAmDSW4O_Jen58dmSbexrzNZXa_N4a50inUARLVKAqc7LfFUN883ntrm4RwulNkja_p5rB-vf5SXtTiGX7zKSFxGpOSTwcQ0aQYWV0sETlggxohBav4qiyNtf9y2m7JtxmFnE9OmPGFPnT8xp05VjldNaTLwkt1bpIbKLEZR7SJeZIc=&c=rzOUOKzxKSOC18W0a3gRj_8JqVnfu_IuT6akfiMIr8LQdiuwbgWwxg==&ch=nKEWOj4Oj76xfZ0NRCvTSINE_Bw7ogoTrXZpxYxbCSN-w4_R2zxj3A==)

| Friend,
With MAGA controlling the House, Senate, Presidency, and SCOTUS, our state and local Courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full blown implementation of Trump's violent authoritarian agenda.
Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing critical voter data, lost her home in a fire that is being investigated as arson following weeks of death threats she received her ruling.
Our justice system and judges are facing nothing short of a full on assault. If you side against MAGA--there are consequences.
---

| Nowhere is this more apparent than in the upcoming November Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election where MAGA is making history with their unprecedented full court press to seize this court.
The stakes couldn't be higher. If the GOP's lightning blitz is successful they can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections, uphold an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander out all blue seats on PA's congressional map.
Early polling is showing that the situation on the ground for Democrats is dire. We are being out spent 10-1 by MAGA and if the election were held today we would lose.
There's still time for Democrats from across the country to turn the tide, we've done it before and we can do it again.
Look at what we did in the 2021 Georgia Senate Runoffs, in the timespan of a month, millions of Democrats from across the country poured in small dollar donations to propel Senators Ossoff and Warnock to stunning victories against all odds.
[If Democrats can rally around Pennsylvania like we did Georgia, we can still save this court. If you've been waiting to donate now is the time. Can you make a donation to defend our courts? clean_body: Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing voter data, lost their home in a fire. | | | | | == | Friend, With MAGA controlling the House, Senate, Presidency, and SCOTUS, our state and local Courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full blown implementation of Trump's violent authoritarian agenda. Yesterday, a liberal South Carolina Circuit Court judge who prevented the Trump DOJ from accessing critical voter data, lost her home in a fire that is being investigated as arson following weeks of death threats she received her ruling. Our justice system and judges are facing nothing short of a full on assault. If you side against MAGA--there are consequences. | | == | Nowhere is this more apparent than in the upcoming November Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election where MAGA is making history with their unprecedented full court press to seize this court. The stakes couldn't be higher. If the GOP's lightning blitz is successful they can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections, uphold an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander out all blue seats on PA's congressional map. Early polling is showing that the situation on the ground for Democrats is dire. We are being out spent 10-1 by MAGA and if the election were held today we would lose. There's still time for Democrats from across the country to turn the tide, we've done it before and we can do it again. Look at what we did in the 2021 Georgia Senate Runoffs, in the timespan of a month, millions of Democrats from across the country poured in small dollar donations to propel Senators Ossoff and Warnock to stunning victories against all odds. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == Thank you, we appreciate you more than you know. body:
| Not asking for money — just your feedback!

| | | | | The integrity of our elections is on the brink of collapse.

Millions of illegal votes could flood our system, diluting your voice and undermining our democracy. The Radical Left is pushing to dismantle safeguards, block Voter ID laws, and rewrite rules to serve their agenda.

They don't care about fair elections--they care about power. Their reckless policies threaten to let non-citizens vote, eroding the foundation of our republic.

We're fighting back to secure our elections with ironclad Voter ID laws, but we need you in this battle. Your immediate action will send a thunderous message: Americans demand elections that are fair, legal, and secure.

**Will you stand up and say YES to Voter ID laws? **

[Click here to make your voice heard](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zelcu83btt4qn6sqr6ogpcmsb3eipmvn4pro9th0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9o36cjh2bs "Click here to make your voice heard")

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Standing with Israel. Standing Against Evil.
body:
Two years after Hamas’ brutal assault, we honor the innocent lives lost and stand firm with our ally, Israel.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000199bf9130bf-3cd5d4ac-43dd-44a8-98af-7d0df6583ff3-000000/t0vtgrviFl7RFb3xzTZa7X85HfxTkXoml7SHABdPFb8=426)Patriot–Today, October 7th, marks a tragic two-year anniversary of one of the most evil days in human history. Two years ago, the world learned the details about the barbaric attack carried out by Hamas terrorists, including brutalized babies, raped women, more than 1,200 individuals murdered, and 251 people taken hostage.I recount these shocking details because that day was a reminder that our ally, Israel, is under constant threat due to its hostile neighbors in the region. The months since that attack have also served as a reminder that antisemitism is a growing force, not only on college campuses, but even more broadly across American communities.As we think today about the lives that were lost on October 7, 2023, I encourage you to think about the special relationship that the United States has had with Israel.At Tea Party Patriots Action, we have taken a firm stand for Israel, and we applaud President Trump's steadfast commitment to achieving peace in the region. We further stand opposed to antisemitism, and we are grateful for President Trump and his administration for the ongoing efforts to root out the violent targeting of Jewish students on campuses across the country.Thank you for being part of our mission, and for standing with us in this moment. We look forward to continuing to Make America Great Again with President Trump, as he pursues peace in the Middle East and stands for religious liberty in the United States.In liberty,Jenny Beth _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000199bf9130bf-3cd5d4ac-43dd-44a8-98af-7d0df6583ff3-000000/-9S89WR2LJ1o_vQmbH6ibPUmVvNxgk1p4pMKJ_E_SL0=426)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000199bf9130bf-3cd5d4ac-43dd-44a8-98af-7d0df6583ff3-000000/gzWwD2UhLVOhDNnBQ9cAq8UnfDYJiB8x0mj39KvXwAc=426) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000199bf9130bf-3cd5d4ac-43dd-44a8-98af-7d0df6583ff3-000000/aTDxRufsDeCteXymrvTx1odH3VstvB1W35J1kysdvnU=426).

subject: Your vote is about to mean nothing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JEFF CRANK FOR CONGRESS
body:
You can no longer afford to wait.

---
| | | | | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfuubfgjr9nlq72354hequ8b0upmq8bvu1ucjiog_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
| | | | | The integrity of our elections is on the brink of collapse.

Millions of illegal votes could flood our system, diluting your voice and undermining our democracy. The Radical Left is pushing to dismantle safeguards, block Voter ID laws, and rewrite rules to serve their agenda.

They don't care about fair elections--they care about power. Their reckless policies threaten to let non-citizens vote, eroding the foundation of our republic.

We're fighting back to secure our elections with ironclad Voter ID laws, but we need you in this battle. Your immediate action will send a thunderous message: Americans demand elections that are fair, legal, and secure.

**Will you stand up and say YES to Voter ID laws? **

[Click here to make your voice heard](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1ibmfa7trd4k0nlvih5l28f7v9d5v0ps89pu2q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs "Click here to make your voice heard")

Don't let our democracy be stolen. Act now, or we risk losing everything.

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztvfbscv4ag4kk7pofhrbccqnudrv3ivn2o5hjr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
Friend,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbq1f44ohgh8bmhb57u5u0s4udo6sks4i93rklgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Friend...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4f7ivre1g045hjlvah2afo4o1oinenocfcpd3kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk0nghk6fudsep6398v5stfqhq13dtja1sf9h940_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkunobfpl4aij69i7l8of8u0eja8h8ohudfjfit0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z50urq6i2qb27lkq7q70a52ujhoesp3e6jklomug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ac9283hu2j2cot0csdimo7heuo9ocf09s7mf28_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhivu2fb2mk4aenn84qtucmj4bdpv4jmsh974lb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdef560aks25icegrhcn9h18lcbhlflcdqqqpbrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9udfqajhf5brpicfbq6l8oif6hl1nfjs54hjie8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
Also...**Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:**📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...**Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z144mgee69sot946hkqup85c2rrk1qsl7oqu75ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.**Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc8tmjgj4i5ninavfghfdmq2mjg65h5q0e80s85g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend.**God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcf9l2k4hjkilphlel2r72u81t9lrhiopfur3kkg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6ao31c1gmcoh1k8gn48n24hjmap70sdie9o30s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z34smipdm3mchm7kta70f7fmaljdbg7t7dpkeheo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s3hm9p70c3h2bs)_

name: Patriot Cigars

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The genocide must end.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)
Friend — Today is a somber day.
Two years ago today, Hamas attacked Israel in a senseless crime against humanity. The horrific violence against children, women, the elderly, and the unarmed people who were killed and taken hostage by Hamas was absolutely unconscionable. But what followed surprised even longtime observers of Israel’s occupation of Palestinian territories.
**Since then, Israel unleashed complete hell on Gaza, and to this day the death and destruction has not stopped.**
The Gaza strip has been flattened. Some reports estimate that over 180,000 Palestinians have died. The Israeli Defense Forces admit themselves that almost 90% of those deaths were civilians. A vast majority of homes and buildings have been destroyed. They’ve systematically starved millions of civilians and killed hundreds of those who sought humanitarian aid.
We’ve seen little kids killed by sniper rounds to the head. We’ve seen people crushed to death underneath rubble and bulldozers. We’ve seen tanks and machine guns fire upon crowds. We’ve seen innocent people taken prisoner and tortured. We’ve seen aid workers, doctors, and EMTs deliberately targeted by airstrikes. We’ve seen newborn babies die in hospital beds.
**What Israel has done in Gaza is a genocide. A crime against humanity of the highest order.**
Human rights organizations agree. Experts and scholars agree. The United Nations agrees. **It’s a genocide,** and it must finally come to an end.
And more than that, the rights and dignity of Palestinians must finally be secured. That means putting a stop to the ever-expanding Israeli settlements in the West Bank, enforced through violent mob attacks. It means ending the Israeli blockade and occupation of Gaza. It means recognizing statehood for Palestine and ensuring civil governance without Israeli interference.
Yes, it’s a long list of goals. It will take time. But history didn’t begin on October 7th, 2023.
For decades, the Palestinian people have suffered at the hands of Israeli domination. The world is finally coming to understand that the Gaza genocide is merely the deadliest extension of Israel’s occupation — and leaders like Netanyahu have made it clear that the ultimate goal is the full Israeli annexation of Palestine, with Donald Trump’s support. **It must be stopped.**
In the last two years we have seen a sea-change in public opinion on this issue in the US. Americans have seen the genocide live-streamed to their social media feeds. They have seen the death and destruction being carried out with our government’s support and our tax dollars, and they have long had enough.
Our movement grows larger every day, in the US and around the world, despite attempts by leaders like Trump to stifle free speech and crackdown on any and all advocacy. From marches to music festivals to town halls to everyday conversations, the signs are everywhere that the people are crying out for an end to the suffering and freedom for Palestine. The Israeli government has lost the argument with their cruelty, and lost the support of the entire world as a result.
I have been a consistent leader in Congress on ending US aid to Israel, securing a lasting ceasefire, and putting in place a path forward to rebuild Gaza under Palestinian sovereignty. We’ve made progress in growing our coalition in Congress, but more needs to be done.
So today, on this somber anniversary, I am asking you to join me in standing up for Palestine, and to help me put pressure on my colleagues in Congress to take action.
**[Sign on to my petition today calling for Congress to block any further US aid to Israel and to ensure that any ceasefire agreement allows for the peace, security, and self-determination of Palestinians. These two years of torment and destruction must come to an end. The entire world has a responsibility to act in this moment.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-gaza/?source=em251007-1-180&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-gaza/?source=em251007-1-180&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)**
To the people of Gaza: your strength and resilience has inspired the world. Your suffering has not been ignored or forgotten. We are with you, and I promise to continue to do everything in my power to end this genocide.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1874_791427_Z1fL4s&akid=1874%2E791427%2EZ1fL4s)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

| Peter,

Republicans control everything — the White House, the Senate, and the House. Instead of using their power and negotiating to reopen the government, they’d rather leave millions of Americans without health care protections.

Thirteen Emerge alums in Congress are standing strong. They’re holding the line and refusing to vote for a budget that would gut health care, demanding Republicans include health care subsidies that families rely on.

# Democrats threaten to tax businesses leveraging AI - Reasonable or Communism?
Senate Democrats, led by Bernie Sanders, unveiled a stark report Monday warning that AI could wipe out nearly 100 million U.S. jobs in the next decade, urgently **[demanding a"robot tax"](https://substack.com/redirect/5f31794f-ea50-444c-9c62-1447f4074280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on firms automating roles to fund worker retraining and offset lost payroll taxes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5f31794f-ea50-444c-9c62-1447f4074280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **AI Impacts Fast Food:** Up to 89% of fast food jobs--around 3 million positions--face replacement by robots and algorithms, per the Senate analysis of 20 workforce sectors.
* **High-Risk Sectors Identified:** Customer service, freight movers, and executive assistants risk over 80% automation, with 15 sectors potentially losing more than half their roles to AI.
* **Gates Backs Levy Idea:** Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates supports the tax, arguing companies profiting from automation must "pay their fair share" to ease economic fallout.
* **Broader Labor Overhaul:** Proposals include a 32-hour workweek, $17 minimum wage, enhanced overtime rules, and worker equity stakes in automated industries to ensure shared AI benefits.

## Big Question: Should businesses embrace AI to remain competitive, or stifle progress to protect human roles?
**Editor 's thoughts:** If the government punishes businesses embracing new technology and creating efficiency, then America's economy will no doubt fall behind China and other rivals whole-heartedly marching towards progress. America's work force needs to discover creative new ways to provide value to employers and remain relevant in the marketplace.
This will also likely stunt the growth of new AI industries and use cases yet to be invented.

# Gold prices soar to historic All Time Highs
Gold prices shattered records Tuesday, **[soaring to a historic $4,000 per ounce](https://substack.com/redirect/f256857f-5788-4854-aeac-903505eb5872?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid escalating geopolitical tensions and economic fears, as investors worldwide flock to the safe-haven asset for protection against inflation and U.S. policy disruptions--futures last traded at $4,005.80, up over 50% year-to-date.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f256857f-5788-4854-aeac-903505eb5872?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Central Banks Stockpile Aggressively** : Global institutions have ramped up gold reserves to hedge against U.S. sanctions and trade upheavals sparked by President Trump's policies, accelerating the metal's rally beyond traditional benchmarks.
* **Fed Cuts Fuel Momentum** : September's interest rate reduction dimmed bond yields, drawing retail and institutional buyers to gold. This while markets eye two more interest rate cuts this year to combat a weakening labor market.
* **Dalio Urges Portfolio Shift** : Bridgewater Associates founder and hedge fund manager Ray Dalio advocates a 15% gold allocation by investors as a bulwark for when stocks and debt falter, praising it as the ultimate diversifier in turbulent times.
* **Analysts Warn Pullback Risks** : Bank of America has flagged potential "uptrend exhaustion", predicting a potential Q4 consolidation or correction in Gold's price which could test investor resolve amid overbought signals.

# **Trump just made a huge mining move in Alaska for rare earth minerals**
Trilogy Metals' shares **[skyrocketed more than 170%](https://substack.com/redirect/c613c6e5-7773-466f-9b6f-ab9cd9aee912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in premarket trading Tuesday after the U.S. government announced a million dollar investment for a stake in the company.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c613c6e5-7773-466f-9b6f-ab9cd9aee912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Government Secures Strategic Stake** : The deal is structured where the U.S. invests $35.6 million for a 10% ownership in Trilogy, bolstering domestic control over copper-dominant polymetallic deposits essential for energy and defense supply chains.
* **Policy Reversal Ignites Momentum** : The Trump administration decision overturns Biden's rejection of the 211-mile Ambler Road project. By designating it federal critical infrastructure it can unlock the richest known mineral deposits in Alaska's remote wilderness.
* **Mining District Holds Vast Riches** : The Ambler region boasts world-class deposits of copper, cobalt, zinc, and lead, the mining of which can fuel U.S. manufacturing and reduce reliance on foreign sources of rare earth minerals.

* * *
* * *
# Concerns continue to mount over a Dot Com 2.0 Bust for AI stocks
Analysts and experts **[continue to sound the alarm](https://substack.com/redirect/3d8ace1f-f697-4b09-aa05-26d3efcb587b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/3d8ace1f-f697-4b09-aa05-26d3efcb587b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)over a potential Dot Com Bust 2.0 in the AI space as AI stocks continue to climb.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d8ace1f-f697-4b09-aa05-26d3efcb587b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Market Gets Jittery:** Concern has ramped up in recent days after the announcement of OpenAI's deal with AMD.
**Wild Appreciation In Value:** AMD's share price jumped 35% on Monday off the back of the announcement.
**Experts See Clouds On The Horizon:** Michael O'Rourke chief market strategist at Jonestrading issued a warning that _" The market is pricing these deals as if everyone who transacts with OpenAI will be a winner ...... OpenAI is a negative cash flow company and has nothing to lose by signing these deals. Investors should be more discerning. But this is a buy-first, ask-questions-later environment." _
**Sentiment Echoed:** Brian Mulberry, client portfolio manager at Zacks Investment Management Inc warned of the possible effects and fallout _" It reminds me of what happened with telecom back in the mid-nineties ... If any one of these deals falls through it has this domino effect downstream that I think is concerning,"_
### **Read More:["](https://substack.com/redirect/174f02f6-08a1-4f48-a229-79e472d7e955?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[The AI Boom's Fragile Foundations"](https://substack.com/redirect/174f02f6-08a1-4f48-a229-79e472d7e955?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Mobile Ad company plunges over SEC investigation in to ad tracking breaches
Mobile ad giant AppLovin's stock **[plunged 14% Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/58569164-b8b7-4078-b5b2-746433cfbdbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after a Bloomberg report revealed a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission investigation into its aggressive data-collection practices, sparked by whistleblower complaints and short-seller accusations of violating major app store terms.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58569164-b8b7-4078-b5b2-746433cfbdbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Investigation Sparks Market Panic** : The SEC probe, launched this year following a whistleblower tip, targets alleged breaches in targeted ad delivery without user consent, although at present there are no formal accusations against the company.
* **Short-Sellers Fuel Allegations** : Firms like Muddy Waters, Fuzzy Panda, and Culper Research issued 2025 reports slamming AppLovin's AXON AI software for secretly extracting IDs from Meta, Snap, TikTok, Reddit, and Google.
* **Volatile Stock History Exposed** : AppLovin has had a turbulent time. Shares, up 80% year-to-date after 700% 2024 surge, have repeatedly tanked--20% post-March Muddy Waters report and 12% after February's critiques. This is despite recent addition to the S&P 500.
* **Company Defends Amid Scrutiny** : AppLovin CEO Adam Foroughi previously blogged against short-seller "profit schemes," while a spokesperson for the company dismissed concerns highlighting that the company has routine regulator engagement and makes public disclosure of any material issues.

* * *
* * *
# Jimmy Kimmel's "Live!" is on life support
Jimmy Kimmel's "Live!" returned to ABC on Sept. 23 amid backlash from his false claim linking Charlie Kirk's assassin to MAGA, but Thursday's episode drew just 265,000 key adults 25-54--**[a staggering 85% drop](https://substack.com/redirect/cf1fe6ec-c7e5-4238-ac6d-35609ce0d351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from the hyped premiere's 1.7 million.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf1fe6ec-c7e5-4238-ac6d-35609ce0d351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Viewership Drops Dramatically Post-Hype** : The latest episode averaged just 1.9 million total viewers, down 71% from comeback night, signaling fading curiosity after his brief suspension.
* **Lags Behind Conservative Rival** : Kimmel trailed "Gutfeld!" by 49% in total viewers and 40% in key demos, with Fox host's show hitting 2.8 million amid Kimmel's partisan pivot and resulting crash.
* **Suspension Sparked by Falsehood** : Disney put the show on a brief pause following Kimmel's erroneous remarks mocking Kirk's killing as being carried out by a right wing assassin, despite the suspect's left-wing ties. This prompted stations to pull the show and rumors of an FCC probe.
* **Monologue Avoids Full Apology** : Kimmel's emotional return speech where he choked up over his intent but skipped any real expression of contrition, drew scorn from Turning Point USA as "unrepentant" amid vigils for Kirk.

* * *
* * *
# Eurozone finally wakes up to Stablecoins and the fact they are losing the race to the USA
In Brussels on Thursday, Eurozone finance ministers will huddle to plot a Euro stablecoin surge, countering U.S. dominance in the $300 billion digital token market--where[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/e69a475e-87e4-4b8f-9e85-9f5b90004233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Euro versions limp in at just $620 million](https://substack.com/redirect/e69a475e-87e4-4b8f-9e85-9f5b90004233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --amid forecasts of explosive decade-long growth.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e69a475e-87e4-4b8f-9e85-9f5b90004233?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Ministers Eye MiCA Tweaks** : Officials will probe if crypto regulations strike right balance between risks and innovation, eyeing fixes to nurture high-quality euro stablecoins without stifling growth.
* **Banks Launch Euro Challenger** : A consortium of nine European lenders, including ING and UniCredit, unveiled a euro-denominated token last month to claw back market share from U.S. rivals.
* **U.S. Genius Act Stirs Urgency** : July's American law mandates dollar or Treasury backing for stablecoins, fortifying dominance and prompting Europe's defensive push in the digital finance space.
* **Digital Euro Ties Explored** : The discussions seek to link the stablecoin boom with the ECB's upcoming digital currency, aiming for seamless integration and broader Eurozone financial sovereignty.

High-Risk Sectors Identified: Customer service, freight movers, and executive assistants risk over 80% automation, with 15 sectors potentially losing more than half their roles to AI. Gates Backs Levy Idea: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates supports the tax, arguing companies profiting from automation must "pay their fair share" to ease economic fallout. Broader Labor Overhaul: Proposals include a 32-hour workweek, $17 minimum wage, enhanced overtime rules, and worker equity stakes in automated industries to ensure shared AI benefits. Big Question: Should businesses embrace AI to remain competitive, or stifle progress to protect human roles? Editor 's thoughts: If the government punishes businesses embracing new technology and creating efficiency, then America's economy will no doubt fall behind China and other rivals whole-heartedly marching towards progress. Fed Cuts Fuel Momentum : September's interest rate reduction dimmed bond yields, drawing retail and institutional buyers to gold. This while markets eye two more interest rate cuts this year to combat a weakening labor market. Policy Reversal Ignites Momentum : The Trump administration decision overturns Biden's rejection of the 211-mile Ambler Road project. By designating it federal critical infrastructure it can unlock the richest known mineral deposits in Alaska's remote wilderness. Peter, DAF Day is this Thursday, October 9 and we wanted to make sure you know you can use a donor-advised fund (DAF) gift to fight for reproductive freedom. [**And now giving through your DAF is now just a click away—look for the new DAFpay button at the bottom of our donation pages!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116798722/574467642/2141984067?sourceid=1150910&utm_campaign=25emage-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=dafday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTdjYzdkMC1hMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw9uRyDb-EdEn0iwETqx4C2mR1eA8muFwU9RvzEWh74=&emci=2a3fd564-f5a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=857cc7d0-a1a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

A donor-advised fund (DAF) is a tax-smart way to give, providing the _most favorable charitable benefits_ while fueling our urgent work in the courts, statehouses, and communities around the world. | [**GIVE WITH YOUR DAF**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116798723/574467643/2141984067?sourceid=1150910&utm_campaign=25emage-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=dafday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTdjYzdkMC1hMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw9uRyDb-EdEn0iwETqx4C2mR1eA8muFwU9RvzEWh74=&emci=2a3fd564-f5a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=857cc7d0-a1a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "GIVE WITH YOUR DAF")
---
[**With reproductive rights under relentless attack, your DAF gift will help the Center fight back.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116798725/574467645/2141984067?sourceid=1150910&utm_campaign=25emage-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=dafday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTdjYzdkMC1hMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw9uRyDb-EdEn0iwETqx4C2mR1eA8muFwU9RvzEWh74=&emci=2a3fd564-f5a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=857cc7d0-a1a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

We've sued the Trump administration for hiding records related to its reevaluation of medication abortion. We are in the courts. We are in statehouses. We are in communities. And we won’t stop until every person, everywhere, can access the health care they need.

[**This work is made possible by supporters like you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116798726/574467646/2141984067?sourceid=1150910&utm_campaign=25emage-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=dafday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTdjYzdkMC1hMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw9uRyDb-EdEn0iwETqx4C2mR1eA8muFwU9RvzEWh74=&emci=2a3fd564-f5a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=857cc7d0-a1a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

This week, your DAF gift can have double the impact. [**#HalfMyDAF is distributing $2.25 million in matching grants—but only through October 10 at 9 a.m.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116798727/574467647/2141984067?sourceid=1150910&utm_campaign=25emage-1001aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=dafday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTdjYzdkMC1hMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw9uRyDb-EdEn0iwETqx4C2mR1eA8muFwU9RvzEWh74=&emci=2a3fd564-f5a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=857cc7d0-a1a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) When you commit to granting half of your DAF balance, your donations become eligible for matching, multiplying your impact for reproductive rights.

clean_body: DAF Day is October 9! | | | ---|--- Peter, DAF Day is this Thursday, October 9 and we wanted to make sure you know you can use a donor-advised fund (DAF) gift to fight for reproductive freedom. A donor-advised fund (DAF) is a tax-smart way to give, providing the most favorable charitable benefits while fueling our urgent work in the courts, statehouses, and communities around the world. | "GIVE WITH YOUR DAF" We've sued the Trump administration for hiding records related to its reevaluation of medication abortion. We are in the courts. We are in statehouses. We are in communities. And we won’t stop until every person, everywhere, can access the health care they need. This week, your DAF gift can have double the impact. When you commit to granting half of your DAF balance, your donations become eligible for matching, multiplying your impact for reproductive rights. "MAKE A DAF GIFT" Thank you for using your voice to fight for justice. With gratitude, Nancy Northup President & CEO P.S. If you have any questions, or contact us directly at mailto:contribute@reprorights.org. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: Peter, we need to fill you in on this IMMEDIATELY!
body:
This should NEVER have been able to happen in the United States of America.

| | | | Peter, we need to fill you in on this IMMEDIATELY!
FIRST, we all know Special Counsel Jack Smith. You know the LEADER of the corrupt attempt to weaponize our justice system to tear down President Trump, undermine a presidential election, and destroy the MAGA movement?
He was behind the RAID on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago. He was behind TWO separate indictments of President Trump. He slapped President Trump with 44 FELONY counts.
THEN, he tried to FAST-TRACK his bogus case before the 2024 presidential election in an attempt to END Donald J. Trump’s campaign. He even launched a last-ditch trial by paper, unsealing and releasing over 160 pages of anti-Trump propaganda less than a month before Election Day in yet another eleventh-hour attempt to destroy President Trump’s campaign.
NOW, it has just been revealed that Jack Smith tracked the private communications of nearly a dozen GOP Senators - including Marsha Blackburn!
This is a complete DISGRACE and should NEVER have been able to happen in the United States of America.
President Trump said it himself:
“Deranged Jack Smith got caught with his hand in the cookie jar. A real sleazebag!!!”
We couldn’t agree more with President Trump. He’s calling out this latest abuse of power by Jack Smith and the Democrats for what it truly is:
The BLATANT politicization and weaponization of our justice system and the FBI against President Trump, his supporters, and ALL Republicans.
We cannot stand for this. Just think, if they could do this to our President AND sitting U.S. Senators, then they can do this to YOU!
Today, following this bombshell discovery, Team Marsha is launching an emergency petition, and we are pleading with every last patriot reading this to join us immediately in speaking out against this injustice.
[We need to gather 100,000 signatures from top MAGA patriots nationwide before 11:59 PM tonight to show Jack Smith and the corrupt Democrats that we will not tolerate this disgusting political attack.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._Rrwfq2KONdrHqg)
|
EMERGENCY TEAM MARSHA PETITION: STAND AGAINST THE WEAPONIZATION OF THE FBI AND OUR JUSTICE SYSTEM BY JACK SMITH
Goal: 100,000 Signatures[Your Signature: MISSING](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-z8QrnRJMrog)
[SIGN HERE: X__________](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-itGuqfPzPEmxbJg)
---

We’ll be keeping a close eye out for your signature. As soon as it comes through, Team Marsha will flag it directly for President Trump’s team as a top MAGA supporter.

Thank you for your support. Together, we will ensure this disgrace NEVER happens again in the United States of America.

\- Team Marsha
| |
---
| | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---

Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.

To unsubscribe from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund , [click here](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._)

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1fc42149bdd94ad09d57f027faf12786&_e=fJbrkQjc6K-JtZkxPQOoIjIFQmZzmqI7l3zaoNCkVv19hz54byi7YmfeH7KhDMv1cpphfc227PsBgIDz9smRFtYgXPMcY8uDlXVoFj55KnJaGjmExTtjSH4O-RqH4-BYMhj3wolGMRka5aeNhStZfKfFV1pfftmYDYBRoMqLaC6_oxjwSsNrxGf0Ta_sNjFstxPjzaXCUyoGq5IahwCZJL83X6za2oAJ5i0cXGQBj5js2kyxuYYJa-kMKV3j6iL2TipskwcaSeQkOlU-pW7licz6Iq2TX93MlEu8WTRtrO7RwXhnabwEDuYIdRGTYoEj47uYEfa2cgJ_p1BU705J51u2R6fgzNz4DEHZBtpPDv0WoxyZ2o1pH91nZf63mRQg2Xw5GEa5-pWesdSAFQwK2aA6OMgwj2r4XIOWXjJQ2-8WjuVv1laenWgd3ShSi-ycplQ4CgKJiGxDg05WVyVajNXENJBAPgKLzHi4449aJ5gJi9oHfFzWFUacksUL1Hgd2wA_QH9L_lZ0pRR9CycaPmDkeAinPCxoU_fCdLvZr6K31sOUtmByYWDOfd-5I27c5LyVw0oA036OUd4gvprOGEXDtVcXr02xT-1JZ2CyrCP9N39WrLwfhTPY19f41ihQ1mHAOuP_Z8d5_ACifTfWqWVtAbMBQD4IhMcrhPNDJW93hybW1ZtS_hqy7A9-qMnWwV56NZPiqJA_FPHCC3qOa0DRI7YsgOSSgY11KUEKoN_-zIVYFNj708sX9htDr7meG56FSo5lNZn411v9aIidTQ%3D%3D)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1fc42149bdd94ad09d57f027faf12786&_e=fJbrkQjc6K-JtZkxPQOoIjIFQmZzmqI7l3zaoNCkVv19hz54byi7YmfeH7KhDMv1cpphfc227PsBgIDz9smRFtYgXPMcY8uDlXVoFj55KnJaGjmExTtjSH4O-RqH4-BYMhj3wolGMRka5aeNhStZfKfFV1pfftmYDYBRoMqLaC6_oxjwSsNrxGf0Ta_sNjFstxPjzaXCUyoGq5IahwCZJL83X6za2oAJ5i0cXGQBj5js2kyxuYYJa-kMKV3j6iL2TipskwcaSeQkOlU-pW7liZ4T3LqoutzUInNYLcp5dLs-sqZlnhhw_2eBs4dxmPww6gVAurdPJiqU48opCxulPWRdv-hHUVOB-FOoBVwX_6lWNMMHyz1Z44I-jJ6LDyvXztZSFK0FAey4eGGtZT1yvAKCXsGnlmqLsnEdWQvb1sklmhjs436EwhE645GXGFJNmboTCm9ZmUVGDoG6CkSohcAMLjTcqXjE5E4MoCkKYmZYjZr-p3tUPe_Q92WgjjCls2i-G2sKQkLBqqMcMwWnZcuvmDkHJ4hRZY4LQWG5RLxhkSmjlL9qmDDFuyXnXAEayoBBTSTb_zrpoI-qlmExTcSeQpdbBoWYEn2RMztH28LUIKsnsHtDI4MFe_nRiT5eGmTDwCgY_2MdaFMw-rznBOR6AYyaw_J2jZpE6apTqBew_8lHms5ijgtkg0Ha9e_J1OGpNRbvObQS0rCzdGVs6lHf8Evpi49j9qDRuaVvJ8vJ9Qn7MpwrfqxSrd9JxpUVFO8ldhbNWAMP38h_42EExg%3D%3D)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

The truth is, only 10% of people open emails like these. Even fewer read them all the way through. So we’re honored that you’re here.
---
John Hickenlooper is running in his first Senate reelection campaign — in a seat that Democrats MUST hold if we’re going to retake our Senate majority.
---
Your support made a massive difference in helping John flip this seat blue in 2020 — and it’s helping him keep MAGA extremists far _far_ away from Colorado. The only way John can protect this seat and stop Trump from expanding his Senate control is with a powerful movement fueled by people just like you.
---
**Here’s the thing: Democrats cannot make the mistake of thinking Colorado is a safe seat just because we won our last race here. That’s exactly what Trump and his MAGA posse want.** National Republicans are relying on us becoming complacent so they can swoop in and drown out our campaign when we least expect it. Remember: they spent nearly $50 MILLION trying to defeat John last time, so we need to be prepared for MAJOR spending this time around.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to make it to the top.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45576945-8432-4d51-ad38-ab99436f97e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter. But I have to ask: [Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $10 between my Senate campaign in Ohio and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f52a51e-dfa5-4321-9cd7-7c17ab4ce17f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at The Cook Political Report increased our odds of winning What if I told you that CNN and The New York Times report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me? What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you? This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win. [So please, split $10 or more between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before our midnight deadline to power our campaign forward, win in Ohio, and keep up the fight for working people.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9f8c3a2-4861-4c52-b885-2349c4f4a317/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5087e710-6a3e-494a-9612-f87c4c0e179f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Peter,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1be7dc9edc194dafbd5adfaa97b17ec4&_e=dtqtMZdyEPLTrtRsrVCoqseCQjjncXezsoxz5zWetTuims7iXLRaE5IqzwoxLdV9_57KBvoSIPM2ANXpwos0QztMnGb-NdPMqCylAE3YyxaYxIFxYdz8PhO3rj57Z_vQOG9xvp5VkwL8ehrE4SMp5J1yWjyRa37UmhToZWB-bm9DBYJ_mo8DZwLinfO8Y4JsigXCyrr5iqXdQgwwwDnK0AnV56x8EorVt9bCDYZK7LZocXnpOfeI55cDJ8b32P8tZf-Nz02bKBgxW3-Qan_tExB-NeTO8ph1jNYZHR5Ezy_xRzkqpNmwSCDf72YQMLf2Zzhq1Pf3xAqLelmpNLg-FNMhmi25J24SJ6s5InKK73Z3bQr6nUWsU5eYXJyQQpz6-fFnDD8hXvSPtHwogi9WVVkB1GLHwOdQNEyigc7c5KerByFvS1mmwSZlnej_eDTzdpYuPqghT4PvG4BsYQasDKFKhW4k75msSdQA0vH9leIdPLFlDYgrxw9-R_57rpI89JwKSyPbVO-Uhns4bM8_XIK_j5ri61TJj3gFmrm-OANzYQiQcjxD_qFz-jqWO9UMZB3tgXb-cziW4G6y-tileaokznrH4m_GU07jdfEzIoHkxwkKB5wnPuQGNIC7qfMTjo9kxu2sFJovlFRb8vL1-93xCeTrSFkjOMlS_Jita-I%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Peter,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1be7dc9edc194dafbd5adfaa97b17ec4&_e=dtqtMZdyEPLTrtRsrVCoqseCQjjncXezsoxz5zWetTuims7iXLRaE5IqzwoxLdV9_57KBvoSIPM2ANXpwos0QztMnGb-NdPMqCylAE3YyxaYxIFxYdz8PhO3rj57Z_vQOG9xvp5VkwL8ehrE4SMp5J1yWjyRa37UmhToZWB-bm9DBYJ_mo8DZwLinfO8Y4JsigXCyrr5iqXdQgwwwDnK0AnV56x8EorVt9bCDYZK7LaG6IvPsCCf9YQ7WSALD4ylG_rtspgGGuZ8Ombt40_twE_bD1nWDFQY9mHk0oXWKpBS4umdVR0kVvunA6YbkblAxJ332l5Jz-nxjQhR6bvsbW295JD9VsQTweUEbv07IT-WRMySCRxKuMhcO5WCvKR4vj7Zo5sHSwyiT05agE6O5QWzKhxnsezAyfhOXOYV3q0Nwuiqi2C7giu_Z8SuLjpFLQwxdw3b7djboC-eOrFd7rntg8MgWHaNK19aLZHj0_fEQd0bmwUbpsLx2gL7oir3RnAh95Cigs1uZ8ZEJEqFzgmY3RFP2XybyxeU4jsTFnQh-kJ_XAbN1DTAA9mxNI7xCtvqJXbDaUDElmsWQsyxJ6BhDVqt1Nj0X2fauYQCoXsQ1HOPU4cx8FgeBYddRkGTPtwCvzHzZuMW1n9zVU8EFxUcONDnt51yBH6UQwxwCb4%3D)
Peter, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Peter, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1be7dc9edc194dafbd5adfaa97b17ec4&_e=dtqtMZdyEPLTrtRsrVCoqseCQjjncXezsoxz5zWetTuims7iXLRaE5IqzwoxLdV9_57KBvoSIPM2ANXpwos0QztMnGb-NdPMqCylAE3YyxaYxIFxYdz8PhO3rj57Z_vQOG9xvp5VkwL8ehrE4SMp5J1yWjyRa37UmhToZWB-bm9DBYJ_mo8DZwLinfO8Y4JsigXCyrr5iqXdQgwwwDnK0AnV56x8EorVt9bCDYZK7LZAOtxC-Rtuki5Ox6oR32dlmEqO__xcP4c5Kd0hvGGfxTRxpJAmmqnNyFQBSQi0tAUlzTtsf89VFmuFoUe21Oz3aZ3FGCnQQAXgO1hIr9EAXz4otvApjzaKx0vZ9DYHg1w2ISd8mk32XZ6aSeR5bWscdSJiy_Wb0rHYbwPm1PtrslBItMwDQrGOQjC62rZKNWDngpVaCeD9Cl5u708pERDgrlukP-xyFogPYNKg1kR8u-0iquvC9GyxiOSSd6M7pzEjzWdWpHxu4hWB1Rs6lr85L2wrESwAWB5XASOGYJPjhi8adHYSkw1fEBk4gWPsZMx0MluSdqiV92KYqOG4c1H2ErqkT6l8DwV0cHCLoStXBKUJS5ybVAIbP50EwRKBaF6ctwW1ya9z4t_-YCyTyJnDsoXpdV_5aG-oQrH0Cb7k7a1k3DoiTRbhSnIJZ62OZOg%3D)**

clean_body: Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Peter,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Peter, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Peter, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. name: Jazz Lewis
subject: NEW LOCATION! Join me on October 29 at Copper Canyon!
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Hi Friend,
I wanted to let you know that my Fall Reception [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_251007_largo_blast3] on Wednesday, October 29, 2025 , from 5:30–7:30 PM will now be held at Copper Canyon in Glenarden .
Same great event-just in a NEW LOCATION!
Copper Canyon Grill
9300 Taj Ln
Glenarden, MD 20706
This will be a wonderful opportunity to connect, share updates on my priorities, discuss what our community needs to thrive, and explore how we can work together to create real, meaningful change. It has been a true blessing to serve District 24 , and I would be honored to have you join me for an evening celebrating our progress.
If you can join me, or would like to make a contribution , you can get tickets and learn more at bit.ly/JazzOct29 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_251007_largo_blast3] . However, if you prefer to pay by check , they can be made payable to:
Friends of Jazz Lewis c/o Rice Consulting,
17 W. Courtland St. Suite 210,
Bel Air, MD 21014
If you have any questions, contact Rice Consulting at 410-838-6355 or email jazzlewis@riceconsultingllc.com [jazzlewis@riceconsultingllc.com] .
As always, I appreciate your support in this re-election campaign.
See you there,
Jazz
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_251007_largo_blast3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazz251029?refcode=email_251007_largo_blast3]
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: The Democrats are playing politics with this shutdown!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Steven Horsford is playing politics, and the people of NV-04 will suffer for it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1f5b7eeb3951/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340743?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=4f0e3441e0&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Patriot, Steven Horsford has failed Nevada—again. Because of Horsford’s partisan games in Washington, our government is shut down. And it’s hardworking Nevadans who are paying the price.

Right now, **over 50,000 veterans** in our district are facing delays in the benefits they’ve earned through service and sacrifice. **11,000 active-duty service members** and their families are wondering if their next paycheck will arrive on time. **55,000 mothers and children** who rely on WIC to put food on the table are left in limbo.
---
| [TELL CONGRESS TO STOP THE SHUTDOWN](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=636dd6aa7d&e=273c9a71fb "TELL CONGRESS TO STOP THE SHUTDOWN")
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=3374ac061d&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| While Horsford digs in and blames others, it is Nevada families who are the ones getting hurt. As a retired Air Force Lieutenant Colonel, I know what it means to lead under pressure. I’ve seen what happens when you put mission first and people before politics. That’s precisely the leadership I’ll bring to Congress, because Washington’s dysfunction must end.
---
| [DONATE TO SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7a04b46a15&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TO SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS")
---
| In order to defeat Steven Horsford and restore sanity to Washington, I need your help. Democrats are pouring millions into this race to protect him. If we don’t fight back now, they’ll keep getting away with it. **I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?** Help us hold Steven Horsford accountable, end the shutdown, and get Nevada’s 4th District back on track.

clean_body: Steven Horsford is playing politics, and the people of NV-04 will suffer for it. | | | | | | | Patriot, Steven Horsford has failed Nevada—again. Because of Horsford’s partisan games in Washington, our government is shut down. And it’s hardworking Nevadans who are paying the price. Right now, over 50,000 veterans in our district are facing delays in the benefits they’ve earned through service and sacrifice. 11,000 active-duty service members and their families are wondering if their next paycheck will arrive on time. 55,000 mothers and children who rely on WIC to put food on the table are left in limbo. | "TELL CONGRESS TO STOP THE SHUTDOWN" | | While Horsford digs in and blames others, it is Nevada families who are the ones getting hurt. As a retired Air Force Lieutenant Colonel, I know what it means to lead under pressure. I’ve seen what happens when you put mission first and people before politics. That’s precisely the leadership I’ll bring to Congress, because Washington’s dysfunction must end. | "DONATE TO SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS" | In order to defeat Steven Horsford and restore sanity to Washington, I need your help. Democrats are pouring millions into this race to protect him. If we don’t fight back now, they’ll keep getting away with it. I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04? Help us hold Steven Horsford accountable, end the shutdown, and get Nevada’s 4th District back on track. | For God and Country, Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.) Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress Nevada’s 4th Congressional District | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada" | Copyright © 2025 Flippo for Nevada, All rights reserved.

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: We need a bipartisan solution ASAP
body:
| | Peter,

It’s the basic job of Congress to fund our government – for a functioning democracy, it’s the lowest bar. Yet, we’re now nearly a week into a government shutdown with no clear end in sight.

Hardworking Americans and everyday families deserve better than this.

The reality is that folks across WA-03, and across the country, are facing challenges – whether it’s the costs of groceries, healthcare and childcare that remain too high, or struggling to run a family farm or small business.

The way to address these challenges is not by fostering hyperpartisanship or extremism. What we need now more than ever is good-faith efforts to find common ground, and meaningful bipartisan work by Congress.

Every moment the government is shut down, real people face real consequences. I’ve called on House Leadership several times to work across the aisle to fulfill the basic job of funding our government, and I’ll continue to do so as we enter the next round of negotiations.

A real, bipartisan agreement that protects Americans’ healthcare and builds an economy where you can raise a family on one income is possible – and I’m rolling up my sleeves and getting right back to work.

Thanks for all you do, Peter. More updates to come.

– Marie

P.S. My deepest thanks to everyone who chipped in ahead of our FEC deadline. I’m so grateful to have you on our team as we keep forging ahead.

clean_body: | | Peter, It’s the basic job of Congress to fund our government – for a functioning democracy, it’s the lowest bar. Yet, we’re now nearly a week into a government shutdown with no clear end in sight. Hardworking Americans and everyday families deserve better than this. The reality is that folks across WA-03, and across the country, are facing challenges – whether it’s the costs of groceries, healthcare and childcare that remain too high, or struggling to run a family farm or small business. The way to address these challenges is not by fostering hyperpartisanship or extremism. What we need now more than ever is good-faith efforts to find common ground, and meaningful bipartisan work by Congress. Every moment the government is shut down, real people face real consequences. I’ve called on House Leadership several times to work across the aisle to fulfill the basic job of funding our government, and I’ll continue to do so as we enter the next round of negotiations. A real, bipartisan agreement that protects Americans’ healthcare and builds an economy where you can raise a family on one income is possible – and I’m rolling up my sleeves and getting right back to work. Thanks for all you do, Peter. More updates to come. – Marie P.S. My deepest thanks to everyone who chipped in ahead of our FEC deadline. I’m so grateful to have you on our team as we keep forging ahead. | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. MGP Victory Fund PO Box 1164 Washougal, WA 98671 United States

name: Amy McGrath
subject: I’m announcing my campaign for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

We’re at an inflection point in our country’s history.

Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That’s still my North Star. And every day, we’re watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends.

And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering. Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears.

**I’m announcing that I’m running for U.S. Senate.** We need leaders who won’t be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country’s foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don’t scare me.

As you know, I’ve run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn’t go our way. But in my line of work, you don’t quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country.

Just like you, I’m sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they’re throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn’t know a backbone if it hit them in the face.

That’s why I’m running. Because we deserve leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. **That’s what this country is worth to me, and I know that like the Voter Protection Project, I’m not alone.**

Look, I know this race won’t be easy. But here’s the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we’re brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn’t had in _15 years,_ thanks to Mitch McConnell.

And I intend to win it.

**But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly.[Will you split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project to kickstart this campaign and help us wage a real fight for the future of our democracy?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94491?t=6&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Amy McGrath and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94492?t=7&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94493?t=8&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94494?t=9&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94495?t=10&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94496?t=11&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)
For that and for everything to come in this campaign, thank you.

Amy
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21407%2E878179%2ErURMTA)
