Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116801031/574475834/1498593520?refcode=100725_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OTQyOWZlLWE3YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Dy_WSEHmuvhj6Wsrsovt9aRso3d0DGu4FFJIr49TfNk=)**

| | **We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump** , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "_During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates_." **We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration.** In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Sign on: Demand justice for Adelita Grijalva
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116801291/574476556/795475316?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzlkY2M2NC1hOGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avTMGgKlKLNCQG2tFGTtRmdHqu91pi79HOxovOjOTko=)
Peter, My friend and colleague, Congressman Raul Grijalva, passed away in March. He was a dedicated public servant, speaking out against injustices and how we must work for the people. Two weeks ago, his daughter, Adelita, won the special election to replace him, but she still hasn’t been sworn in – solely because Mike Johnson refuses to do so. There’s no reason to wonder why: **she would be the deciding vote to allow the full release of the Epstein files.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116801292/574476557/-941828627?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzlkY2M2NC1hOGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avTMGgKlKLNCQG2tFGTtRmdHqu91pi79HOxovOjOTko=&emci=519dcc64-a8a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5c9dcc64-a8a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=18052858) This is a violation of the Constitution and disrespect for the rule of law, Peter. The American people deserve transparency and accountability. The people of Arizona deserve to have their votes recognized. We must swear in Adelita Grijalva to the 119th Congress. [**If you want this standoff to end immediately, add your name to demand that Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans swear in Adelita Grijalva!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116801293/574476558/-941828627?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzlkY2M2NC1hOGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avTMGgKlKLNCQG2tFGTtRmdHqu91pi79HOxovOjOTko=&emci=519dcc64-a8a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5c9dcc64-a8a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=18052858) | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116801294/574476559/-941828627?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzlkY2M2NC1hOGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avTMGgKlKLNCQG2tFGTtRmdHqu91pi79HOxovOjOTko=&emci=519dcc64-a8a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5c9dcc64-a8a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=18052858)
---
Mike Johnson is on the record saying he would swear her in “early this week” – then promptly told the majority of Republicans not to return to Washington.
My Democratic colleagues once again brought up Adelita’s name for a vote, and once again, GOP leadership immediately closed the session.
This is blatant obstruction, solely to keep the Republican majority in the House illegitimately high, to block real bipartisan efforts towards justice for the American people. And we can stop it if we make our objections loud enough to force their hand.

name: Autism Health
subject: Join us for these Spooktacular Events!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Join Us At The Autism Health Summit in 2026!**
---
|
---
|
### **October Spooktacular Ticket Deal – Limited Time Only!**
October is here, and we’re celebrating with a **Spooktacular Deal** on tickets to the **Autism Health Summit 2026** — but hurry, this special offer vanishes at midnight on **October 31st**! The **Autism Health Summit** will be held **April 24–26, 2026** , at the stunning **Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California**. This powerful 3-day event brings together world-class experts, parents, practitioners, and advocates from across the globe to share cutting-edge research, innovative therapies, and inspiring stories of hope and healing. Headline speakers are **Aaron Siri and Del Bigtree!**
### **Special October Ticket Pricing**
**General Admission:**
~~$345~~ → **$295**
PLUS **an extra $25 off** with the code **Spooky25** **VIP Admission:**
~~$445~~ → **$395**
PLUS **an extra $25 off** with the code **Spooky25** All ticket prices will increase in **2026** , so this is the **perfect time to secure your spot** at the lowest rate of the year. **Location:** Legacy Center Resort & Spa, San Diego, CA
**Dates:** April 24–26, 2026
### **Reserve Your Tickets Today**
[Register HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f164972eef&e=3a42edfdc4) and enter **Spooky25** at checkout to receive your **extra $25 discount** on any ticket type. This offer is only valid through **October 31st** , so don’t miss your chance to be part of this transformational event at the best possible price. We look forward to seeing you in San Diego!
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5b3687ab54&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
|
### **Join Us for the World Premiere of _An Inconvenient Study_**
---
|
---
| We’re excited to invite you to the **world premiere of the powerful new documentary _An Inconvenient Study _**at the **Malibu Film Festival**. This eye-opening film will make its debut at the **Directors Guild of America Theatre** in Los Angeles on **Saturday, October 12, at 11:00 AM PST**. This is a special opportunity to be part of a pivotal cultural moment — surrounded by like-minded advocates, changemakers, and supporters who care deeply about truth and transparency. If you can’t make it in person, you can still be part of the movement! There will be a **digital premiere at 5:00 PM PST the same day** , so you can tune in from anywhere. Tickets are available for both **in-person** and **digital screenings** :
→ [malibufilmfestival.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=88720ff272&e=3a42edfdc4)
→ [aninconvenientstudy.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=363056ec72&e=3a42edfdc4) Let’s come together to support this important film and help spread the message far and wide. We hope to see you there!
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=af4f43382e&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
|
### Join Autism Health at the CHD Conference in Austin, TX!
---
|
---
| We’re excited to announce that Autism Health will be exhibiting at the **Children’s Health Defense Conference** , taking place **November 7–9, 2025** in Austin, Texas. This is an incredible opportunity to connect with leaders, advocates, and families who are passionate about protecting children’s health and advancing informed solutions. Stop by our exhibitor booth to learn more about our research initiatives, upcoming events, and how you can get involved in our mission.
→ [Click here to learn more about the CHD 2025 Conference](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b147a8fb8a&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [LEARN MORE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ee4a7ef5d1&e=3a42edfdc4 "LEARN MORE")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ea82f9832d&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE NOW")

San Diego, CA**

I have a _WILD TESTIMONY_ about the August smoke bomb attack on our worship service. And it’s also a testimony to the power of your prayers! Earlier this summer as we worshipped inside a church in Montreal, a man broke through police ranks and hurled two lit smoke bombs on stage. That moment went viral around the world. We’ve just learned the alleged smoke bomber has been officially identified. And here’s the shocking part: he apparently works inside the Canadian military as a defense contractor — and has allegedly been operating a secret Antifa cell now being exposed. I can feel the darkness being uncovered. There is so much more to this story. Please keep praying. God is exposing it all! _**WATCH THE UPDATE ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

clean_body: | | | | | I have a WILD TESTIMONY about the August smoke bomb attack on our worship service. And it’s also a testimony to the power of your prayers! Earlier this summer as we worshipped inside a church in Montreal, a man broke through police ranks and hurled two lit smoke bombs on stage. That moment went viral around the world. We’ve just learned the alleged smoke bomber has been officially identified. And here’s the shocking part: he apparently works inside the Canadian military as a defense contractor — and has allegedly been operating a secret Antifa cell now being exposed. I can feel the darkness being uncovered. There is so much more to this story. Please keep praying. God is exposing it all! Please, can you chip in a split donation between Katherine Clark and my campaign to make sure Trump doesn’t turn Kansas into a one-party state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116802287/574479870/-873599937?amount=&refcode=AU_KMC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQzMWVjNi1hYmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GCgnT_XxZqYhBdBIJaiXre6osQBTKIT-PilxOwYVmbw=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116802288/574479871/-873599937?amount=&refcode=AU_KMC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQzMWVjNi1hYmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GCgnT_XxZqYhBdBIJaiXre6osQBTKIT-PilxOwYVmbw=)

There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition.
I’m proud to be part of the first category, Peter. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most.
But today, far too many politicians belong to the _other_ category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump.
And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to.
But Peter, I’m not going down without a fight.
**[I don’t care how many Republican politicians stand in my way. Whether it’s dozens of Republican politicians or the President himself, I won’t stop working to make sure Kansans’ voices are heard — but I need you by my side. Please, can you chip in a split donation before midnight to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s gerrymandering?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116802289/574479872/-873599937?amount=&refcode=AU_KMC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQzMWVjNi1hYmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GCgnT_XxZqYhBdBIJaiXre6osQBTKIT-PilxOwYVmbw=)**

clean_body: I need you to read this, Peter. | = = = | = There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition. I’m proud to be part of the first category, Peter. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most. But today, far too many politicians belong to the other category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump. And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to. But Peter, I’m not going down without a fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Katherine Clark and Sharice Davids will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = With gratitude, Sharice Katherine Clark for Congress P.O. Box 159 Belmont, MA 02478 United States | mailto:info@katherineclark.org | Paid for by Katherine Clark for Congress

name: John Padora
subject: This shutdown didn’t have to happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/S2q9aPcgPXa6ncIjcZjaRQ~~/AAUS1hA~/mGJcA-gcY9s1u6fMgG1AzaMxQvKyuKCGtT34TVEg5AVKHvkOq_b816UR9V6AK9RdhlQfXTAC0uS4520F5oUeMprY9RzUlpHlNJGy9Jb64-qPl-og6cvZ5KIu7azZ_3O4)
| | Hi friend, I want to be clear about what’s happening right now: **the government shutdown we’re facing didn’t have to happen.** Our government is shut down not because of gridlock, but because extremists in power would rather see people suffer than stand up to their party bosses. Republicans control the White House, the House, and the Senate. They had every chance to keep the government open. Instead, they chose to follow Donald Trump’s orders, tanking our economy, threatening paychecks, and driving up health care costs for millions of families. That’s not leadership. It’s cruelty, plain and simple. I’m running for Congress because Colorado deserves better than politicians who use people’s pain as leverage. We deserve leaders who will put families first — not party bosses, not special interests, and definitely not Donald Trump’s ego. I’m standing up to this kind of extremism because I’ll never forget who pays the price when politicians play games with people’s livelihoods. [**If you’re able to give, it truly means a lot. Your support helps us fight for a government that actually works for everyday people**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/IT_i7ncCxSYXyq9S5f-wGA~~/AAUS1hA~/UISPdgCfEGbcagpQzC5LCUVlitKGRGSTZfv_iI11ypWZWTCbYhD8D4PeyBdTQMw1C8nAb7tez2k7ZZIVK9J1ZYfEvX5StJdKwk_KDQ-Xi62s9vYJuOG75nBQ2oYabskdVSjmUi3oT5Y_DZSo3Iy7MBYC5T3pMeDpFF6oiKeGS8chhwVMN4gBGHq2V5uESdS369jLCRvCZrybW8kPZ23BNg~~) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/rnX9q5gSPdEzkjuV7kn8lQ~~/AAUS1hA~/K65zSIi-eAEY__Y0G222c4Z1OJvyrvGD4QJnU_WzrAqWpCnGuz_6w6BRF-Dua9vlD0Z7BX485TujCWr1VKyCPIvJKkFfmYvrExbAwK92F8Q83W72-zhRzVJ3G8ClqVplFxHCBEV7rArSZ_jbFaa1-qZG-1FfBcTR5NBFGWt9onSK18gKcDvuFqE9o3N1LIqPKoYNDUVPrHaNc3DoWzhm_blif1SWsivd1RatbmncfsaHA5h7_kbEHU3hiWQPcWFc)

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Pete Hegseth needs to resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116803540/574484481/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJlM2NjZi1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19G-kf2d_Jhnlrm5CGZiGyDVHg1lXn6_55MqQgHeoDQ=&emci=76faa934-8fa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a72e3ccf-afa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek: **Pete Hegseth is a danger to our troops, our national security, and our country.** I've said it before, and I'll continue to say it until he resigns.
Last week, Secretary Hegseth addressed our military’s top leaders to let them know that the requirement for every position in combat will be returning to the "highest male standard.” Hegseth has repeatedly made it clear that he does not believe men and women can, or should, fight alongside each other:
_"I’m straight up just saying we should not have women in combat roles."_
– Pete Hegseth, 2024
As a woman who served in the Air Force, I am appalled at what we're seeing from our leadership. Before Trump took office, women only made up roughly 20% of our military. And it will likely drop as Trump and his Cabinet work overtime to force women out of military combat.

We can't let MAGA Republicans undo decades of progress, Derek. **I took an oath to uphold and defend this country and fight for what's right – and that includes making sure Pete Hegseth resigns. But I can't do it alone.**
[**_Please, will you join me and sign my petition to demand that Pete Hegseth resign his post as Secretary of Defense? Our country, and our troops, deserve better._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116803541/574484482/-1271393892?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1178-su-nd&refcode=jtk1178-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJlM2NjZi1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19G-kf2d_Jhnlrm5CGZiGyDVHg1lXn6_55MqQgHeoDQ=&emci=76faa934-8fa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a72e3ccf-afa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21278485)
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116803542/574484483/-1834421210?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1178-su-nd&refcode=jtk1178-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJlM2NjZi1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19G-kf2d_Jhnlrm5CGZiGyDVHg1lXn6_55MqQgHeoDQ=&emci=76faa934-8fa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a72e3ccf-afa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21278485)

Chrissy

* * *
Hey folks,
This week's _Breaking Bread_ hit deep. Katie Phang and I showed up raw and real to talk about what it means to live--and parent--through this relentless moment in American history. We got personal. We got emotional. And we made space to be human in the midst of everything:
* **[00:01:00]** Katie opens up about the emotional toll of constant political vigilance and what it's doing to her day-to-day life
* **[00:04:00]** I describe what it feels like on the ground in Chicago as ICE activity escalates and communities brace for raids
* **[00:10:53]** We shift gears to talk about burnout, guilt, and why self-care isn't optional if we want to stay in this fight
* **[00:20:55]** A small parenting moment from my son stops me in my tracks--and reminds me why this work matters so much
* **[00:28:39]** Katie reflects on how she's seeking grounding through history, self-awareness, and choosing to stay awake

**[If you've been carrying around anger, fear, or guilt lately--this conversation is a must-watch. You're not alone. We're building something here that's honest, accountable, and emotionally grounded in the now. If that resonates with you, I hope you'll join us as a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency.](https://substack.com/redirect/cc62e827-c791-47d7-af95-8581e7a27a24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Tiernan Donohue, EMILYs List
subject: Arizona's governor's race is a toss-up
body:
Here's what to expect |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116803418/574484169/-1510725204?refcode=WUEFEJ13_20251007_AZGovOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057174&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGFhOWVhYS1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeBq127XobD54A1ogafLLQ_MvGK_-Jr24dwP2k_Rjts=) Hey Peter,

There's a new Republican jumping into Arizona’s governor's race, and he's no stranger to us.

Last week, David Schweikert announced that he is leaving Congress to run for governor. Here's what you should know:
* He's been found guilty of 11 ethics violations for diverting campaign funds for personal vacations.
* He mocked the 365,000 Arizonans at risk of losing their health care as nothing more than "bedwetting and whining."
* He was a founding member of MAGA's House Freedom Caucus and _votes with Trump 100% of the time. _

****[**This race is already rated a TOSS-UP. That means every dollar we raise right now could be the difference in keeping extremists out of the governor's office. Donate today:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116803423/574484181/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ13_20251007_AZGovOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057174&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGFhOWVhYS1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeBq127XobD54A1ogafLLQ_MvGK_-Jr24dwP2k_Rjts=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116803431/574484190/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ13_20251007_AZGovOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057174&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGFhOWVhYS1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeBq127XobD54A1ogafLLQ_MvGK_-Jr24dwP2k_Rjts=)
---
We've been preparing for this fight: Schweikert was on our House On Notice list, and our very first endorsement this cycle was aimed at defeating him in Congress. Now, **he's trying to unseat Gov. Katie Hobbs and undo her progress as governor. **

While Gov. Hobbs has repealed Arizona's 1864 abortion ban and expanded homeownership through her Arizona Is Home project, Schweikert has sided with Trump on tariffs, supported one of the largest tax increases in 50 years, and stayed silent on Trump's dangerous plan to eliminate Arizona’s mail-in voting system.

Here's what to expect over the coming months: a Republican primary dominated by loyalty tests to Trump, a flood of billionaire money from GOP donors, and margins that will come down to the wire.
****[**But EMILYs List women like Katie Hobbs win because grassroots supporters like you show up when it matters most. Will you chip in today to help Democratic pro-choice women defeat GOP extremists up and down the ballot?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116803438/574484232/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ13_20251007_AZGovOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057174&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGFhOWVhYS1hZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeBq127XobD54A1ogafLLQ_MvGK_-Jr24dwP2k_Rjts=)****

clean_body: Here's what to expect | = Hey Peter, There's a new Republican jumping into Arizona’s governor's race, and he's no stranger to us. Last week, David Schweikert announced that he is leaving Congress to run for governor. Here's what you should know: He's been found guilty of 11 ethics violations for diverting campaign funds for personal vacations. He mocked the 365,000 Arizonans at risk of losing their health care as nothing more than "bedwetting and whining." He was a founding member of MAGA's House Freedom Caucus and votes with Trump 100% of the time. = | = We've been preparing for this fight: Schweikert was on our House On Notice list, and our very first endorsement this cycle was aimed at defeating him in Congress. Now, he's trying to unseat Gov. Katie Hobbs and undo her progress as governor. While Gov. Hobbs has repealed Arizona's 1864 abortion ban and expanded homeownership through her Arizona Is Home project, Schweikert has sided with Trump on tariffs, supported one of the largest tax increases in 50 years, and stayed silent on Trump's dangerous plan to eliminate Arizona’s mail-in voting system. Here's what to expect over the coming months: a Republican primary dominated by loyalty tests to Trump, a flood of billionaire money from GOP donors, and margins that will come down to the wire. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Tiernan Donohue (she/her/hers) Chief Campaigns Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Team Justice Democrats
subject: A genocide does not begin overnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Two years after October 7, we remember the thousands of Israeli lives lost
on that day, and the hundreds of thousands of Palestinian lives that have
been lost since the Nakba in 1948 and grow higher every day from the
ongoing genocide and forced famine in Gaza that has now reached over
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140953?t=1001&akid=37084%2E1203867%2Ecoo3A1 ]200,000 killed—according to IDF officers themselves.

A genocide does not begin overnight; it is primed, prepared, and justified
through years of occupation, apartheid, dehumanization, displacement,
blockades, and normalization. For decades, the US government has happily
aided the Israeli government and military in all of these actions,
continuing to send billions of dollars of bombs and weapons to a
government well known to be committing atrocities and human rights
violations.

It is those decades of enabling—that have continued through the last two
years—that have given Israel the green light to commit its genocidal
campaign in plain view for the world to see. But working-class communities
globally have risen up where their governments have failed: in general
strikes, walkouts, work stoppages, protests, and brave flotilla missions
to deliver life-saving humanitarian aid to dying and starving Palestinians
in spite of almost assured violence, kidnapping, and detention from
Israel.

We are proud to support the handful of leaders in Congress who have led
the struggle against Israel’s genocide and apartheid long before 2023 and
have continued despite pressures from Party leadership, threats from
violent extremists, and unlimited spending from AIPAC. Our nation should
be ashamed of how small of a minority they are in Congress, and we plan to
change that.

As more Americans rise up in protest of leaders whose silence is bought by
corrupt, pro-genocide lobbies, the tides are turning against spineless
politicians who can’t muster the courage to denounce a genocide or refuse
to fund it. AIPAC is no longer the lobby that can protect you from your
own voters when you ignore their needs; it’s the reason your voters will
vote you out of office.

It was because of the bravery of Justice Democrats' elected officials, who
called the genocide what it was before it was politically safe, that took
movement demands to the halls of power, forced bought and paid for
politicians to grapple with the war crimes they were funding, and helped
shift the Party's voters on this issue. There is still more work to be
done, but our work and your support ensure that we can continue to build
inside and outside the halls of Congress.

Ending this genocide is our elected leaders’ moral imperative as the
country most responsible for funding it. And it is our moral imperative as
voters, constituents, and everyday people to ensure we only elect leaders
with the moral clarity to understand that. And as a broader movement for
freedom, justice, and liberation, we can never forget that all of our
struggles are interconnected, and each of us has a duty to do more than
just vote, but to act, resist, organize, and build the just future we’re
fighting for.

The future of Palestinian freedom, self-determination, and statehood is
not one led by Donald Trump, Benjamin Netanyahu, or Tony Blair — it is one
led for and by the Palestinian people, who deserve to have their homes,
communities, cities, and nation rebuilt without condition and their
liberation finally delivered.

— Team Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251007-37084-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37084_1203867_coo3A1&akid=37084%2E1203867%2Ecoo3A1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37084%2E1203867%2Ecoo3A1

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

And as a broader movement for freedom, justice, and liberation, we can never forget that all of our struggles are interconnected, and each of us has a duty to do more than just vote, but to act, resist, organize, and build the just future we’re fighting for. The future of Palestinian freedom, self-determination, and statehood is not one led by Donald Trump, Benjamin Netanyahu, or Tony Blair — it is one led for and by the Palestinian people, who deserve to have their homes, communities, cities, and nation rebuilt without condition and their liberation finally delivered. — Team Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: The truth about last night’s numbers…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
If anything, I’m more determined than ever to bounce back, stronger, faster, and louder than the Left could ever imagine. |
---
Peter,

I want to speak to you directly this morning — not as “Team Beth,” not as some polished campaign update — but as Beth.

We closed the books on our end-of-quarter deadline. I’ll be honest: we came up short of what my finance team expected.

That stings. Because I know how much was riding on those numbers. Reporters, party insiders, and, yes, even my opponents will dissect our report when it comes out — line by line — and look for weaknesses.

And to make matters worse, **we’re now on day 7 of the Democrat shutdown** — all because the Left is demanding billions in taxpayer dollars to fund **free healthcare for illegal immigrants** in places like **California, Illinois, and New York** while hardworking Texans are left waiting for answers.

You can bet they’ll use this shutdown to score political points — but here in Texas, we’re focused on getting Washington working again for the people who actually pay the bills.

But here’s the truth: campaigns aren’t won or lost in one deadline. [**They’re won by how we _respond_.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=70de84489a4843089b439c9eb9d4aaab&_e=iJwZjK8khuvxSojs9e4i-737pWaemTUjjgDwJtXn-FVd8Zf5BK1J2zgzBH7xuY-KaveD8rLb57suaWoCiWPnfnFQXadV-5RuSn20aL3fWgSUCqxf6KJyP5hrlxm0QWbHhdd-pi9fQz-87LMxt3IZccLWIhfu2QXUbdxTdTxk8HXavD3owFsESjZsHXbQl2ouf9QY16_sJI8gsnks7pi-TzIkM5ptp8TCi7NNeSbLIdgAPY21MNzSpX42N5P-f0w91ysl1bK1LjUn3CI-SOT9IbHx11HNJpJQ_tG-fOQ_nr7Un2sqbJW3DDyMRQ01IykqMvAYctEjDImfNoPKnur_OR14GFNJ_eaVcG5KQQIpH7krI7eucfQ4P9UGFMiiHvaQ-o2Y9F39irT_BFtJySqsLVDbGPGoGG0EJAIQAQX4hio1O7KhFZ-CMAIvjPSefc_YRa65Qj5zVA2YhqoUjsezsWMzBVLFaGEL4scMZcgtCWxDeET4uCHeswcYtUHbSxhXeOWUiYX5Ju0nsZ-VNHN1jkPLoZjjegVGTLb0LxksCi4KEMEfPn-1c6jjEXtisgDxRn03hkdg4EOFPKibufJGzkenfsxKWmgAUiUVygFZHrFqtCQznjByTGPkQFROkEVtflYzXQMO1VmVwdEJNBI9JVLnfm_ipJHMGmHG6P6_qJzZXyy974YnC8Asyq332jUVfO1stzccvfrUIhe8CfyFCv_QbNqadRsWBcESz3XcRV78t2NFfjfRuuQecX7eL2bizb5bkZhXVDOmkV5KdNW-Ew%3D%3D)

Here’s what I can say, Peter: I’m not discouraged, and I’m certainly not backing down. **If anything, I’m more determined than ever to bounce back, stronger, faster, and louder than the Left could ever imagine.**

[**I need your help to make that happen. If we can show a surge today — the very first day of this new quarter — it sends an unmistakable message that our campaign — this district — is still unshakable.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=70de84489a4843089b439c9eb9d4aaab&_e=iJwZjK8khuvxSojs9e4i-737pWaemTUjjgDwJtXn-FVd8Zf5BK1J2zgzBH7xuY-KaveD8rLb57suaWoCiWPnfnFQXadV-5RuSn20aL3fWgSUCqxf6KJyP5hrlxm0QWbHhdd-pi9fQz-87LMxt3IZccLWIhfu2QXUbdxTdTxk8HXavD3owFsESjZsHXbQl2ouf9QY16_sJI8gsnks7pi-TzIkM5ptp8TCi7NNeSbLIdgAPY21MNzSpX42N5P-f0w91ysl1bK1LjUn3CI-SOT9IUMWQ19gWCTx3San5gyLJo39T7KTtwA5so1G__Q-Y6y5pE4MqsyoTusoVHX2AiOBsT4SQGuDqLQkltRMNiKdxAJZ3s53aNwiZENiKgd2R1qTMRGTFXyOkmYhPDdmU7ACRvGsoCDN1CpHXom_66GiKjwgjszfCjidbHT7jxlzDt1WYmg_jrFV3Mqy8ojQun0CnBaJAW0QyQG6_Mo25rLnmbyZ_Ds1g84ZDU9c0o5awbGlDILzdcutqm-rx_js0qgGn51_avj3dYogrf2FUQ3xe-HqLgi1uEIswQodO64vHVAAeUmeQHm4pqUnX9VS8fUMwRh7xCTAnUkcKUblvnjlTIOU8c_oSTdH6yZKvY-fI3-bXuX7514pG6KTcOdQPeyLvrDKGPCBv3K4NmXJny860_7iaxcpkljDMEHx66PlQmmMhdTkHKM7p9iozNZY34SMgEZT-Qb1n5GY2uSxrpIRAHwIyMiqlrBVb0-o3KDv9bHSRaWS_CNXsAo1SmhYggEVCA%3D%3D)

The Left would love to say this campaign is slipping. The same Democrats who caused this shutdown want to paint Republicans as the problem — but we’re the only ones standing up for taxpayers and border security. Let’s prove them wrong.

Thank you,

Beth

Peter,
We have some unfinished business to attend to — and as you know, I’m not going to quit on a job before it’s done.
We can be damn proud of the progress we’ve made to build the good life. We’ve got more kids in Pre-K and fewer in poverty, helped ensure families have dignified care for their loved ones, strengthened our roads and bridges, and provided more jobs with better pay and the strongest labor protections in the country — delivering real results that improve lives.
**We’ve built one of the friendliest places to start or grow a business, one of the free-est states to live your life however you choose, and the best place to raise a child in the whole country.**
But the next chapter of the story still remains to be written. And the truth is Donald Trump and his fellow MAGA extremists would love nothing more than to tear apart what we’ve built.
I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect you from Trump’s corruption and cruelty. And I’ll continue working to deliver security, opportunity, and freedom to everyone. But I can’t do it alone.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 10/7/2025
body:
“This is too important to improvise”: D49 superintendent says sports lawsuit seeks clarity
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Today marks two years since the horrific October 7th terrorist attacks in Israel—a day that shook the world and left lasting scars. To honor the victims, the missing, and all impacted by recent acts of violence—including the targeted attack on Charlie Kirk—the Colorado Springs community is coming together for “Remembering October 7th,” a **candlelight vigil at Acacia Park tonight at 6pm**. Hosted by First Amendment Media, the event will feature readings, reflections, and remarks from local leaders, faith voices, and elected officials, united in courage, compassion, and resolve against terrorism in all its forms. [Click here for more information.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** District 49 Superintendent Peter Hilts is [defending the district’s gender-based sports lawsuit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as a matter of fairness and clarity—not politics. The state’s $110 million bingo and raffle industry faces [IRS scrutiny amid accusations of misreported revenues](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Denver voters are attempting to [overturn the city’s flavored nicotine ban](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a “Mile High Rebellion” against government overreach. A Wheat Ridge brewery was [vandalized after hosting a conservative event](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and nine GOP gubernatorial hopefuls [sparred over Colorado’s $1 billion deficit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and Medicaid reform. Meanwhile, the Supreme Court will hear Chiles v. Salazar, a Colorado case challenging the [state’s conversion therapy ban](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with critics calling it an attack on free speech and gay identity.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** A watchdog report found ABC News [inflated “maternity care desert” data](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to back Democrat efforts to expand Medicaid, drawing accusations of media manipulation. At the same time, the Supreme Court is diving into [major culture-war cases](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on LGBT rights, guns, and race—including Colorado’s conversion therapy ban, which could set a national precedent for free speech and counseling rights.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Cory Gaines urges parents to [stay vigilant about what their kids read](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), following a Supreme Court ruling that empowers families to opt out of materials conflicting with their values. Brian Joondeph tracks Democrats’ flip from [border enforcement to benefit expansion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), calling it political opportunism. And Mike O'Donnell breaks down the FBI's crime data to show how progressive leniency has turned Colorado into a [haven for criminals as crime rates soar](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, October 7, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[“This is too important to improvise”: D49 superintendent says sports lawsuit seeks clarity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado Springs’ School District 49 made headlines in May when it filed a federal lawsuit challenging the state’s anti-discrimination law and CHSAA’s transgender athlete policy.
“We wanted to get in front of the coming legal conflict,” he explained in an interview with RMV. “We think this is too important to improvise.”
The district’s enacted policy separates sports, locker rooms and team travel by biological sex—a direct clash with the Colorado Anti-Discrimination Act (CADA) and Colorado High School Activities Association (CHSAA) bylaws that require access based on gender identity.
Hilts said the lawsuit isn’t about defying those authorities—it’s about resolving the contradiction. “It’s said, ‘the best way to determine the future is to help make it.’”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado: Where Criminals Come to Stay and Play](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* FBI data shows that while violent and property crimes have fallen nationally since 2001, Colorado’s violent crime rate has surged 52%, making it the sixth worst state in the nation.
* Property crime in Colorado remains well above the national average, ranking third worst in the U.S., even after a 26% decline since 2001.
* The author blames decades of Democratic leadership for turning Colorado from a safe state into one where “criminals come to stay and play,” warning it’s no longer ideal for raising families.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Supreme Court case claims Colorado’s conversion therapy ban erases gay identity, silences counselors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Supreme Court will hear Chiles v. Salazar, a challenge to Colorado’s ban on “conversion therapy,” which counselor Kaley Chiles argues violates her free-speech rights by forbidding talk therapy that helps minors accept their biological sex.
* Unlikely allies such as the Women’s Liberation Front (WoLF) and Our Duty-USA, representing detransitioners, back Chiles—warning that bans on exploratory counseling risk “trans-ing away the gay” by pushing same-sex-attracted youth toward medical transition instead of acceptance.
* The case exposes a widening split within the LGBT movement, as critics argue Colorado’s law wrongly equates sexuality and gender identity, erasing the hard-won recognition that homosexuality is innate and not a disorder.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The Sword of the Spirit – Transformative Power](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 5** _When I was younger, I was fascinated with Disneyland in Anaheim, California. My dad had worked there, and my mom had books on Walt Disney—how he dreamed up new worlds, turned them into concepts, and then made them a reality. We’d watch shows about the planning, the struggles, and the breakthroughs. Then we’d stand in the park itself, surrounded by castles, rides, and lands that once existed only in his imagination._ ****
**[TABOR Didn’t Build the Potholes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | OCTOBER 3** _Colorado’s roads crumble, our classrooms overflow, and every budget cycle we hear the same refrain: “It’s TABOR’s fault.” Critics of the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights insist that this constitutional guardrail has starved government of the resources it needs to educate children, maintain infrastructure, and keep the state running. But what if the potholes and crowded classrooms aren’t a symptom of too little revenue, but of misplaced priorities?_
__

**[Morgan County GOP Hosts Annual Candidate Night with Strong Call for Youth Involvement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | LOCAL | OCTOBER 2** _Morgan County Republicans gathered on Monday, September 29, for their Annual Candidate Night, drawing a strong crowd for candidate introductions, a ballot review, and a legislative update. Alongside the focus on local races, several speakers emphasized the urgent need for younger generations to engage in politics and leadership._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**🧠 DID YOU KNOW?** **Your brain’s connections shrink while you sleep.** It’s true—your brain actually “resets” overnight. Researchers at the University of Wisconsin-Madison’s Sleep and Consciousness Institute found that synapses in the brain shrink by about 18% during sleep. This isn’t bad news, though—it’s how your brain clears clutter, strengthens memory, and boosts learning for the next day.
|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|

And experts at the Cook Political Report have officially named this race a "Toss-Up." | | | | Peter, Today is the day: Election Day in Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District. ✔️ Polls are open now. Find your polling place, bring an ID, and make your voice heard.
✔️ Stay in line. If you’re in line when polls close, you still have the right to vote.
✔️ Remind a friend. Call or text three people you know in TN-7. Turnout is everything. After you vote, we still need your help. Our team is making calls, running rides to the polls, and sending texts until the last ballot is cast. That final push costs money, and every single dollar makes a difference. But we still need your help to keep this campaign in motion.
[**Can you give $10, $25, or whatever you can today to fuel Team Dixie through the finish line?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/dB3lQ4x-rjWFAMSWQTcb2A~~/AAUS1hA~/9Gbr5c9pfN3QCfFkq823oRmTaZdjxYDexh-PuHjsAeRGqJ3Pmr5MKWV2KVyJO0KmqyQCRHMv5hv2iceVlHSqtit97m2ZnCX3ub3bB9IIHO8q-h0D6TsvZlIWAftQYAsuFtlCzHoUBwQroxSNMf3QoeI6X31RK1UpBbnNUNbuTl8~) **[**FUEL THE TEAM »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/dB3lQ4x-rjWFAMSWQTcb2A~~/AAUS1hA~/9Gbr5c9pfN3QCfFkq823oRmTaZdjxYDexh-PuHjsAeRGqJ3Pmr5MKWV2KVyJO0KmqyQCRHMv5hv2iceVlHSqtit97m2ZnCX3ub3bB9IIHO8q-h0D6TsvZlIWAftQYAsuFtlCzHoUBwQroxSNMf3QoeI6X31RK1UpBbnNUNbuTl8~) ** This is it. Every vote matters. Every dollar matters. Let’s win this together. -Team Dixie

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: $170 billion to abduct our friends and neighbors — but not for healthcare, education, or housing
body:
Our work for justice is led by immigrant youth and powered by this community. | | | Peter, **** Whether you're an immigrant or born in the U.S., if you're a working person, you power this country. **Our tax dollars should go to healthcare, education, and housing — not making all of us and our communities unsafe.** But Congress has approved _$170 billion_ of OUR money to abduct more of our loved ones, friends, and neighbors. Now more than ever, it is crucial to remember that our resistance is rooted in our power as working people. __We’ve witnessed that collective power nationwide:__ Neighbors are coming together to protect each other and kick hate out of their communities. Students are rallying for justice on behalf of their kidnapped classmates. Everyday people are doing their part to inform their communities or support our cause. **No matter the efforts to crush us, we’re not going anywhere. Our work for justice is led by immigrant youth and powered by this community, so we’re asking you:** __[**Will you rush a contribution to United We Dream today? clean_body: Our work for justice is led by immigrant youth and powered by this community. | | | Peter, ** Whether you're an immigrant or born in the U.S., if you're a working person, you power this country. Our tax dollars should go to healthcare, education, and housing — not making all of us and our communities unsafe. But Congress has approved $170 billion of OUR money to abduct more of our loved ones, friends, and neighbors. Now more than ever, it is crucial to remember that our resistance is rooted in our power as working people. We’ve witnessed that collective power nationwide: Neighbors are coming together to protect each other and kick hate out of their communities. Students are rallying for justice on behalf of their kidnapped classmates. Everyday people are doing their part to inform their communities or support our cause. No matter the efforts to crush us, we’re not going anywhere. Our work for justice is led by immigrant youth and powered by this community, so we’re asking you: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Team Ossoff
subject: The most vulnerable Senator running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

_**FIRST:**_ Independent analysts at Cook Political Report called the Georgia Senate race a “TOSS-UP” and said Jon was the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection.
_**THEN:**_ GOP-aligned Super PACs poured MILLIONS into television and digital ads attacking Jon. And just recently, an anti-abortion group announced they plan to spend almost $5 million in Georgia alone.
_**NOW:**_ The latest polling shows Jon Ossoff statistically TIED with one of his GOP opponents. **_Can you make a donation to his campaign today to help fight back?**_
[**Use this link to give $5 – or any amount — to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251007-1-subs-ng&t=1&akid=887%2E5691347%2E86tYIx)

subject: Yes, even $1 makes a difference 💵

body:
We don’t rely on right-wing billionaires or dark money groups.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251007-670&t=1&akid=670%2E294397%2EItGYbL)
Folks,
What if we told you that _four quarters_ could take on the tens of millions of dollars from right-wing special interests trying to buy a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court?
**It’s true.** Here’s why:
We don’t rely on right-wing billionaires or dark money groups.
Our campaign is powered by a grassroots team of thousands of supporters — people like you, pitching in what they can, whenever they can.
When you chip in $1, another person gives $1, then another, and so on. **Together, those small contributions build into a force powerful enough to beat back the far-right’s millions.**
That’s how we win — one person, one donation at a time.
[**Today, we’re hoping you’ll step up. If you believe in a fair, independent court that stands up for our rights and freedoms, chip in $1 to support Judge Chris Taylor:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251007_1_ak?amount=1&refcode=em20251007-670&refcode2=670_294397_ItGYbL&akid=670%2E294397%2EItGYbL)

Thank you,
Team Taylor

name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: Why Speaker Johnson is blocking me from serving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116805189/574490104/1112643886?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTllMGRjYy1iNmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bnz5fpOY8FZKFuobhLqcza1OUWrdDTIClhRuDMQQd4c=) Hi Peter, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank Rep. Yassamin Ansari for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson canceled the session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. [Peter, will you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can today between my campaign and Yassamin’s to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116805193/574490107/1112643886?amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTllMGRjYy1iNmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bnz5fpOY8FZKFuobhLqcza1OUWrdDTIClhRuDMQQd4c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Yassamin Ansari and Adelita Grijalva will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116805196/574490112/1112643886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTllMGRjYy1iNmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bnz5fpOY8FZKFuobhLqcza1OUWrdDTIClhRuDMQQd4c=)

name: Jason Crow
subject: This is about us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend,

It is an honor to represent and work for Coloradans in Congress. But in all honesty, running for Congress was never about me. It was about us.

As a community, we were tired of partisan politics. For nearly a decade, the GOP incumbent in Colorado’s 6th District was too busy raking in thousands from the NRA and supporting Donald Trump’s far-right agenda to care about the issues impacting Coloradans most.

We needed real representation.

We deserved a new generation of leadership in Congress.

So together, we did the unthinkable. Voters in CO-06 flipped the district blue and elected a Democratic representative for the first time in history.

That’s no small feat — and it certainly couldn’t have been done by just one person. It took all of us, knocking on thousands of doors, putting up hundreds of yard signs, and chipping in a few dollars at a time to emails like this one, that made the difference.

I’m writing all of this because now, more than ever, Americans are ready for a new generation of Democratic leaders who will stand up to wannabe dictators like Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress who prioritize profits over people.

I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so our campaign is counting on your support to get ahead.

Will you make a contribution today to help us strengthen our foundation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25?amount=10&express_lane=true]

Thank you,

Jason

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

FIGHT BACK >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251007em-bnor-rs]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read.
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections and privacy.
Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 within the next 72 hours to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power.
Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251007em-bnor-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251007em-bnor-rs]
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it.

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: The genocide in Gaza must end now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITgyNKDGOHiZPqju7E1X1oGmBbjn87WFdD6CLdjj7gSXW7nHV-PB2NilphJyASYrR8QC4LMvbDzTlmYDs_r742dv81FA32c_zEF-hemPQFtYppyfY3wVrbLlyAgHXe7_sKbYN67Zb1ZaNdJXz5XmLJcdzNC2jr0EF-3MpwCtyvVN9shYOT6rTNB39K-qB1L14r/4kj/JGgJrgjiRK-ZM0bT-IB-JA/h0/h001.bkOH00u0zWvKkrpsLlNXte1QL6c7GUQn0l09F388uwQ)
---
Peter,
As we enter the third year of the Gaza genocide, the situation remains bleak. Trump has announced a "deal" that no Palestinian was involved in developing; it should be treated with the strict scrutiny it deserves. An end to the hostilities would certainly be welcomed, if it comes. Of course we remember the attack on October 7th that took so many innocent lives, and we pray for the immediate return of all remaining hostages - both those in custody of Hamas and those being held in Israeli prisons. But no matter how strongly we grieve for October 7th, no one in their right mind could look at the starvation, indiscriminate killings, sniping of children, targeting of aid workers, leveling of neighborhoods, and the bombing of schools and hospitals, attacks on the press covering it all - and call it justice. Especially not when we know that the attacks on the people of Gaza did not begin on that day. The situation in Gaza today is beyond grim. As the man-made famine drags on, the death toll will continue climbing even if military action ends tomorrow. And with thousands buried under rubble, it's likely we'll never know the true toll of this genocide. As a father myself, it's hard for me to understand how any parent could co-sign the types of crimes we're seeing carried out in Gaza. These aren't typical military actions. It's a war on children, with children estimated to make up more than 40% of the dead. Brazilian activist Thiago Ávila, who was sailing with the Flotilla carrying relief to Gaza before being intercepted by Israel, made a moving video for the children of Gaza, which you can watch [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.IrwCNRMzSkXvFsTjBP9k2BIxQJNhuTZ5pysmC7PdQr2rROLae0AC7Xy4uPDURhaB0z7o08cusRGuQ5PXipWdqV_oh-z3kVoKSnVlBOgoZvNKQ5w4w_UPVm79GWtVzQqBq89ejlvtGsle8dqxkURG7wL72gYeoqi2aPEj9keK610EfYiWiZn5ti9FbtutAxImO0-3LGjWKM9754yY1ZvFZitvQLYafIHbhIkf4qqXQXTJ-ntVjnIl8riVKYg45_ErAG2tZMJKC97dP2lPp9E92g/4kj/JGgJrgjiRK-ZM0bT-IB-JA/h1/h001.CDS3bQMGPnelKJEh_4gvlJ3PYom4ukpPcN3IIP8Ljbw). In it, he describes the Flotilla's repeated attempts to bring food and medicine to the children over the shocking video clips many of us have seen before - so many displaced and harmed children crying, begging for food, wounded, or carrying heavy burdens. I'm a stay-at-home dad. My kids are my life. Thirteen years ago this month, I lost my baby girl Addison when my wife Amber experienced pregnancy complications. An emergency abortion saved Amber's life, and saying goodbye to my daughter is something that is burned into my memory to this day. That gives me a fraction of an insight into what the parents of Gaza must be feeling. I can't imagine how they've carried that pain for two long years. How much longer will we allow this to continue? In Gaza, parents lose children each and every day. And many children lose their entire families. So many that they had to create a new acronym: WCNSF Wounded child, no surviving family. Think about that. I see my own children's faces in the faces of Gaza's children. Because all the world's children belong to us. What angers me beyond words is knowing that when this genocide began, Trump was not in the White House. Democrats held power. Biden could have ended these atrocities within a week, and chose not to - Israel is dependent on American money and weapons to persecute these war crimes. This has been a bipartisan failure. And my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, is no exception. Marie is funded by AIPAC, a right wing lobbying group fully aligned with Netanyahu's corrupt government. She's voted for every weapons package and refused to condemn the growing death toll, the targeting of children, healthcare workers, aid workers, and journalists. She even voted to censure Rep. Rashida Tlaib, her only Palestinian-American colleague in the House. And she still refuses to acknowledge the obvious truth: This is a genocide. Israel is responsible. And our government is complicit. At a time where boldness is called for, Marie is meek. At a time where clarity is called for, she is opaque. **Any politician who cannot speak the truth about Israel's genocide in Gaza and our complicity in it cannot be trusted to tell the truth about anything else.** [**This moment calls for a representative who will bring moral clarity to D.C. and speak boldly in critical moments. Your contribution of $5, $10, $25 or anything you can give will help me unseat Marie**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAs0o7ZqDqB7jYV5aeFZDc6rkuqm9NqtLPkmb-_AkSLo3yyGFX3vG29qZIEVvEPX_fkTl1Zuj2uczY6MWzh1gvDlqrGQXeoawm0P20X6PIUu08blg43le5c_SRN-b90O5zB1-lM86NXdpj-YjzlY9DNuTWBmGCEkXViOhoaVcwWt4ZNXzVO2MVeCtWSh_swK4Ns5NkSvLhVfRm2RT3FKS9KBlLyZrq947ES6qliZWPmOTu4nLoSDjrfa1wLg1qLeOQNO4uMBF3t_yqC8VNd1S6f/4kj/JGgJrgjiRK-ZM0bT-IB-JA/h2/h001.5GmdjCvsh49dYtMKqzsTbcjgjvMxd2DcHwyNZdOz354). I've seen enough videos of injured, starving, displaced children for one lifetime. Leaders who can't be bothered to denounce these crimes - or can't be bothered to do what they can to stop them - don't have a place in Washington DC anymore. Let's send them home. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich
---

clean_body: | | Peter, As we enter the third year of the Gaza genocide, the situation remains bleak. Trump has announced a "deal" that no Palestinian was involved in developing; it should be treated with the strict scrutiny it deserves. An end to the hostilities would certainly be welcomed, if it comes. Of course we remember the attack on October 7th that took so many innocent lives, and we pray for the immediate return of all remaining hostages - both those in custody of Hamas and those being held in Israeli prisons. But no matter how strongly we grieve for October 7th, no one in their right mind could look at the starvation, indiscriminate killings, sniping of children, targeting of aid workers, leveling of neighborhoods, and the bombing of schools and hospitals, attacks on the press covering it all - and call it justice. Especially not when we know that the attacks on the people of Gaza did not begin on that day. The situation in Gaza today is beyond grim. As the man-made famine drags on, the death toll will continue climbing even if military action ends tomorrow. And with thousands buried under rubble, it's likely we'll never know the true toll of this genocide. As a father myself, it's hard for me to understand how any parent could co-sign the types of crimes we're seeing carried out in Gaza. These aren't typical military actions. name: Mark Harris
subject: Two Years Later: We Will Never Forget
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/two-years-later-we-will-never-forget?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=8d9c8f439c&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,** Today marks two years since the horrific October 7th terrorist attack on Israel by Hamas. It was an unthinkable assault that took the lives of more than a thousand innocent men, women, and children, and left countless others grieving and displaced. **Recently, I had the honor of visiting Israel and witnessing firsthand the destruction Hamas left behind. I met with survivors, the families of those still held hostage, and IDF soldiers who remain vigilant every single day. Their courage and resilience are nothing short of inspiring.** As Americans, we must remain steadfast in our support for Israel’s right to exist and defend itself against terrorism. Israel’s fight against Hamas is not only about its own survival, it is a fight for freedom, for the security of our allies, and for the values we hold dear as a nation under God. The people of Israel, and Jewish communities here in America and around the world, deserve to know that the United States stands firmly with them. We will continue to pray for peace, justice, and the safe return of every hostage still held by Hamas. Now more than ever, we must stand together - in faith, in freedom, and in truth.
---
| [DONATE HERE!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=9156dfb4e2&e=4024c5123e "DONATE HERE!")
---
|
Standing with Israel,

Mark Harris

******** Peter,

This is Congressman Derrick Van Orden, and I need your attention immediately.

Georgia is **Ground Zero** in the fight to **KEEP** the Senate **RED**.

Because we've seen what happens when Democrats are in charge:

🛑 The border is thrown wide open. 🛑 Crime surges in our neighborhoods. 🛑 Inflation crushes working families. 🛑 And now Schumer is plotting to claw back just **FOUR** seats to seize the Senate and bring it all back.

If he succeeds, Schumer will **pack the Supreme Court** , **kill the filibuster** , and **ram through his Radical Left agenda**.

Janelle Stelson here. I need to make one thing clear right now: **Scott Perry does NOT care about Pennsylvania.** That is why, as prices of everything continue to go up and people struggle to make ends meet, he claims stopping healthcare costs from rising for Central Pennsylvanians is “a colossal mistake.” His plan could force Pennsylvanians to pay up to 300% more on their premium. Thousands could be priced out of their health care plans if he does not extend critical ACA tax credits. Allowing them to expire would be disastrous and life-threatening for many. It's absolutely unacceptable. **_The only "colossal mistake" is that Scott Perry continues to represent us._** **There is a reason he is ranked the most vulnerable Republican in Pennsylvania.** He is refusing to do his job and reach across the aisle to secure healthcare costs, and it's hurting the people of Pennsylvania. **[If you've been on the fence about Scott Perry's leadership in any capacity, let this latest action be seen clearly for what it is: a direct attack on the people of Pennsylvania. clean_body: Perry is refusing to do his job. Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Janelle Stelson here. I need to make one thing clear right now: Scott Perry does NOT care about Pennsylvania. That is why, as prices of everything continue to go up and people struggle to make ends meet, he claims stopping healthcare costs from rising for Central Pennsylvanians is “a colossal mistake.” His plan could force Pennsylvanians to pay up to 300% more on their premium. Thousands could be priced out of their health care plans if he does not extend critical ACA tax credits. Allowing them to expire would be disastrous and life-threatening for many. It's absolutely unacceptable. The only "colossal mistake" is that Scott Perry continues to represent us. There is a reason he is ranked the most vulnerable Republican in Pennsylvania. He is refusing to do his job and reach across the aisle to secure healthcare costs, and it's hurting the people of Pennsylvania. = | | = With you 100%, now and always. Janelle | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson is someone we can trust. She has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for over three decades as an Emmy Award-winning journalist. Now, she is taking on MAGA extremist Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — standing up for abortion rights, investing in high-quality healthcare and education, and bringing good-paying jobs to the district. =** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. name: Catastrophic
subject: PA Dems ambushed - their collapse could be end of Dem party
body:
Democrats have been caught completely off guard in the most important election of 2025 and are being outspent 10-1. We are now on track for a catastrophic defeat.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tSRelxj-G_1xWEF0dVsEH6ovyXk3cgwuvkiQt1bqNrMWoFTRKoXRJOr4lCKge48qAzRXf-M4xDMFCNubWTXAub7ev4jj2FPCvkOy5W7ujpld2ek8SsS_fb6Ko-l6EuSL30ZsP9nFw3-HhtUKIaXQric_-p_NoaLkNUTVOe6VSRqPWP_U5beE_GmF7Y4ptyoGzoFs5EWZh_I6BGzJp3TS1ejIwfMNRTgP8dIB2AMJDBM=&c=9i1VsAk2cwjDv6w5b34EyBF0_wcpOQFhg1SvqcuC2-0yZmQz53MMGg==&ch=QHDqDbaTcicVZPBGdjMXQu85n0GeKjFW_1Tw3gAY5jSZNP5NjyCujw==)

| Friend,
The disaster we've been warning about for months is materializing before our eyes.
The National Republican Party has caught Democrats completely off guard and has launched a daring lightning blitz in an obscure but critically important judicial election in Pennsylvania that we thought we had in the bag.
The race is the November 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election and if Democrats lose here we will never win Pennsylvania in an election again, not in 2026 and not in 2028 - 19 electoral college votes squandered.
These judicial races typically garner zero attention and are often ignored by the national parties but with the courts being one of the only things standing in the way of Trump's agenda we knew this year it would be different...
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tSRelxj-G_1xWEF0dVsEH6ovyXk3cgwuvkiQt1bqNrMWoFTRKoXRJOr4lCKge48qAzRXf-M4xDMFCNubWTXAub7ev4jj2FPCvkOy5W7ujpld2ek8SsS_fb6Ko-l6EuSL30ZsP9nFw3-HhtUKIaXQric_-p_NoaLkNUTVOe6VSRqPWP_U5beE_GmF7Y4ptyoGzoFs5EWZh_I6BGzJp3TS1ejIwfMNRTgPPm3B5zgchbw=&c=9i1VsAk2cwjDv6w5b34EyBF0_wcpOQFhg1SvqcuC2-0yZmQz53MMGg==&ch=QHDqDbaTcicVZPBGdjMXQu85n0GeKjFW_1Tw3gAY5jSZNP5NjyCujw==)

| For months we rang the alarm that MAGA was going all out to win this race but no one listened. Now the GOP has broken through and is making this the most expensive Supreme Court election in American history. Democrats have been caught completely off guard and are being outspent 10-1. We are now on track for a catastrophic defeat.
This was nothing short of an ambush, and Defend our Court, one of the only Democratic orgs holding the line, is scrambling to contain the GOP's breakthrough.
To plug the gaps in our lines we've spent nearly our entire field budget, which was supposed to last until November, to hire hundreds of new rapid response canvassers. Now we only have enough money to keep them knocking on doors until this Sunday.
The best way to help us ensure we have the budget to keep our organizers in the field is with a weekly donation for the few remaining weeks until our November 4th election.
If even just 1% of the 500,000 Dems on our email list made a weekly $25 donation until our November 4th election day that would add up to a whopping $750,000 dollars and allow us to hire enough canvassers to salvage this race. clean_body: Democrats have been caught completely off guard in the most important election of 2025 and are being outspent 10-1. We are now on track for a catastrophic defeat. | | | | | == | Peter, The disaster we've been warning about for months is materializing before our eyes. The National Republican Party has caught Democrats completely off guard and has launched a daring lightning blitz in an obscure but critically important judicial election in Pennsylvania that we thought we had in the bag. The race is the November 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election and if Democrats lose here we will never win Pennsylvania in an election again, not in 2026 and not in 2028 \- 19 electoral college votes squandered. These judicial races typically garner zero attention and are often ignored by the national parties but with the courts being one of the only things standing in the way of Trump's agenda we knew this year it would be different... | | == | | | | For months we rang the alarm that MAGA was going all out to win this race but no one listened. Now the GOP has broken through and is making this the most expensive Supreme Court election in American history. Democrats have been caught completely off guard and are being outspent 10-1. We are now on track for a catastrophic defeat. This was nothing short of an ambush, and Defend our Court, one of the only Democratic orgs holding the line, is scrambling to contain the GOP's breakthrough. To plug the gaps in our lines we've spent nearly our entire field budget, which was supposed to last until November, to hire hundreds of new rapid response canvassers. Now we only have enough money to keep them knocking on doors until this Sunday. The best way to help us ensure we have the budget to keep our organizers in the field is with a weekly donation for the 4 remaining weeks until our November 4th election. If even just 1% of the 500,000 Dems on our email list made a weekly $25 donation until our November 4th election day that would add up to a whopping $750,000 dollars and allow us to hire enough canvassers to salvage this race. == | | | | | == | | == | | == | | | | We will never forget those who came to Pennsylvania's aid during this moment of crisis. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Brad Schneider
subject: We must decide how we move forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
A personal message from Brad Schneider

| Hi team, it’s Brad Schneider, Chair of the New Dems.

It’s been one week since President Trump and Congressional Republicans shut down the government rather than sit down and work with Democrats.

**I want to be very clear: Republicans hold the White House, the House, and the Senate. They have full control in Washington, and they own this shutdown.**

At the risk of repeating myself, this is happening because Trump and Congressional Republicans are unwilling to work with Democrats on a solution to keep the government funded and protect healthcare for millions of Americans.

Not that we needed it, but this shutdown is further proof that Trump and MAGA Republicans will do anything to cling to power, _no matter how reckless or harmful it is for American families._

New Dems and House Democrats are fighting against Trump and House Republican’s cruel cuts to the funding that millions of Americans rely on. **We believe the path forward is simple and clear: a bipartisan budget that lowers costs and protects healthcare.**

We’ll work with anyone, Democrat or Republican, to achieve this, _but we will never compromise when it comes to fighting for working families._

Thank you for being a part of the New Dem team, and for supporting our work to elect a New Dem majority committed to lowering costs, safeguarding healthcare, and delivering real solutions for the American people.

Together, we can do this.

Brad Schneider

_New Dems Chair_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116806628/574494760/-174747403?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20251007_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmM5YTI5YS1iOWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r5KGs36CH1SMnLxNA3y74Cdbk1HnAQG2GUDYhbmLj_s=)** | **[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116806629/574494761/-174747403?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20251007_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmM5YTI5YS1iOWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r5KGs36CH1SMnLxNA3y74Cdbk1HnAQG2GUDYhbmLj_s=)**
