clean_body: A personal message from Brad Schneider | Hi team, it’s Brad Schneider, Chair of the New Dems. It’s been one week since President Trump and Congressional Republicans shut down the government rather than sit down and work with Democrats. I want to be very clear: Republicans hold the White House, the House, and the Senate. They have full control in Washington, and they own this shutdown. At the risk of repeating myself, this is happening because Trump and Congressional Republicans are unwilling to work with Democrats on a solution to keep the government funded and protect healthcare for millions of Americans. Not that we needed it, but this shutdown is further proof that Trump and MAGA Republicans will do anything to cling to power, no matter how reckless or harmful it is for American families. New Dems and House Democrats are fighting against Trump and House Republican’s cruel cuts to the funding that millions of Americans rely on. We believe the path forward is simple and clear: a bipartisan budget that lowers costs and protects healthcare. We’ll work with anyone, Democrat or Republican, to achieve this, but we will never compromise when it comes to fighting for working families. Thank you for being a part of the New Dem team, and for supporting our work to elect a New Dem majority committed to lowering costs, safeguarding healthcare, and delivering real solutions for the American people. Together, we can do this. Brad Schneider New Dems Chair = | = | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp) Team, it's with a heavy heart that we write to you this evening.

Donald Trump is threatening to CUT Social Security because of DOGE: | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=3&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp) | [**Shocking from _PBS:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=4&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)

[**" Social Security has existed for 90 years. It may be more threatened now than ever"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=5&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)
---|---
But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security from Trump and DOGE's tyranny came and went... **_[but we never saw your signature.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=6&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)_**

[**Too much is at stake for America 's seniors who have paid into Social Security their entire lives if the GOP slashes this crucial program, so we're reactivating our petition until the end of the day to give you a chance to sign it.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=7&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)

It will only be open for another 8 hours.
[**_Please do not squander this opportunity! Just sign your name:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=8&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)

_Fight for Reform_

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=11&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)
The MAGA billionaire's latest attack on Social Security is appalling.

And remember: Elon Musk's DOGE really cut Social Security, team!!

**[That's why Congress HAS to protect Social Security and safeguard it from MAGA Republican destruction!!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=12&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)**

[**Be one of the emergency 6O,OOO signatures we need today to demand Congress save Social Security ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69432?t=13&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)
[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=14&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)
---
Elon Musk said the social safety net that benefits 68 million Americans is a pyramid scheme and repeated claims that millions of dead Americans are receiving Social Security payouts.

Team, **WE KNOW** this is just not true!

**WE KNOW** that Social Security benefits are essential to Americans' livelihoods.

**WE KNOW** millions of folks would be living out on the streets without their Social Security.

**AND WE KNOW** that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and his fake DOGE agency are looking for **ANY** reason to gut and privatize Social Security.
[**Team, please sign your name to tell Congress to SAVE Social Security before it 's too late! Our petition requires 60,000 signatures by 11:59 PM ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=15&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)
[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69431?t=16&akid=23481%2E4449941%2EzaSxGp)

Thank you.

Fight for Reform

Friend, I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General.

But **nothing** prepared me for what **Jay Jones** said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages.

Jay Jones fantasized about **shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head,** choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. Then he called **Gilbert's young children "little fascists" who should be killed — in their weeping mother’s arms.**

This isn't politics. **This is the unhinged, sick fantasy of a dangerous person.**
---

_Every parent in Virginia should be horrified._ Jones dreams about executing his political opponents and having their children killed.

No decent human being fantasizes about shooting their colleagues and killing their children. **Jones is clearly disqualified — not just from being Attorney General, but from holding any office across Virginia or our country.**

This deranged individual cannot be trusted with a badge, let alone the power to prosecute Virginians.

**🚨[Help me expose Jay Jones and defend our families from his twisted, murderous fantasies.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0a6a98f679b3478eb4d54e417652187a&_e=GmSO5EVYYXnjNZdWkkCCsUK68gCJF1XHe4ZFmKUrPsDo5_x0--cjfVEDIbDQecObReZEgXV_DL1IDPuQBUTFZYRl76taLw5ricm-YkPJ2NYlZLtfeU6t5-mNNJx9zgigMk70PCEmUm04-szCJ9V8qiBr6zG3HmUP2Qf7rNbhWBJYI6G9lowQcDhjkiWX9UD8ygcu9RykPO6MxHNZ7G6t4VvysV-RXiI3lAowwQMf1Oy_pakxtJb4yzha6YIrhJzCUiesHAmLtU0PWZBlQFRPQZk8qRoEFyBddWtS_zmPNJEjBZzeuSiUVLoHvk9N0FgGMt4wJMQiSNtcQFh2qHYJhG7P8027Wj5SXjILUNc2JsJlarmfm3Fb0b46pRKIPMRIkXvPomxVPfqu3pUv7eHNcXKkmAQ8_K9kT46jlpzXSnIdiQEik4OUKtF0IYoJliTANWf29jxVL92CjnNvYHCn9D2RnN3hFj-jaj6EmYgAd0Y4UWdZeq4EgHNp0iBoENDnEkiP7v3a09H8I5jwg1MhAGD18dJuFzs3gsLy6zAZcaJIfZgxeMZejkRuwtHZkjo2NBW-qEJHQ9V8XRWu515NWik_vRrY3e1tpafbKVNJFcXvXFLwWE567YDmx_dNtN5gn51Dtt23Q-VLtb9bCy9K6wdThIVZ0MasWiLBvHxjRKa5VBO6hXRomH2pH13MadtMxTA298XSjmrlsn3TDDoMIkboW79TL3KvCTeKTlFk0tBZxiAPJbSw4_Q-cLhySaR9tt5lve-NvWT5lGXXpO3yL__y-qTiW2gtXTPjIDRHKoU%3D)**

clean_body: He wished death upon young children. This is truly sick. Urgent note from AG Jason Miyares—please read and help protect Virginia. | | | Friend, I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General. But nothing prepared me for what Jay Jones said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages. Jay Jones fantasized about shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head, choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. Then he called Gilbert's young children "little fascists" who should be killed — in their weeping mother’s arms. This isn't politics. This is the unhinged, sick fantasy of a dangerous person. Every parent in Virginia should be horrified. Jones dreams about executing his political opponents and having their children killed. No decent human being fantasizes about shooting their colleagues and killing their children. Jones is clearly disqualified — not just from being Attorney General, but from holding any office across Virginia or our country. This deranged individual cannot be trusted with a badge, let alone the power to prosecute Virginians. 🚨 — Attorney General Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Peter, How is it that Republicans can pass unpopular policies and seemingly redraw maps at the drop of a dime to skate accountability and unfairly hold on to power? What started in Texas after Trump ordered legislators to give him five more seats has created a ripple effect across the country in states like Indiana, Missouri, Ohio, Florida, and Kansas. Our democracy is being threatened by Republicans who have no concern for voters and are only focused on how they can rig the upcoming midterm elections. It’s high time we changed that. Democrats in Congress just reintroduced the Redistricting Reform Act — legislation that would require each state to have independent commissions draw maps. With this bill, mid-decade map redraws would essentially be banned, and every state would be held to the same standards to achieve fair maps. A.G. Eric Holder sums up the importance of this bill perfectly: **“The unprecedented and unpopular mid-decade power grabs in Texas and Missouri at the direction of Donald Trump underscore that the current system — a system protected by too many Republicans — does not work.** **An overwhelming majority of Americans oppose partisan gerrymandering** because it leaves all citizens worse off by sowing extreme division, undermining equal representation, and boosting the influence of powerful special interests. **We must pursue a bold, new vision for our country by building a system that gives power back to the people instead of compromised politicians.”** **The NDRC has always been committed to fighting for fair representation over the long haul — including by supporting federal solutions to root out gerrymandering and unfair redistricting. We’re also engaged in state-by-state fights when they emerge — and lately, it feels like map manipulation is spreading like wildfire.** [**Please make a donation to help us protect democracy in the short term ahead of the midterm elections, and fight for long-term solutions like the Redistricting Reform Act.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116806653/574494845/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RedistrictingReformAct_email_20251007-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReformAct_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251007-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReformAct_&utm_campaign=RedistrictingReformAct&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0N2YzM2JhLWI5YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4zgM0lVpGaEz2ePio0I6sLIqjTDdH3pLSiKueIS97M=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116806654/574494846/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RedistrictingReformAct_email_20251007-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReformAct_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251007-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingReformAct_&utm_campaign=RedistrictingReformAct&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0N2YzM2JhLWI5YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4zgM0lVpGaEz2ePio0I6sLIqjTDdH3pLSiKueIS97M=)

name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: 4 reasons for $4
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hey there, it’s the team at GIFFORDS. Today is Tuesday, October 7th, and we are exactly 4 weeks away from the fall 2025 elections.
**So we’re humbly asking:** [**Will you chip in $4 today to help GIFFORDS PAC reach undecided voters?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=1&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $4](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=2&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
| **[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=3&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
Here are 4 reasons why your donation today is so critical:
1. **This is our first major chance** to hold Donald Trump accountable. Millions of Americans will vote in critical elections—including the race for governorships in New Jersey and Virginia.

2. **Republicans are going all-in to defeat us.** The NRA has already endorsed candidates, and outside groups are trying to pummel our gun safety champions with last-minute attacks—right as people start voting.

3. **The attacks are working.** The polls in some of our top races are very close—which means even a few votes could decide the difference between winning and losing.

4. **We can’t win without you.** [**If everyone reading this chipped in $4**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=4&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I), we would have the resources to stand up against the GOP’s attacks and help our candidates win their races. But not everyone will, which is why we’re asking you personally:
[**Can we count on you to donate $4 or more to GIFFORDS PAC? Your support today could help us elect more gun safety leaders and save more lives from gun violence >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=5&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $4](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=6&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
| **[Donate $15](https://go.giffords.org/go/34420?c0=giffords-em-q42025.8SXUBe&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=7&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=8&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=9&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=10&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=11&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**

****
Thank you,
Team GIFFORDS
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251007-1-b&t=12&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I)**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=10943%2E3935704%2EGH1d3I) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Fellow American,

I’ll be straight with you: **we fell short of our Q3 FEC fundraising goal.**

We worked tirelessly through the summer, but the Democrats’ reckless shutdown created national chaos. Donations froze, uncertainty spread, and our campaign fell just short of where we needed to be on September 30th.

**[**Falling short once doesn’t mean we’re finished — it means we fight harder.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=19bf15002916489e8c2ff3bd1992994a&_e=LsPdJFV53ZKUsa7SUJvxSG_tXxbPZsDPfJFQCYrXPs8UI58mGxKW7ML-sTGOYmhrRNUt6VUk-ShCFBSwsGK1cAVNoHFNOCEKxOgcq8ohiJNcMFIZ8ELoERHnjU4TPHmKU-xKS0ZjMk64A1PGj4bks8Z-hVZW_93XUQ2DNyWPQRiPmkcoVbnJ2BS-wYK4Hw-VEZAcwI6dqkG5eQmdFSJriVtMROtKOTNel5zl9jYn7RmZWMI-2k-LTAE35KfJ0kUFv5mHBpRyPqWumZwxOYGTBZ5Pg8iMLTZL6A9Gfwre85760EfOnJhz0SB7tDIM_6KgJ0P1A0nDAtZs3aPiChifLkG8iO0EMAgPrO1vCZgPE7UoeeKL6xnC8Bm69tROIRDyOT8EvdwhFs38vt3bhBR1XySUcC28YzYCRzAEpuU66hVdmKm9NfIfgdZiSXwqvHBbe9VTMjKteoaBuSs7B-Ac_BpV1uEt2sDJ5NLT6gOBTSWpFYQ5wgY46nQT2gZnqd7syGotfs6J6_o76xsZSveJvGh5t7EL7WBlFuMbpDphs_sXHRjR4qLg6ku825RV3FI9IGESsSl68uGM4PXJ0YYBVb5Q2xKUgVsdvdmli_LB4pVbDzF9zTiHnCReTC1A3P7CPdWD5uyAPqnHelHmLNG8QLzsMpWw4m7YEAMe4fV1yrp7JJurC4QJuB0u3wT7yaTkJGahJXWsVRdO4APOCn0HH7RvGCe-jWM2YZ4YgtElq44ifSBxD56t4EPynYIuc4lg)**

**-****TX-35 has been redrawn for results.** The new map finally gives our families a chance to elect a conservative who will deliver.

**-** **Americans Pay the Price:** Thousands of federal workers furloughed nationwide, billions in infrastructure projects stalled, and veterans facing growing delays in care and benefits as the shutdown drags on.
Now it’s on us to surge into Q4. If we make up this shortfall fast, we’ll start strong and prove TX-35 is ready to flip red.

**Here’s what I’m asking of you, fellow American:**[**Rush $10, $35, or $100 today to power our 48-hour surge goal and put this campaign back on track.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=19bf15002916489e8c2ff3bd1992994a&_e=LsPdJFV53ZKUsa7SUJvxSG_tXxbPZsDPfJFQCYrXPs8UI58mGxKW7ML-sTGOYmhrRNUt6VUk-ShCFBSwsGK1cAVNoHFNOCEKxOgcq8ohiJNcMFIZ8ELoERHnjU4TPHmKU-xKS0ZjMk64A1PGj4bks8Z-hVZW_93XUQ2DNyWPQRiPmkcoVbnJ2BS-wYK4Hw-VEZAcwI6dqkG5eQmdFSJriVtMROtKOTNel5zl9jYn7RmZWMI-2k-LTAE35KfJ0kUFv5mHBpRyPqWumZwxOYGTBaWOItrv-A3LfiIuwWuuitfzIYISw_vDQEGkvWwsD2u46Z9X3j8nwR7-YHC1S4XBeVpjlWZ3-9LL3BPPqS7Ffx_0GY_qaRLpc5Avb0OH8-qnkUtq5zUzb60Bs-dflE0EpS0uDYCJctsQgMMbsI9yVK74fJrR_d75aSmjScqgeU7BYNRt8eRbSQOMGsWfwgF3FJutE4Cll68hXndRSonzROdnFYhAQzaun-7VMQrJ0MrR5q44hRCIw4PLsRVCny8CFHo0-w4UUjglxpe8MjKmve6jZm6DiNJyCAlDwXzzmuJ3s9EdqCr5csUna-e7ZXXInpz--flFzlyVRHcKPlFbF6XHNLb92EjGMuR0LVAdq1VZ9EHLTgEI7A-UrbcgcSHR3KjyR6xVnjdL3r1x1YnslAnr4GN2dufhW9Nr8fmbFBaC6Nhm02Ef-yNvsTwA3VGfNOBmafp7U6ULRIDjv2y_otmKnJGLtl9GuQqNonGI4X1D)

clean_body: If we make up this shortfall fast, we’ll start strong and prove TX-35 is ready to flip red. | Fellow American, I’ll be straight with you: we fell short of our Q3 FEC fundraising goal. We worked tirelessly through the summer, but the Democrats’ reckless shutdown created national chaos. Donations froze, uncertainty spread, and our campaign fell just short of where we needed to be on September 30th. -TX-35 has been redrawn for results. The new map finally gives our families a chance to elect a conservative who will deliver. - Americans Pay the Price: Thousands of federal workers furloughed nationwide, billions in infrastructure projects stalled, and veterans facing growing delays in care and benefits as the shutdown drags on. Now it’s on us to surge into Q4. If we make up this shortfall fast, we’ll start strong and prove TX-35 is ready to flip red. Here’s what I’m asking of you, fellow American: Thank you, fellow American. Your support means the world. Josh Cortez P.S. We came up short — we’ll make up the ground and take TX-35 back for Texas conservatives. | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Yesterday, we announced a new round of endorsements. We’re supporting:

Our candidates can win these races, but they need a strong foundation of support.

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: We need to get our ducks in a row
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
|

body:
Our democracy only works when elected officials actually listen to the people they represent.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116807125/574496438/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-10-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDkyMjZlZjEtYmJhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rfxd2TrB9GxCBCOXBCUm2PmeET-BQh540VvlIj5UCP8=)
---
| Peter,

Our democracy only works when elected officials actually listen to the people they represent.

Since taking office, **Ryan Mackenzie hasn’t held a single in-person town hall. Not one.**

And it’s not just me calling him out.

Mackenzie has faced weekly _**“Mondays with Mackenzie”**_ protests outside his office — including a crowd of more than 100 constituents after he cast the deciding vote to slash Medicaid, rip away food assistance from families, and hand massive tax breaks to billionaires.

Pennsylvanians are outraged, and rightfully so. Families in PA-07 deserve better than a congressman who hides from tough questions while making life harder for his own constituents.

That’s why I’m demanding Ryan Mackenzie hold a real, public, in-person town hall. And I need you to join me.

[_**Will you add your name to demand that Ryan Mackenzie face PA-07 and answer for his record?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116807126/574496439/-1017085045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDkyMjZlZjEtYmJhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rfxd2TrB9GxCBCOXBCUm2PmeET-BQh540VvlIj5UCP8=&emci=02226ef1-bba3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=09226ef1-bba3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=2418100)

| [DEMAND A TOWN HALL ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116807127/574496440/-1017085045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDkyMjZlZjEtYmJhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rfxd2TrB9GxCBCOXBCUm2PmeET-BQh540VvlIj5UCP8=&emci=02226ef1-bba3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=09226ef1-bba3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=2418100)

When politicians hide, we all lose. Together, we can send a message: PA-07 is paying attention, and we won’t be ignored.

clean_body: Our democracy only works when elected officials actually listen to the people they represent. | = | Peter, Our democracy only works when elected officials actually listen to the people they represent. Since taking office, Ryan Mackenzie hasn’t held a single in-person town hall. Not one. And it’s not just me calling him out. Mackenzie has faced weekly “Mondays with Mackenzie” protests outside his office — including a crowd of more than 100 constituents after he cast the deciding vote to slash Medicaid, rip away food assistance from families, and hand massive tax breaks to billionaires. Pennsylvanians are outraged, and rightfully so. Families in PA-07 deserve better than a congressman who hides from tough questions while making life harder for his own constituents. That’s why I’m demanding Ryan Mackenzie hold a real, public, in-person town hall. And I need you to join me. | When politicians hide, we all lose. Together, we can send a message: PA-07 is paying attention, and we won’t be ignored. – Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Ernest Lineberger, Oct 7, 2025
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

More than 150 friends, fans, and folks with curiosity came to our
very successful 2026 campaign launch event in Lewisville last week. I
enjoyed speaking briefly with many of them. We had a great evening and got
some news coverage. Since then, I’ve been catching up on things like the
quarterly FEC filing, email replies, schedule planning and more.

Thank you to everyone who played a role. We had volunteers
helping to set up and clean up, staffing tables for check in and
merchandise sales, as well as directing people to find parking. Our
speakers were awesome with mindful and motivational messages. Everyone who
came helped fill the room with good vibes.

You are all now deputized to go forth and spread the news of our campaign
to put people’s needs first. Show off your campaign T-shirt, magnetic
bumper sticker, coffee mug or other swag. Keep a few copies of my 4x9 lit
cards to give out if the conversation warrants. If you need or want more,
try to catch up with me at one of my events, or reply to this email to make
arrangements.

Volunteers: Thanks to those of you who have signed up!
Remember, it is with no obligation on your part. We will put your contact
info on our volunteer list. From time to time, when we have emerging needs
for volunteers, we will send out an email to the list saying what we need.
If you can help with that, you reply directly to the email. If not, no
action needed on your part. No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note.
Easy-Peasy. To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just
reply to this email with your preferred contact info.

What kind of volunteer opportunities? For events, we may need
someone to check people in at the door, or collect donations for campaign
merchandise, take photos, etc. Block walking is going to be a thing soon.
And more. But it is always no obligation (but volunteer and come anyway,
it will be fun).

We are doing all we can to get donations to make sure we have the
funds to put on a viable campaign. Many of you have already donated.
Thank you! To donate again or to help someone else donate, use my main
campaign website: https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/
We are up against a lot. My opponent just reported that he
brought in $1.15M last quarter in donations to his campaign. His advantage
is that he supports the top 1% economically. Our advantage is that we
support everyone, so help spread the word.

Upcoming calendar events:

Wednesday, October 8th, 6:30-9 PM, I plan to go see Texas Senate Candidate
James Talarico in Fort Worth.
Are you free to join me? Use this link to sign up:
*https://mobilize.us/s/v6KLiS*
<https://track-mg.mobilize.us/CL0/https:%2F%2Fmobilize.us%2Fs%2Fv6KLiS/1/01000199bf6d9007-7fbe3fe7-a589-4c27-bb91-8e97a4e3d92e-000000/PmaCsR8FZ3mF55NazIjIp9gFU2STULORllISn9UMLN4=425>

Thursday, October 9th, 6:30-8 PM, I plan to visit my friends at the Cooke
County Dems meeting at the Gainesville Civic Center

Friday, October 10th, 5 – 10 PM (or most of it), I plan to be at the Flower
Mound Fall Festival at the FM Riverwalk with the Flower Mound Area Dems.

Saturday, October 11th, 11AM – 3PM (Can’t stay, but I hope to make a good
appearance) Carrollton Democrats Community Potluck Picnic, see mobilize
link: https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/830258/

Saturday, October 11th, Noon – 10 PM (or most of it), I plan to be at the
Flower Mound Fall Festival at the FM Riverwalk with the Flower Mound Area
Dems.

Sunday, October 12th, we plan on visiting another church out in the
district, maybe Wise County this time.
Sunday, October 12th, 1:30-2:30 PM I know them as Sanger Dems, but they
have a cooler name like Rural Area Denton Dems. 105 S. Stemmons St in
Sanger

Sunday, October 12th, 4-7 PM (or part of it) Dems of 380 social at Brass
Tap Crossroads
Mobilize link: https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/838531/

Monday, October 13th, I plan on checking in on the Metrocrest Dems, but I’m
not sure exactly where or when.

Tuesday, October 14th, 6 – 8 PM, Going to make sure the Wise County Dems
give Vikki Goodwin (for Texas Lt. Gov) a great welcome at the Fairfield
Inn, Decatur just off US-380

Wednesday, October 15th, 9:30-10:30 AM, Meet with a Veterans group at the
Great Egg on Loop 288, Denton.

Wednesday, October 15th, 6:30-8 PM, Flower Mound Dems Candidate fundraiser
at Creekwood Christian Church in Flower Mound

Thursday, October 16th, 2-4 PM, Meet Vikki Goodwin for Lt. Gov. again in
Highland Village

Thursday, October 16th, 6-9 PM, KERA Celebrates Texas Standards 10th
Birthday

Friday, October 17th, 6-8 PM, Mark Nair for US House (CD13) – People First
Rally at Andersons Eatery and Distillery, Denton

Saturday, Oct 18th, No Kings protests nationwide. I plan to be at the
Frisco Event 9:30 – 11 and then the Flower Mound Event from 2 – 4 PM.
There are events in Denton, Dallas, Garland, Arlington, and many more. Use
this Link to find the one(s) that suit you.
https://www.mobilize.us/nokings/?tag_ids=27849

Monday, October 20th, waiting details for a potential candidate forum by
the UNT Dems

Early Voting: Oct 20 – 31, 2025

Election Day: November 4, 2025

If you live in Lewisville ISD, Michelle Alkhatib is our preferred candidate
for School Board. She has been a great school Board member and is running
again. Her opponent is a late entry backed by a right-wing group that
doesn’t like Michelle’s last name.

If you live in Texas, we have 17 constitutional amendments. I recommend
that you pre-print your sample ballot. Use link:
https://www.lonestarleft.com/p/texas-2025-constitutional-amendments to help
make your decisions. This link leaves some recommendations “neutral”.
Some of the County Democratic Parties have lists that are similar with
minor differences.

Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the
2026 election fall in the favor of the people.

Putting People’s Needs First!
Ernest Lineberger
Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26)
LinebergerforUScongress.com
Check out my book on Amazon.com, ‘There I Was...:Life Memories from Ernest
Lineberger

If not, no action needed on your part. No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note. Easy-Peasy. To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just reply to this email with your preferred contact info. What kind of volunteer opportunities? For events, we may need someone to check people in at the door, or collect donations for campaign merchandise, take photos, etc. Block walking is going to be a thing soon. And more. But it is always no obligation (but volunteer and come anyway, it will be fun). We are doing all we can to get donations to make sure we have the funds to put on a viable campaign. Many of you have already donated. Thank you! To donate again or to help someone else donate, use my main campaign website: We are up against a lot. My opponent just reported that he brought in $1.15M last quarter in donations to his campaign. His advantage is that he supports the top 1% economically. Our advantage is that we support everyone, so help spread the word. Upcoming calendar events: Wednesday, October 8th, 6:30-9 PM, I plan to go see Texas Senate Candidate James Talarico in Fort Worth. Are you free to join me? Use this link to sign up: <> Thursday, October 9th, 6:30-8 PM, I plan to visit my friends at the Cooke County Dems meeting at the Gainesville Civic Center Friday, October 10th, 5 – 10 PM (or most of it), I plan to be at the Flower Mound Fall Festival at the FM Riverwalk with the Flower Mound Area Dems. Saturday, October 11th, 11AM – 3PM (Can’t stay, but I hope to make a good appearance) Carrollton Democrats Community Potluck Picnic, see mobilize link: Saturday, October 11th, Noon – 10 PM (or most of it), I plan to be at the Flower Mound Fall Festival at the FM Riverwalk with the Flower Mound Area Dems. Sunday, October 12th, we plan on visiting another church out in the district, maybe Wise County this time. Sunday, October 12th, 1:30-2:30 PM I know them as Sanger Dems, but they have a cooler name like Rural Area Denton Dems. 105 S. Stemmons St in Sanger Sunday, October 12th, 4-7 PM (or part of it) Dems of 380 social at Brass Tap Crossroads Mobilize link: Monday, October 13th, I plan on checking in on the Metrocrest Dems, but I’m not sure exactly where or when. Tuesday, October 14th, 6 – 8 PM, Going to make sure the Wise County Dems give Vikki Goodwin (for Texas Lt. Gov) a great welcome at the Fairfield Inn, Decatur just off US-380 Wednesday, October 15th, 9:30-10:30 AM, Meet with a Veterans group at the Great Egg on Loop 288, Denton. Wednesday, October 15th, 6:30-8 PM, Flower Mound Dems Candidate fundraiser at Creekwood Christian Church in Flower Mound Thursday, October 16th, 2-4 PM, Meet Vikki Goodwin for Lt. Gov. again in Highland Village Thursday, October 16th, 6-9 PM, KERA Celebrates Texas Standards 10th Birthday Friday, October 17th, 6-8 PM, Mark Nair for US House (CD13) – People First Rally at Andersons Eatery and Distillery, Denton Saturday, Oct 18th, No Kings protests nationwide. I plan to be at the Frisco Event 9:30 – 11 and then the Flower Mound Event from 2 – 4 PM. There are events in Denton, Dallas, Garland, Arlington, and many more. Use this Link to find the one(s) that suit you. Monday, October 20th, waiting details for a potential candidate forum by the UNT Dems Early Voting: Oct 20 – 31, 2025 Election Day: November 4, 2025 If you live in Lewisville ISD, Michelle Alkhatib is our preferred candidate for School Board. She has been a great school Board member and is running again. Her opponent is a late entry backed by a right-wing group that doesn’t like Michelle’s last name. If you live in Texas, we have 17 constitutional amendments. I recommend that you pre-print your sample ballot. Use link: to help make your decisions. This link leaves some recommendations “neutral”. Some of the County Democratic Parties have lists that are similar with minor differences. Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the 2026 election fall in the favor of the people. Putting People’s Needs First! Ernest Lineberger Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26) LinebergerforUScongress.com Check out my book on Amazon.com, ‘There I Was...:Life Memories from Ernest Lineberger

body:
Being LGBTQI+ isn’t a disease, and it’s certainly not something that can or should be “fixed” by a therapist.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116807368/574497407/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-10-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTUyYzRjYy1iY2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Ru3_GHB39tmrhOMe6FcfJUlKRLkSuapSb-Bf9CEQt4=)

| Peter,

Being LGBTQI+ isn’t a disease, and it’s certainly not something that can or should be “fixed” by a therapist.

But right now, the Supreme Court is considering whether to uphold state bans on conversion therapy for minors. This practice has been discredited and condemned by every leading medical and mental health association. It is harmful, dangerous, and puts the well-being of LGBTQ+ youth at risk.

As Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, I’m proud to stand with House Democrats in calling on the Court to protect these young people and uphold these bans. But we need to show that the American people are with us.

That’s why I’m asking you today:

**👉 **[_**Will you add your name to demand the Supreme Court protect LGBTQ+ youth and uphold bans on conversion therapy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116807369/574497413/-1750190123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTUyYzRjYy1iY2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Ru3_GHB39tmrhOMe6FcfJUlKRLkSuapSb-Bf9CEQt4=&emci=75d834fd-b7a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=fe52c4cc-bca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=6681226)

body:
It would be a terrible mistake to take any vote for granted in this election.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116807840/574499004/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-07_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzAxNjhlNzgtYmZhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7n-U3ej6zwqGyjb6ucaiTdgVNye4GQO93t-ppSyNjxg=)
Peter, last week, a new poll started making the rounds.
_The poll found that Winsome Earle-Sears has cut Abigail's lead down to just three points._
_Just three points, Peter._ Now, while not every poll is to be taken at face value, it would be a terrible mistake to take any vote for granted in this election.
So, we'll say it again: **This race will be close.**
These next four weeks couldn't be any more important. We've set our biggest goal yet to keep our organizing program fully funded — and falling short is not an option we can entertain with Virginia's future hanging in the balance.
_That's why Abigail is counting on you to stand beside her._
[_**Will you make a $25 contribution to join our campaign's donor list today? clean_body: It would be a terrible mistake to take any vote for granted in this election. = Peter, last week, a new poll started making the rounds. The poll found that Winsome Earle-Sears has cut Abigail's lead down to just three points. Just three points, Peter. Now, while not every poll is to be taken at face value, it would be a terrible mistake to take any vote for granted in this election. So, we'll say it again: This race will be close. These next four weeks couldn't be any more important. We've set our biggest goal yet to keep our organizing program fully funded — and falling short is not an option we can entertain with Virginia's future hanging in the balance. That's why Abigail is counting on you to stand beside her. = = = = = = = Thanks for your support at this crucial time, Whitney Finance Director By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

name: Jay Jones
subject: Virginia’s workers deserve an Attorney General who’s on their side — not standing in their way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025]
Hey there, it’s Jay Jones.
My opponent, Jason Miyares, has spent his career siding with megadonors and corrupt special interests — not Virginia’s workers.
See for yourself:
🔴 He opposed raising Virginia’s minimum wage to $15/hour.
🔴 He prevented local government workers from unionizing.
🔴 He blocked rules that would protect workers on government construction projects.
🔴 He refused to protect 300,000 workers from Trump’s mass layoffs.
I’ve spent my career fighting for fair pay, paid leave, and workers’ rights. As Attorney General, I’ll create Virginia’s first Labor Justice Unit to crack down on wage theft, fight union-busting, and hold companies accountable when they break the law.
Miyares might have millions from his MAGA mega-donors, but I have a proven track record of standing up for Virginia’s workers. With your support, we can defend our rights, reach every voter, and make Virginia a state where workers come first.

clean_body: | | | | | | , This is sick - Abigail Spanberger, my Democrat opponent, has launched attack ads telling vicious lies about me! I'm not in the business of lying to voters and supporters, so I'm going to tell you the TRUTH. Here it is: Abigail Spanberger has taken over $550K in donations from a George Soros-backed group and a Chinese Communist Party member! She doesn't fight for you, me, or our nation; she's looking out for megarich liberals and literal COMMUNISTS! Spanberger HID a $900K trust from voters while she was in Congress, so lying isn't anything new for her. * Spanberger took cues from Biden 100% of the time while she was in Congress. If she became Governor, she'd bring the same lies and downturn that we saw under Biden! I'm a Christian, Marine, and mother. I don't just pay lip service to honesty and service; they're in my nature. I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart: can't emphasize enough how important it is that we win this election, Patriot. If Spanberger wins, Virginia will suffer, and it will signal to the nation that Americans want more of Biden and Kamala's DISASTROUS tenure in the White House. you so much for all of your prayers and support. Together, we WILL win this race! -Winsome Earle-Sears | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. clean_body: | Patriot, Nothing chaps my hide more than seeing Democrats get too comfortable, thinking they have momentum on their side heading into 2026. The biggest pain in my backside is that while Dems think they already have 2026 in the bag, multiple of my Senate colleagues have contacted me about your INCOMPLETE . That's why I'm reaching out to you directly. We've got the fight of our lives coming in 2026, and I don't plan on letting Chuck Schumer and his liberal cronies waltz into victory just because we didn't get our ducks in a row. name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: We came up short — but I’m not backing down.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
If anything, I’m more determined than ever to bounce back, stronger, faster, and louder than the Left could ever imagine. |
---
Fellow American,

I want to speak to you directly this morning — not as “Team Beth,” not as some polished campaign update — but as Beth.

We closed the books on our end-of-quarter deadline. I’ll be honest: we came up short of what my finance team expected.

That stings. Because I know how much was riding on those numbers. Reporters, party insiders, and, yes, even my opponents will dissect our report when it comes out — line by line — and look for weaknesses.

And to make matters worse, **we’re now on day 7 of the Democrat shutdown** — all because the Left is demanding billions in taxpayer dollars to fund **free healthcare for illegal immigrants** in places like **California, Illinois, and New York** while hardworking Texans are left waiting for answers.

You can bet they’ll use this shutdown to score political points — but here in Texas, we’re focused on getting Washington working again for the people who actually pay the bills.

But here’s the truth: campaigns aren’t won or lost in one deadline. [**They’re won by how we _respond_.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=90f12a5cb6e04c62aba65f256014ab5a&_e=f3VlyFDoDQ9rEXOWX0mY_v_65E5hYBnPXfOC7pcpf6v9VsOWN-eWQbsKwdCTq2VUUMgiw5ufxLjwMJMcthLQ7F60vFYkNJtusAf7Cfg6-Mj0p4DXd6LQlD69_Nq5EjWYYvZTOodI3NHwmk9SjL_g6UmnQvi7MZk-c1uSbm3-QuCWtOd2G4HwQtKR-uIAfwp9YRp3_JY-DZa0FQSz255wCIIX33zuEclIFwGFpKkYUtyaRD-9uDIWbBd29xXUZEsZByJD-lJxxZxXLlf4i1-5wmOMY8JTKV0RDMpKPfMoASrPahkR2kq3mvbFVrJKgwlqLo73NHioD9--DYibcWsduc6o1oPqqoBP-cKOwCJCGIM9fnB3K7Aj0dulCJy23pL31jVm80UXj_FvvnKiRzOoAQFv975mIcymFImADuojbueHPFKecCAOSZz4zSekugnglMbkKt6vvh5mHprcDrUOeOgp9NpXIR6kT4I2HR7oJQV2tE_SBkeGHYZzTGgPiy0iCowYBwjMr9fOaIe5kNAt5w1_RsmpVQLlySXk-xBT_U34zy_2ETa5vyy8Rddmv9rWApKL6OZPLD1ZBDhRUp19eANacC332hPT-54ZtjL976PtTQB872rsZ5yKWS3EegBXoTMIdGWbCp-3ajp2jTVSSkkCHeB1QMEQyOGW_VjnpG59flGH4eGyrGHbLBFEqhUpaoNP5jh--Y1FlIudI-09LcOV3PtSlDrSwM9tzQWc9IGiTiCmColOP18RP_RXWgt7)

Here’s what I can say, fellow American: I’m not discouraged, and I’m certainly not backing down. **If anything, I’m more determined than ever to bounce back, stronger, faster, and louder than the Left could ever imagine.**

[**I need your help to make that happen. If we can show a surge today — the very first day of this new quarter — it sends an unmistakable message that our campaign — this district — is still unshakable.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=90f12a5cb6e04c62aba65f256014ab5a&_e=f3VlyFDoDQ9rEXOWX0mY_v_65E5hYBnPXfOC7pcpf6v9VsOWN-eWQbsKwdCTq2VUUMgiw5ufxLjwMJMcthLQ7F60vFYkNJtusAf7Cfg6-Mj0p4DXd6LQlD69_Nq5EjWYYvZTOodI3NHwmk9SjL_g6UmnQvi7MZk-c1uSbm3-QuCWtOd2G4HwQtKR-uIAfwp9YRp3_JY-DZa0FQSz255wCIIX33zuEclIFwGFpKkYUtyaRD-9uDIWbBd29xXUZEsZByJD-lJxxZxXLlf4i1-5wos5HVUms2XRFX5lpSnckaPHfYtZOpYWPv-YHLmhz1RYv4FGtWLdx5jIy5tHBnzAF36JUdOlACpj5hGvsoGmPLaegr7Wk5gMb0KG6JSW_dADEw4i0zaS1Qv-ngXX1GmRyxc56XqIqbPnysiXSEi69CtLLntmH8CBQqtZrWVzO-cWNq9dntb-JJ2gextgAUYFSiO6d-ygSdHvZ9TOvXDcFA_tmzOwcUZNCA4HgmAhdh_IPM7FCwcFOcT-2zTkACDYPoL_zxfxXqwPj_Npw-tuvxbYQXb3cDfaM2B1QmDLyahf0JDEyQAQw8BR1bZvM3R6SbCi4Rh6j9M25WDpCZRB4O0lCypvef718YhGygJKTo-Vj3WS_jH-KpgTbaetHqgU_aPst5SyqeJP2BNf_UHH5mIbsug52smTBweRRkbLXPughsQSZNXeew9J6bgbfXEShYwbk9cgypfScX85Mm0ddVxlfWmMtvF3EmUbNplcXnx2)

The Left would love to say this campaign is slipping. The same Democrats who caused this shutdown want to paint Republicans as the problem — but we’re the only ones standing up for taxpayers and border security. Let’s prove them wrong.

Thank you,

Beth
Sent from my iPhone

| | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

When launching a new campaign, it’s important to focus on long-term, sustainable growth — even when you’ve already run before.

That’s what we are doing as we look to build a winning campaign in 2026 and reelect Tim Walz as Governor of Minnesota. The GOP is looking to flip Minnesota red, and we need the resources to be ready to fight back at any given moment.

Recurring donations make sure we have a reliable fundraising base throughout the election cycle. That means we have budgets that don’t change month over month, and we don’t fall short of where we need to be. **That’s less time we have to spend raising money, and more time we can spend talking to voters.**

Look, we’re going to have to knock on a lot of doors and have a lot of conversations with Minnesotans if we’re going to win reelection next year. Tim and our team are taking nothing for granted and are ready to hit the ground running over the next 14 months, but we need you with us today.

Hi Peter,

Winning elections in Pennsylvania doesn’t happen by chance, it happens because we invest in the work that powers Democratic victories year after year.

Right now, we’re running four programs that will define the outcome of 2025 and beyond. Our Voter Registration Program is fueled by over $578,000 to make sure every eligible Pennsylvanian gets on the rolls. Our Vote Local PA initiative invests $125,000 to arm voters with the resources they need to cast informed ballots in every single race. Our Social Media Program is fueled by $387,000 to spread our messaging across the state. And our Vote By Mail Program, a $250,000 effort, is making sure Pennsylvanians can vote safely, securely, and on their own time.

This work may not grab headlines, _but it changes everything_. It boosts turnout, defends our rights, and keeps Pennsylvania blue when it matters most.

We need you in this fight. name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: Two big wins for redwoods in California
body:
Billions of dollars for forests, climate, and communities—thanks to your voice| | | [View in browser](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116809778/574505605/2109133987?sourceid=1167969&utm_campaign=aa-update&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-advocacy&ms=GGRF-Prop4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNjUyYWY3LWM2YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FAA64Aw6kUVsKgjXgiwRTc02Uogr7TqzIuWwvIXM-hw=&emci=34ebee4c-98a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d652af7-c6a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551)
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116809779/574505606/779512579?sourceid=1167969&utm_campaign=aa-update&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-advocacy&ms=GGRF-Prop4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNjUyYWY3LWM2YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FAA64Aw6kUVsKgjXgiwRTc02Uogr7TqzIuWwvIXM-hw=&emci=34ebee4c-98a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d652af7-c6a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
Thanks to partners like you, the League is celebrating two major legislative victories for redwoods:
---
## **Prop 4 win**
---
Despite 2024’s landslide passage of **[Proposition 4](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116809780/574505607/242390430?sourceid=1167969&utm_campaign=aa-update&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-advocacy&ms=GGRF-Prop4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNjUyYWY3LWM2YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FAA64Aw6kUVsKgjXgiwRTc02Uogr7TqzIuWwvIXM-hw=&emci=34ebee4c-98a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d652af7-c6a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551)** —the largest natural resources bond in U.S. history—funding was at risk of significant delays. Thanks to persistent advocacy, strong partnerships, and your calls for action, California lawmakers agreed to deliver $3.2 billion this year to protect our lands, waterways, and communities. That means critical projects that safeguard old-growth groves, restore damaged forests, and expand equitable access to redwood parks will receive badly needed funding.
---
---
Photos by Max Forster
---
## **GGRF win **
---
Lawmakers also reauthorized the Cap-and-Invest program, which directs billions into the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund (GGRF). The deal establishes a new $1 billion discretionary fund and preserves $200 million annually for wildfire resilience. This includes programs like CalFire’s Forest Health grants, which support **[our fire resilience efforts](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116809781/574505608/-661241156?sourceid=1167969&utm_campaign=aa-update&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ea-advocacy&ms=GGRF-Prop4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNjUyYWY3LWM2YTMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FAA64Aw6kUVsKgjXgiwRTc02Uogr7TqzIuWwvIXM-hw=&emci=34ebee4c-98a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d652af7-c6a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1504551)** in the giant sequoias.
---
Your support powers climate action
---
Both these victories are the direct result of persistent advocacy, strategic partnerships, and the voices of thousands who spoke up when it mattered most. When we act together, we can deliver extraordinary outcomes for our redwoods and our climate future. Thank you for standing with us!

clean_body: Billions of dollars for forests, climate, and communities—thanks to your voice| | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Thanks to partners like you, the League is celebrating two major legislative victories for redwoods: Prop 4 win Despite 2024’s landslide passage of —the largest natural resources bond in U.S. history—funding was at risk of significant delays. Thanks to persistent advocacy, strong partnerships, and your calls for action, California lawmakers agreed to deliver $3.2 billion this year to protect our lands, waterways, and communities. That means critical projects that safeguard old-growth groves, restore damaged forests, and expand equitable access to redwood parks will receive badly needed funding. Photos by Max Forster GGRF win Lawmakers also reauthorized the Cap-and-Invest program, which directs billions into the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund (GGRF). The deal establishes a new $1 billion discretionary fund and preserves $200 million annually for wildfire resilience. This includes programs like CalFire’s Forest Health grants, which support in the giant sequoias. Your support powers climate action Both these victories are the direct result of persistent advocacy, strategic partnerships, and the voices of thousands who spoke up when it mattered most. When we act together, we can deliver extraordinary outcomes for our redwoods and our climate future. Thank you for standing with us! | | | With gratitude, Ben Friedman Director of Government Affairs and Public FundingSave the Redwoods League | | Ready to be part of something big? | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States CONNECT WITH US | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

Do you remember the expressions “checks and balances” and “separation of powers” from high school? I sure do.
In simple terms, these phrases mean no single part of government should have overwhelming power over the others. Federal, state, and local governments should all be working independently of each other, doing what’s right for their constituents.
But Kansas GOP leadership disagrees. Instead, they’re more than happy to hand over more and more control of our state’s priorities directly to Donald Trump — with devastating consequences.
If Donald Trump gets his way, there will be no more competitive Congressional elections in Kansas. No more dissent in our state’s delegation. Not a single person with the courage to tell Trump no.
Yes, given everything we’re up against, this is a chilling moment for Kansas and our democracy as a whole. But that doesn’t mean we should run scared. **It means the opposite.**
[_**I’m ready to work. I’m ready to fight. I’m ready to win. And if you’re with me, I could really use your support more than ever. Even a few dollars goes a long way toward showing Republican leadership just how strong and willing we are to fight back.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116809888/574505920/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_100725_satisfaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDg4ZTYyNi1jN2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5vJ79i6mSo_LKIUV42VOoZabqEOBfnmU3kfrjhbQJP4=)

I’m sending you this message because Kansas Republicans in the legislature are traveling to the White House this month to take direct marching orders from Donald Trump. = | | = Do you remember the expressions “checks and balances” and “separation of powers” from high school? I sure do. In simple terms, these phrases mean no single part of government should have overwhelming power over the others. Federal, state, and local governments should all be working independently of each other, doing what’s right for their constituents. But Kansas GOP leadership disagrees. Instead, they’re more than happy to hand over more and more control of our state’s priorities directly to Donald Trump — with devastating consequences. If Donald Trump gets his way, there will be no more competitive Congressional elections in Kansas. No more dissent in our state’s delegation. Not a single person with the courage to tell Trump no. Yes, given everything we’re up against, this is a chilling moment for Kansas and our democracy as a whole. But that doesn’t mean we should run scared. This has been a busy time for defending our democracy, Derek.
Trump’s attacks on mail-in voting, the weaponization of the Department of Justice, Kash Patel’s corruption of the FBI, and the FCC’s threat to freedom of speech... that’s just to name a few of the threats.
With Trump in the Oval Office, we know next month will be busy. And the one after that. And the one after that, as well.
_We can’t slow down. We won’t tire in fighting these abuses._
But the reality is, with a GOP-controlled House and Senate, we are facing an uphill battle in our work to put checks and balances on Trump.
That's why, as we wage this fight for democracy, I'm also focused on electing Democrats across the country, securing the Democratic majorities in the Senate and House we need to hold Trump and his administration accountable.

body:
We’ve had more than enough reminders of that over the last 10 years. And in Virginia and New Jersey, there is still a ton of time left on the clock.
#
Peter — we want to make something completely, 100% clear.
No election is won until it is actually won.
We’ve had more than enough reminders of that over the last 10 years. And in Virginia and New Jersey, there is still a ton of time left on the clock. Republicans will stop at nothing to win the gubernatorial contests in both of those states. They won’t quit until the buzzer on election day.
VoteVets is not quitting. Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey and Abigail Spanberger in Virginia are VoteVets members, and we aren’t going to let them lose to Trump’s handpicked candidates. It’s not on the table. Not an option.
To make sure, we’re putting $1 million in advertising up across Virginia and New Jersey. It’s a huge sum, but we need to do everything we possibly can to hand Trump some stinging defeats after everything he’s done to our country.
You know that VoteVets is the tip of the spear in this fight. You know our ads move the needle and decide races. And today, we’re humbly asking you to chip in and help us make a difference in both New Jersey and Virginia.
[**Please, chip in anything you can right away so that we can lock up these races and put principled, distinguished leaders in the governor’s seat in two critically important states. We need your help.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.PLXLty&refcode=em251007-1-120&t=1&akid=34672%2E3013755%2EFHymBy)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: we need to be honest
disclaimer_text: paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance
body:
the shutdown isn't an accident

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6536?t=2&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
---
null,

I’m going to be totally honest with you about what’s happening right now. There’s been a lot of spin coming out of the White House, but you deserve the truth. Here it is: **Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Washington are the reason the federal government is shut down.**
It’s not an accident. This crisis is 100% manufactured – and regular people, including Michiganders, are paying the price.

If you’re sick of these political games and want leaders in Washington to fight for YOU, **_[chip in $5 to help fuel our grassroots campaign in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6527?t=3&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)_**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6566?t=4&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
---
I’m asking for your support because this shutdown is the latest example of why the Senate _must_ provide a real check on Trump’s chaos.

Here’s how we got here: Months ago, Donald Trump handed the keys to the federal government to his billionaire donor Elon Musk and his DOGE clowns.
Since then, we’ve seen deep, harmful cuts to critical services – from rural health care to infrastructure to clean water protections.

Then came the GOP’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” – a massive tax giveaway to billionaires, paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance. They slashed Medicaid. And they did it in the name of “efficiency,” pretending it was good fiscal policy. It wasn’t. _**It was cruelty with a calculator.**_ And now they’re targeting subsidies that help working families afford basic care.
**Because Republicans refuse to reverse those health care cuts or renew the health insurance subsidies set to expire soon, the government is shut down and health care costs are still going up.**
This isn’t some abstract budget fight. This is real, and for me, it’s personal.

In my district alone, more than 31,000 people will have to pay more for their health care – in some cases hundreds of dollars more – if Republicans succeed in letting these subsidies expire. That’s 31,000 hardworking folks who will be facing impossible choices – all so billionaires can buy another mansion or jet or whatever.
**That’s why I’m not budging – I can’t support any deal that slashes health care and does nothing to cut costs for Michiganders.** My priorities have always been lower costs, affordable health care, a strong workforce, and a government that works for Michigan.

**Because if it doesn’t work for Michigan, it doesn’t work for me.**
I didn’t come to Congress to play political games. I didn’t come to stand by while the people I love get ripped off. I came to Congress to get things done – and to protect the working people who make our state, and our country, great.
So if you’re angry, you’re not alone. I am too.

If you’re frustrated, you have every right to be.

If you’re scared, I understand.
**Here’s my promise to you: I’m not backing down.** I’ll keep showing up. I’ll keep pushing for a deal that restores health care access, reverses the cuts, and puts people – not politics – first.

My Stevens doggedness is in overdrive. I promise to fight as hard as I can.
But I need you with me. [**Will you chip in $5 now to help me keep fighting for working families, win in Michigan, and flip the Senate for Democrats so we can provide a real check on Trump’s chaos agenda?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6527?t=5&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6527?t=6&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
---

---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6576?t=8&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6566?t=9&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
---
Thanks for having my back.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6535?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6536?t=11&akid=1027%2E49239%2EUEBeXE)
---

Thank you,
Haley

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: My thoughts on RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

I want to talk to you about our current Health and Human Services Secretary, and why his leadership has me gravely concerned.

When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was nominated to lead the HHS, he promised to use scientific guidance and research to influence his decisions. Yet, from the moment he took office, conspiracy theories and personal agendas have clouded his judgment.

He isn’t offering solutions to health concerns. He isn’t allowing our brilliant researchers to continue their work and find future cures for terrible diseases. And he isn’t making sure our country is prepared for another pandemic or public health crisis.

What he is doing is spreading conspiracy theories that endanger public health, questioning vaccine safety, undermining decades of medical research, and casting doubt on the very experts who work tirelessly to keep our families safe.

[**I can't be any clearer about this: RFK Jr. is not qualified to lead the HHS. His leadership is the result of an administration that is more focused on political interests than the American people. I’m fighting that idea every single day by supporting honest, for-the-people leaders who won’t let party bosses dictate their ability to do what’s right. If you agree with my mission, chip in $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116809949/574506182/1089852515?refcode=em25_251007_listen_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251007_listen_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=716f0bfb-c7a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE2ZjBiZmItYzdhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yc81zFru78bTYeIWCAxficOxPAnsfTuNfujvQW0Edqo=)

When recently asked about my thoughts on RFK’s leadership, **I told the public to listen to their doctors** – and our elected officials should be doing the same.

Real, honest leadership means respecting the people who've made it their life's work to study, heal, and protect us. That includes the scientists, the doctors, and the public health experts who follow evidence, not ideology.

As governor, I worry about how the decisions made in Washington will affect all Kentuckians. The Trump Administration’s decision to empower RFK Jr. is downright dangerous for families in Kentucky and across the country .

I formed In This Together PAC to support leaders who will watch out for the health and for the best interests of their people, no matter the politics. If you believe in science, in truth, and in commonsense leadership that puts people first, I need you standing with me, Peter. clean_body: Peter, I want to talk to you about our current Health and Human Services Secretary, and why his leadership has me gravely concerned. When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was nominated to lead the HHS, he promised to use scientific guidance and research to influence his decisions. Yet, from the moment he took office, conspiracy theories and personal agendas have clouded his judgment. He isn’t offering solutions to health concerns. He isn’t allowing our brilliant researchers to continue their work and find future cures for terrible diseases. And he isn’t making sure our country is prepared for another pandemic or public health crisis. What he is doing is spreading conspiracy theories that endanger public health, questioning vaccine safety, undermining decades of medical research, and casting doubt on the very experts who work tirelessly to keep our families safe. = When recently asked about my thoughts on RFK’s leadership, I told the public to listen to their doctors – and our elected officials should be doing the same. Real, honest leadership means respecting the people who've made it their life's work to study, heal, and protect us. That includes the scientists, the doctors, and the public health experts who follow evidence, not ideology. As governor, I worry about how the decisions made in Washington will affect all Kentuckians. The Trump Administration’s decision to empower RFK Jr. is downright dangerous for families in Kentucky and across the country . I formed In This Together PAC to support leaders who will watch out for the health and for the best interests of their people, no matter the politics. If you believe in science, in truth, and in commonsense leadership that puts people first, I need you standing with me, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Gov. Andy Beshear | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Health care or groceries? No family should ever have to choose.
body:
Health care costs are about to explode

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=1b554ad8f8&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | |

Dear Peter,**Health care is already too expensive for working families**. But if Trump and the Republicans in Congress continue to deny the American people healthcare protections under the Affordable Care Act, those subsidies will expire, and costs will become exorbitant, unaffordable — **the politics of cruelty are here.** A CNN analysis forecasts that a family paying $7,225 a year today could see their premiums skyrocket to $25,000 a year. **That’s almost 30% of their entire income—gone.****This isn’t some abstract policy debate.** It’s about whether families in California, Texas, Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, and right here in Los Angeles, can afford to keep a roof over their heads and food on the table.**I’m running for Congress because no family should ever be forced to choose between paying for health care and paying for groceries or rent**. These subsidies matter. Health care as a human right matters. And the fight to defend these rights requires leaders who won’t back down when the politics of cruelty take center stage. **I’m running to stand up to that cruelty — to put compassion, fairness, and common sense back at the heart of our policies, and to make sure every family has the dignity, security, and opportunity they deserve.**[**But I can’t do this alone. I need you with me. Will you chip in $15, $25, or whatever amount feels right today?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=1b7e98f522&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| [Donate Now](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=78a64ac8f0&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| |

**Together, we can keep fighting for affordable health care, and we won’t let the Trump regime and his Republican enablers roll back the progress we’ve made.****In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=909a28cf2b&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

* * *
#### **[Become A Blue Amp Insider With *Special Benefits* By Getting A Paid Subscription For 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/f5f14bce-9a13-41d8-b799-702380a88581?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Give Me 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/f4c7ff27-e97c-437d-ad66-2cc43dd252ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d03601d-58d2-4b37-84ac-ce0bb3c54f59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By all outward appearances, Kristi Noem regards herself as a law enforcement warrior queen.
ICE weaponry in one hand, a DHS badge in the other, she gallops into hostile territory t[o strike fear into the hearts of "lawless" migrant-welcoming cities](https://substack.com/redirect/cca1b892-d3e9-47f2-9008-059887ce925f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Unfortunately for Noem, the only fear she inflicted in the Chicago suburbs last week was the expectation her crap would clog, soil, and stink up a municipal john.
Noem and her tag-along camera crew made an unannounced visit to the Broadview, Illinois police headquarters. They said they needed to use the facilities.
What happened next was glorious, rank, local government defiance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/10c2790d-9c89-4f53-a548-a71d5a0e5f37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Faced with the Secretary of Homeland Security--a title that sounds impressive until you remember Noem seems too dim to understand automatic flushers--the good workers of the Broadview P.D. did not faint, salute, nor budge.
But most importantly, they did not allow Noem and her entourage anywhere near the building's restrooms.
"No, you cannot," came the response from behind the locked front door -- five syllables of cold Midwestern steel. In that moment, Broadview became the moral capital of the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5f71bd1-d529-4a14-b1d4-e63de05da96c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's be clear: Kristi Noem is not a real official so much as she is a walking campaign ad--a billboard made of hair spray and hollow platitudes.
Her appearance in Illinois was not a mission and not a meeting. It was a stunt. A pitiful, flailing piece of theater, staged for the cameras, designed to portray a woman of action braving the crime-riddled wastelands of Democratic cities.
And all Noem got was a locked lavatory.
* * *
Subscribe Now!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bfPeyi43ylKw7NW4iB_sRigQAKU_l2j1QotgsCqV89w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175463494)
* * *
Noem of course cried foul, fuming that an Illinois government-funded building rejected her. And with her whining, Noem confirmed what many of us have long suspected: Kristi Noem is not built for the hard business of federal governance.
She is built for petulance.
The world must bow, or she sulks. In this case, she sulked all the way back to Washington. D.C. for an appearance on Fox News, the Trump propaganda channel.
A place where indignation flows like boxed wine and facts are regarded with the same suspicion as hand dryers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d03601d-58d2-4b37-84ac-ce0bb3c54f59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The entire episode is the sort of thing one might expect from a second-tier county commissioner with delusions of grandeur, not a supposed steward of national security.
But this is the state of the Trump administration. It's a circus of mediocrities, each convinced that their title should come with feudal rights to toilets _and_ praise.
It's worth noting that the building Noem tried to enter was not abandoned, not closed, not shuttered by anarchists or anti-ICE protestors. It was a functioning government office that chose not to allow a camera-wielding DHS entourage to barge in unannounced.
[The refusal was not "shameful," as Noem shrieked, but righteous. It was an affirmation of local dignity](https://substack.com/redirect/c017f13e-8a2b-4357-bd71-b9d707bb567b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against the traveling carnival of Trump's authoritarian vanity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4eb3ee08-3c16-4ff4-8d2a-521ead54ffa3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Chicago-area workers who denied Noem access deserve not only commendation, but elevation. Perhaps they can be promoted to Cabinet-level positions themselves.
If only to fill the vacuum of adult supervision currently afflicting the Department of Homeland Security.
And as for Secretary Noem: if she cannot secure access to a single toilet or is unable to figure out how to rent a Port-o-potty, perhaps she is not the iron-fisted security czar she pretends to be.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b16af92e-787f-4fc8-be83-8931f503fb2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Perhaps she is just another self promoter with a press release. Strutting from state to state, hoping the next door opens wide enough for both her ego and her camera crew.
In the end, all she wanted was to relieve herself. Mission accomplished--though not in the way she intended.
Still, Noem can be thankful for at least one thing this week. She is not Kash Patel.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/92096f9f-dcb8-4adf-8297-d240713d46a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Trump FBI director is so hated, so utterly despised even within the administration, that a Trump white house official was recently caught texting another that Patel is a "giant douche canoe."
* * *
Subscribe Now!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bfPeyi43ylKw7NW4iB_sRigQAKU_l2j1QotgsCqV89w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175463494)
* * *
Patel's latest douche-baggery includes firing 15 FBI agents for de-escalating a confrontation 5 years ago by kneeling with Black Lives Matters protesters.
The agents got everybody to go home that tense day in Washington, D.C. without violence or confrontation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1165fe1e-3315-4a47-8cac-e649c3bfd925?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But under Trump, de-escalation is a sin. Law enforcement is for attacking people, not protecting them.
Patel also fired an FBI agent recently who committed the crime of displaying an LGBTQ pride flag at a desk. And in the same week, Patel terminated an FBI agent who refused to arrange a perp walk of former FBI director James Comey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb3c882e-6c3d-42b3-a82d-9ab47072f9eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One is tempted to laugh, but the joke is on the rest of us.
For every kneeling agent fired, a Trump bootlicker is promoted. For every badge of conscience discarded, a lapel pin of MAGA ideological purity is pinned in its place.
And so the Bureau lurches on--but not toward justice.
Toward a future where loyalty is demanded, but never earned; where courage is punished, and cowardice rewarded; and where leaders like Kash Patel mistake the hollow clanging of their own echo chamber for the voice of the Republic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d03601d-58d2-4b37-84ac-ce0bb3c54f59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Kash Patel and Kristi Noem ([along with Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, Stephen Miller...](https://substack.com/redirect/9932a310-8c8d-4d9d-a5cf-b0c4b29a6f51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) are not administrators of law and order or security. These are clowns whose skills are limited to vengeance, small mindedness, and uncut political theater.
America has had plenty of despicable louts in high places before. But few have been so smug in their mediocrity, so thunderously pleased with their own pettiness, as are Kash Patel and Kristi Noem.
These Trump stooges mistake the flattery of power for the sound of principle. Only now, Americans are pushing back by holding the line.
And faced with the Trump administration's lunatic policies and literal desire to crap everywhere and anywhere, the local and state response is increasingly "no, you can not."
That sound, that recoil, is getting louder.
* * *
