Denying ICE Barbie a Toilet is an Act of Resistance | | | Oct 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- By all outward appearances, Kristi Noem regards herself as a law enforcement warrior queen. ICE weaponry in one hand, a DHS badge in the other, she gallops into hostile territory t. Unfortunately for Noem, the only fear she inflicted in the Chicago suburbs last week was the expectation her crap would clog, soil, and stink up a municipal john. Noem and her tag-along camera crew made an unannounced visit to the Broadview, Illinois police headquarters. They said they needed to use the facilities. What happened next was glorious, rank, local government defiance. | | ---|---|--- Faced with the Secretary of Homeland Security--a title that sounds impressive until you remember Noem seems too dim to understand automatic flushers--the good workers of the Broadview P.D. did not faint, salute, nor budge. But most importantly, they did not allow Noem and her entourage anywhere near the building's restrooms. "No, you cannot," came the response from behind the locked front door -- five syllables of cold Midwestern steel. In that moment, Broadview became the moral capital of the United States. | | ---|---|--- Let's be clear: Kristi Noem is not a real official so much as she is a walking campaign ad--a billboard made of hair spray and hollow platitudes. Her appearance in Illinois was not a mission and not a meeting. It was a stunt. A pitiful, flailing piece of theater, staged for the cameras, designed to portray a woman of action braving the crime-riddled wastelands of Democratic cities. And all Noem got was a locked lavatory. Subscribe Now! Noem of course cried foul, fuming that an Illinois government-funded building rejected her. And with her whining, Noem confirmed what many of us have long suspected: Kristi Noem is not built for the hard business of federal governance. She is built for petulance. The world must bow, or she sulks. In this case, she sulked all the way back to Washington. D.C. for an appearance on Fox News, the Trump propaganda channel. A place where indignation flows like boxed wine and facts are regarded with the same suspicion as hand dryers. | | ---|---|--- The entire episode is the sort of thing one might expect from a second-tier county commissioner with delusions of grandeur, not a supposed steward of national security. But this is the state of the Trump administration. It's a circus of mediocrities, each convinced that their title should come with feudal rights to toilets and praise. It's worth noting that the building Noem tried to enter was not abandoned, not closed, not shuttered by anarchists or anti-ICE protestors. It was a functioning government office that chose not to allow a camera-wielding DHS entourage to barge in unannounced. against the traveling carnival of Trump's authoritarian vanity. | | ---|---|--- The Chicago-area workers who denied Noem access deserve not only commendation, but elevation. Perhaps they can be promoted to Cabinet-level positions themselves. If only to fill the vacuum of adult supervision currently afflicting the Department of Homeland Security. And as for Secretary Noem: if she cannot secure access to a single toilet or is unable to figure out how to rent a Port-o-potty, perhaps she is not the iron-fisted security czar she pretends to be. | | ---|---|--- Perhaps she is just another self promoter with a press release. Strutting from state to state, hoping the next door opens wide enough for both her ego and her camera crew. In the end, all she wanted was to relieve herself. Mission accomplished--though not in the way she intended. Still, Noem can be thankful for at least one thing this week. She is not Kash Patel. | | ---|---|--- The Trump FBI director is so hated, so utterly despised even within the administration, that a Trump white house official was recently caught texting another that Patel is a "giant douche canoe." Subscribe Now! Patel's latest douche-baggery includes firing 15 FBI agents for de-escalating a confrontation 5 years ago by kneeling with Black Lives Matters protesters. And in the same week, Patel terminated an FBI agent who refused to arrange a perp walk of former FBI director James Comey. | | ---|---|--- One is tempted to laugh, but the joke is on the rest of us. For every kneeling agent fired, a Trump bootlicker is promoted. For every badge of conscience discarded, a lapel pin of MAGA ideological purity is pinned in its place. And so the Bureau lurches on--but not toward justice. Toward a future where loyalty is demanded, but never earned; where courage is punished, and cowardice rewarded; and where leaders like Kash Patel mistake the hollow clanging of their own echo chamber for the voice of the Republic. | | ---|---|--- Kash Patel and Kristi Noem () are not administrators of law and order or security. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have concocted plans to rig the 2026 elections before a single ballot is cast — wiping out Democratic seats through unprecedented gerrymandering in Texas and other red states.
But California is standing in the way.
Governor Gavin Newsom’s Election Rigging Response Act — Proposition 50 — is our firewall. It ensures that voters, not MAGA politicians, decide how our congressional districts are drawn.
If Prop 50 passes, voters keep control of our democracy.
If it fails, Trump gets exactly what he wants: A Congress stacked in his favor for two more years.
We’re in the fight of our lives. Republican megadonors are flooding California with millions in dark money mailers, attack ads, and disinformation. The California Democratic Party is responding the only way we know how — through grassroots organizing funded by small donations from people like you. Will you rush a donation right now? But with less than a month before Gov. Gavin Newsom’s make-or-break ballot measure, our need is incredibly time-sensitive .
Here’s what your support will fund:
🚪 Knocking on doors to talk to undecided voters;
📣 Printing literature in multiple languages to counter Trump’s lies;
☎️ Calling and texting thousands of Californians before they send in their ballots.
But with ballots in the mail now, the time crunch is on and our organizing budget simply hasn’t been able to keep up.
Will you rush a donation of $ right now to power this grassroots fight and help us succeed in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-oct25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I deployed nine times to over 70 countries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=94aa5c13182a473baa5ac48fdb77955b&_e=HhqlOnx_xu0bMF46isLSCIJwLyDH78LzAXsdLJxbXVwOwfEh5WuvdezTrAIpmz1QMYVl_hdI5qI3lL4Mxq_ZHjMOtrfuflT4y26kJ9VKv9Bq08XlEE20g8pp_45rdSxUAywieUtwzS7vDiGEZF6wXgS-h7gk5nqE_DF1tdnPDINulV6J49jSDwZW1qn4SqOt6AdxUB9EI3fRmPufeHlhhOlBZq5fo2sgR2RYoCL9-fjf2GHVTHXniUlzKeoYnZMUoAugmgMSYeNFLaUzx1-ZiJS5uGCjMh_FGJ7kFiaNMncYl5CjAdkB85kUjCDP1y07M3uFs-HeP-gPkzqMuztAy4HV2EaKe3ZPY4BVhx_jrdnoQOEST3zURe7TYCrxCsiC-V-ftvXVO3W1VpXPhLwSg_HQ_oXkh6xNJ93e8b9FtIkatjrgLVIxpxwqCq6cgFpHvn3hAwukaKgvZ7SBtXigTuk3AvV9aMaj81-qscksvz0d1BdX9bXaty7JlKXDJFbu4FJTHGklQNpOKpzYU-vkXZ1OtVGPUjAWRoAgBOFBQaJr2xzmREMscl1HyjubL-eGeUJwYfF1QBFkSxIY-7D3BYHhAybYR_mC9Bj9c3c7By31zKwyEdpMzNv8hfGGHNM2hBCIw_4pfjC-JEpGNVgLaHO7GM0a-EwExKFeG4gHrhpSXRP3cC2pTR5E2-BjFcSv12FgxGlfLi-JoG32EENn8izWOjKyJEmUYFOCEy7nvsIIJTbzOxddPBmmsKysUiHLzfkb5_Gm5TYkFk2S75BsEYINmnKwesJI02dXgPVdR6J4_o1BTOJWiawvEfFmqf2H)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=94aa5c13182a473baa5ac48fdb77955b&_e=HhqlOnx_xu0bMF46isLSCIJwLyDH78LzAXsdLJxbXVwOwfEh5WuvdezTrAIpmz1QMYVl_hdI5qI3lL4Mxq_ZHjMOtrfuflT4y26kJ9VKv9Bq08XlEE20g8pp_45rdSxUAywieUtwzS7vDiGEZF6wXgS-h7gk5nqE_DF1tdnPDINulV6J49jSDwZW1qn4SqOt6AdxUB9EI3fRmPufeHlhhOlBZq5fo2sgR2RYoCL9-fjf2GHVTHXniUlzKeoYnZMUoAugmgMSYeNFLaUzx1-ZiJS5uGCjMh_FGJ7kFiaNMnff8P2pn_U83uN-GBlELOmX-MTbARNcI5sQiifiyNX4pHmgMiLR72sSitbZdEHZBymOGeE2oKBkD42jEJJ5st2j-s52ABPifURxwdB5gc-my4PPpcO0iiblvw67kqICjEd4sqItdTE_suAnYIJfOJMwjRXHzcM3FVVVJTM_d_k0TrxR7hEf1nI_yRysU9k9SjCzN5cie6mIMYHOiZJ3i_WFkbDWNrYnpA5SpLvfZXUGlqru7q5ALigF6WCCC-EGpxHus3JBUoV3wb1l7ExyakfKO6xbXoSC_lO4EvYHEFUwFV-6mSt6MMICvEd_WDinBKZSs8BmVKV4ZZM3FsoCTA25iJ-u6jW5eYE6gL9wVrF-mee6S-K9WlZjvRrXredWoFN5oCPU3XctzW2fADQDjkO-olAZF5B4Vm49wL0SIjgEvc1OkWYMUkmrFt9zgxXdX5-K9LfJwsh7qS4t-hOH0CdEK21QSG3sRRuYkzVd3p-ViYMcPMhlSYyQZsk2wrpEJvN517Dy_z7ulSFARI6Sp9f-)**.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) -. 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. - I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. United States Attorney General Pam Bondi **[went scorched earth at Sen. Adam Schiff](https://substack.com/redirect/0f15929e-f98a-48e5-8920-4c94cb5ed04f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing Border Czar Tom Homan of corruption during an intense senate hearing, Tuesday.
"If you worked for me, you would've been fired because you were censured by Congress for lying," Bondi exploded at Schiff.
**[Watch the senate face off here:](https://substack.com/redirect/0f15929e-f98a-48e5-8920-4c94cb5ed04f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0f15929e-f98a-48e5-8920-4c94cb5ed04f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0f15929e-f98a-48e5-8920-4c94cb5ed04f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **DOJ investigating Schiff for mortgage fraud** : The Justice Department is actively investigating Schiff for mortgage fraud allegations, which he has vehemently denied, while Schiff accused the DOJ of becoming "President Trump's personal sword and shield" to target political enemies and protect allies.
* **Bondi 's counter-challenge on impeachment**: When Schiff questioned whether DOJ dropped a bribery investigation into Homan after Trump's 2025 inauguration, Bondi cited FBI Dir. Kash Patel saying "there was no evidence that Tom Homan committed a crime." She then countered by asking Schiff "will you apologize to Donald Trump for trying to impeach him?"

**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/8779b588-df35-4e53-8e92-4fd74e811b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

**Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset.**

# **Newsom vetoes firefighter pay raise** months after biggest fire crisis in state's history
California Gov. Gavin Newsom **[vetoed a bipartisan bill that would have increased CAL FIRE salaries](https://substack.com/redirect/4138e349-06c3-4f30-8e8c-4a33e9507102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to within 15% of local fire departments, nine months after the most expensive wildfire in state history devastated Los Angeles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4138e349-06c3-4f30-8e8c-4a33e9507102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Significant pay gap exists** : CAL FIRE base pay is only $54,122 annually compared to Los Angeles city firefighters' minimum of $85,315, with local departments paying 11-29% more than state firefighters, though state agencies argue overtime narrows the total compensation gap to 16.7%.
* **Veto reasoning and cost** : Newsom claimed the bill, which would have cost $373-609 million in its first year, would create "significant cost pressures" on the state budget and "circumvent the collective bargaining process," despite nearly unanimous support from California lawmakers.
* **Union condemnation and timing** : CAL FIRE union president Tim Edwards called the veto "highly disappointing and frustrating," particularly because Newsom vetoed it the day before honoring six fallen firefighters on the state memorial wall, while the governor simultaneously launched a recruitment drive acknowledging staffing shortages.

* * *

U.S. AG Pam Bondi shut down Democrat Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse, again, for suggesting Border Czar Tom Homan took a $50,000 bribe.

# Man with 200 explosives arrested outside church, left-wing manifesto discovered by police
Louis Geri, 41, was **[arrested outside the Cathedral of St. Matthew the Apostle on October 5](https://substack.com/redirect/ade6fa7e-d45b-4d97-ae91-c135141ec9b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with over 200 homemade explosive devices during the church's annual "Red Mass" honoring the Supreme Court, threatening police that "several of your people are gonna die," law enforcement said.
* **Manifesto reveals political targeting** : Geri handed police a nine-page manifesto titled "Written Negotiations for the Avoidance of Destruction of Property via Detonation of Explosives" that revealed animosity towards Catholics, Jews, members of SCOTUS and ICE agents, according to police, suggesting left-wing domestic terrorism motivations.
* **Sophisticated weapons cache** : After the arrest, bomb squad technicians discovered fully functional devices including vials of yellow liquid with M-devices attached, materials treated with Thermite solution, and chemicals including Nitro Methane and acetone, with Geri allegedly planning to detonate them remotely using modified bottle rockets.

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: “When hell freezes over”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
How could Miller-Meeks know the priorities, hardships, or needs of Iowans if she refuses to talk to them?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116810899/574509791/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODNhZDUwNy1jY2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G7FgJiK0sA6_vOAZV9cIn8Hl1-udt9iTGGFCI20SgLA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116810900/574509792/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251007_freeze_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251007_freeze_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=c83ad507-cca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODNhZDUwNy1jY2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G7FgJiK0sA6_vOAZV9cIn8Hl1-udt9iTGGFCI20SgLA=)
Peter,

Back in April, Mariannette Miller-Meeks promised Iowans she would hold in-person townhalls, despite party bosses telling her not to. But, it’s been seven months and guess how many townhalls she’s held: **ZERO.**

And now, she’s on record saying the next time she’ll hold a townhall for her constituents is “when hell freezes over.” _**Are you kidding me?**_

As the representative of IA-01, it’s Miller-Meeks’ job to ensure she’s working in the best interest of the people she is supposed to serve. How could she know their priorities, their hardships, or their needs if she refuses to talk to them?

**Here’s the truth: Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn’t want to hold townhalls because she doesn’t want to answer to Iowans on her abysmal record.** She doesn’t want to explain why she voted to cut Medicaid for over 100,000 Iowans, or why she’s working to double healthcare premiums, or how her votes in Congress are increasing costs for working people.

_Let’s not forget – this is the same person who, when asked by her constituent at the county fair to explain her actions in Washington, gave her an egg and told her to have a nice day._

I say it’s time we held Marianette Miller-Meeks accountable for her actions. I’m running for IA-01 to be a voice for Iowans and I will always strive to ensure our needs are heard loud and clear in Congress. But to do that, we need to defeat Miller-Meeks next November.

**[Will you chip in to my campaign right now to help me bring real leadership back to the people of IA-01?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116810901/574509793/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251007_freeze_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251007_freeze_fndd_gq_act___CB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=c83ad507-cca3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODNhZDUwNy1jY2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G7FgJiK0sA6_vOAZV9cIn8Hl1-udt9iTGGFCI20SgLA=)**

clean_body: How could Miller-Meeks know the priorities, hardships, or needs of Iowans if she refuses to talk to them? | = = Peter, Back in April, Mariannette Miller-Meeks promised Iowans she would hold in-person townhalls, despite party bosses telling her not to. But, it’s been seven months and guess how many townhalls she’s held: ZERO. And now, she’s on record saying the next time she’ll hold a townhall for her constituents is “when hell freezes over.” Are you kidding me? As the representative of IA-01, it’s Miller-Meeks’ job to ensure she’s working in the best interest of the people she is supposed to serve. How could she know their priorities, their hardships, or their needs if she refuses to talk to them? Here’s the truth: Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn’t want to hold townhalls because she doesn’t want to answer to Iowans on her abysmal record. She doesn’t want to explain why she voted to cut Medicaid for over 100,000 Iowans, or why she’s working to double healthcare premiums, or how her votes in Congress are increasing costs for working people. Let’s not forget – this is the same person who, when asked by her constituent at the county fair to explain her actions in Washington, gave her an egg and told her to have a nice day. I say it’s time we held Marianette Miller-Meeks accountable for her actions. I’m running for IA-01 to be a voice for Iowans and I will always strive to ensure our needs are heard loud and clear in Congress. But to do that, we need to defeat Miller-Meeks next November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: But I 'm relying on folks like YOU to help me win this race! -Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. Trump's attacks on Portland, as well as similar ones in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Washington, D.C., are unwarranted and unlawful, Peter. We cannot normalize these escalating attempts to use the military to occupy our cities.

There is no need for military intervention in Oregon. The biggest threat to our public safety and our democracy is Donald Trump himself. I am committed to speaking out, standing with the people of Oregon, and solving the _real_ problems facing our state.
[**I need you with us in this fight, Peter. Will you split a donation between EMILYs List and myself to help us stand against Donald Trump's unlawful military intervention?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116810925/574509875/1087007976?refcode=WUEFHJ14_20251007_TinaSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057176&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdjMjA0Ny1jY2EzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFif1YGl60PBRb0rLGSpLMRKJXIxwzm3w4cE_xW53_E=)

clean_body: I'm standing up to Trump's attack on Portland, but I need your support. | = Peter, A federal judge has blocked President Trump's attempt to send military troops into Portland — twice! But he's not done attacking our state, so my work's not done either. I'll continue to stand up to his administration and protect Oregon values. = | = Trump's attacks on Portland, as well as similar ones in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Washington, D.C., are unwarranted and unlawful, Peter. We cannot normalize these escalating attempts to use the military to occupy our cities. There is no need for military intervention in Oregon. The biggest threat to our public safety and our democracy is Donald Trump himself. I am committed to speaking out, standing with the people of Oregon, and solving the real problems facing our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you are scared or angry (or both) about what President Trump's actions mean for our country and our democracy, know that I'm fighting for you and with you. Thank you for standing with me. — Tina Kotek = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: This budget is a BFD
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Fixing the damn roads, providing free meals for Michigan’s students, protecting health care, and more. |
#
---
Team, While DC Republicans play political games and create economic uncertainty, Governor Gretchen Whitmer is getting sh*t done. **Today, Governor Whitmer signed a balanced, bipartisan budget that delivers on the kitchen-table issues. This budget is what she likes to call a “B-F-D”:**
* ❤️🩹 Protects Medicaid for 2+ million Michiganders that were going to lose coverage because of Republicans’ “Big Beautiful Bill.”
* 💰 Expands the Working Families Tax Credit, putting $3,000 back into the pockets of 700,000 families.
* 🚗 Makes the biggest investment in state history to _**fix the damn roads**_ , Gretchen Whitmer’s signature campaign promise.
* 💸 Ends taxes on tips, overtime and Social Security.
* 🍎 Provides free school meals to over 1.4 million public school students.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116810989/574510195/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQyMjVlZmEtY2NhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bmgm_mDGiYo9V4NOHjl_lXkuCWoWOfZt2F8_JAlokKw=) No chaos. Just results. **But here’s the problem: every success story like this one is under threat with DC Republicans in charge.** Rather than deliver for all families, the far-right is focused on dragging us backwards. They’re already gearing up to attack Governor Whitmer’s leadership and try to pit us against each other — all so they can keep giving tax breaks to their wealthy megadonors. But we’re fighting back. clean_body: Fixing the damn roads, providing free meals for Michigan’s students, protecting health care, and more. | Team, While DC Republicans play political games and create economic uncertainty, Governor Gretchen Whitmer is getting sht done. Today, Governor Whitmer signed a balanced, bipartisan budget that delivers on the kitchen-table issues. This budget is what she likes to call a “B-F-D”: ❤️🩹 Protects Medicaid for 2+ million Michiganders that were going to lose coverage because of Republicans’ “Big Beautiful Bill.” 💰 Expands the Working Families Tax Credit, putting $3,000 back into the pockets of 700,000 families. 🚗 Makes the biggest investment in state history to fix the damn roads , Gretchen Whitmer’s signature campaign promise. 💸 Ends taxes on tips, overtime and Social Security. 🍎 Provides free school meals to over 1.4 million public school students. = No chaos. Just results. But here’s the problem: every success story like this one is under threat with DC Republicans in charge. Rather than deliver for all families, the far-right is focused on dragging us backwards. They’re already gearing up to attack Governor Whitmer’s leadership and try to pit us against each other — all so they can keep giving tax breaks to their wealthy megadonors. But we’re fighting back. We’re organizing, we’re building a bench of candidates to win in 2026 and beyond, and we’re not slowing down anytime soon. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. Peter, We’re ONE MONTH out from election day. **This November is critical because Georgians will finally have the opportunity to speak up about their utility bills.** Year after year, Georgia’s all-Republican Public Service Commission (PSC) has repeatedly thrown Georgians under the bus to boost the profits of powerful utility companies. These commissioners approved **_six separate rate hikes_** that increased the average power bill for Georgians by _$43 a month._ Meanwhile, Georgians are tightening their wallets as the rising costs of rent and groceries weigh on us all. Right now, we have a real chance to elect new leadership that will put Georgia ratepayers first. **Democrats Peter Hubbard** and **Dr. Alicia Johnson** are running to lower costs and protect consumers — not corporate profits — and they need our help to reach voters and drive turnout. [Will you chip in $10 today to help us spread the word and mobilize voters across Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116811126/574510660/-14960666?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_100725_1MONTH_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDVkMmM0Ni1jZGEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VD4R-xTnVeVMLKOn23X-2OPpz5lTrDhuxF2URgxAgfI=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Charlene Fernandez, Chair
subject: You told me what matters most. Here's what I heard:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116811265/574511075/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU5MjhmMDQtY2VhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j_Qbh8NrCJcSBi5mQ8dovPwEtUFmH5iNYjdo967LwS8=)

Hi there,

Last month, I asked you to share your top priorities with me through our September survey. Nearly 700 of you responded, and I've been reviewing the results with our team.

**The message is clear: Healthcare is your number one concern.**

Over one-third of you prioritized healthcare issues — protecting Medicare and Medicaid, defending Social Security, lowering prescription drug costs, and improving rural healthcare access.

And here's what else you told me: 89% of you said the GOP is NOT working on behalf of all Arizonans. And 92% believe election integrity is at stake.

**I heard you loud and clear: Arizona families need Democrats fighting for them.**

Here's what you told me matters most:
* **Protecting Medicare and Medicaid** \- your top priority

* **Defending Social Security** from Republican attacks

* **Fighting climate change** and protecting our environment

* **Lowering the cost of groceries** and making housing affordable

* **Protecting reproductive freedom** and LGBTQ+ equality

These aren't abstract policy issues. These are kitchen-table concerns that affect Arizona families every single day — especially in rural Arizona where I was born and raised.

**And Republicans are on the wrong side of every single one.**

They're threatening to cut Medicare and Medicaid to pay for billionaire tax cuts. They're attacking Social Security while calling concerns about it "whining and bedwetting." They're rolling back environmental protections while corporate interests drain our water.

**[**Will you chip in to help us fight for the priorities you told me matter most?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116811266/574511076/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU5MjhmMDQtY2VhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j_Qbh8NrCJcSBi5mQ8dovPwEtUFmH5iNYjdo967LwS8=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ** ** | | **[PITCH IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116811267/574511077/79744751?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251007_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU5MjhmMDQtY2VhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j_Qbh8NrCJcSBi5mQ8dovPwEtUFmH5iNYjdo967LwS8=)**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: This is the kind of behavior we expect from authoritarians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m not sitting back.
#
**FIRST:** Donald Trump deployed the National Guard to D.C. and took control of the local police, escalating his dystopian and dangerous politicization of our military.
**THEN:** He quickly announced plans to do the same in other major cities across our country.
**NOW:** Donald Trump is attempting to deploy the National Guard to Portland and Chicago under the false pretense that these cities are war zones.
_**That is a lie.**_
And yet, his crooks and cronies are urging him to ignore a federal ruling that blocked this abuse of power. If Trump really cared about law and order, he’d stop acting like the law doesn’t apply to him.
**This is the kind of behavior we expect from authoritarians — not presidents. And unlike Republican politicians in Washington, I’m not sitting back.[Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help me continue speaking out and holding Donald Trump accountable?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20251007-1?refcode=em20251007-2390&amount=5&refcode2=2390_21716_SP0P6p&akid=2390%2E21716%2ESP0P6p)**
I co-sponsored the _SUN Act_ , legislation that brings transparency and accountability to any deployment of the National Guard onto our streets.
I’m sounding the alarm online, on TV, and across Delaware.
And I’m doing everything I can to help defeat Trump’s enablers in Congress, take back the House, and stop this chaos.
**But I can’t do it alone.**
While Donald Trump has right-wing billionaires on his side, I’m counting on everyday people who believe in democracy — people like you — to power our fight.
[**If you’re with me in saying _no_ to authoritarianism in America, chip in $5 or whatever you can now.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20251007-1?refcode=em20251007-2390&amount=5&refcode2=2390_21716_SP0P6p&akid=2390%2E21716%2ESP0P6p)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20251007-1?amount=5&refcode=em20251007-2390&refcode2=2390_21716_SP0P6p&akid=2390%2E21716%2ESP0P6p)**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251007-1&t=1&refcode2=2390_21716_SP0P6p&akid=2390%2E21716%2ESP0P6p)**

Hey Peter, I’m on my way back to DC from Phoenix right now, and I wanted to send you a quick update. It’s Day 7 of Trump and Republicans’ government shutdown, and congressional Republicans are _still_ on vacation. Republicans are prolonging this shutdown because they don’t care about the American people. They don’t care that, under GOP leadership, millions of Americans’ healthcare premiums will double and millions more will lose their healthcare entirely. But I care. That’s why my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting like hell to re-open the government and negotiate a deal to solve the healthcare crisis Republicans have created — and it’s why I’m headed back to DC to keep up the fight. I refuse to back down. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: It’s time for California to make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We can send a powerful signal: we’re not intimidated by Trump’s attacks on women.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40250%2E3422442%2E8WzAMY)
Peter,
At a recent event, another candidate joked that he would be dressing up as California’s next governor for Halloween.
But Katie didn’t miss a beat—she said he’d be wearing a dress, because **we’re going to make history and elect her as California’s first woman governor.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251007_1_ak?refcode=em20251007-40250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40250_3422442_8WzAMY&akid=40250%2E3422442%2E8WzAMY)
With women’s rights and economic freedom under attack from the Trump administration, we need a progressive trailblazer like Katie leading California.
As a single mom, Katie understands how Trump’s policies are hurting Californians—whether it's his tariffs driving up prices or his health care cuts forcing families to choose between care and groceries. She’s spent her career fighting for consumers and she’ll use that experience to make California work for women—and for everyone.
By electing Katie Porter in 2026, we can send a powerful signal: we’re not intimidated by Trump’s attacks—on women or our state. Instead, we’re going to make history by fighting for our families and putting Californians first.
**[But to do that, we need you on our side. Can you chip in $5 to help us reach voters and elect Katie as California’s first woman governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251007_1_ak?refcode=em20251007-40250&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40250_3422442_8WzAMY&akid=40250%2E3422442%2E8WzAMY)**

name: James Talarico
subject: The only minority destroying America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
The more I see what’s happening in Texas and in America, the more I think that the only minority destroying America is the billionaires.
* Trans people are 1% of the population.
* Muslims are 1% of the population.
* Undocumented people are 1% of the population.

**We’re all focused on the wrong 1%.**
* Trans people aren’t the ones taking away our health care.
* Muslims aren’t the ones defunding our schools.
* Immigrants aren’t the ones cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends.

It’s the billionaires and their puppet politicians.
The culture wars are a smoke screen. The people at the top work so hard to keep us angry and divided because our unity is a threat to their wealth and power.
Their social media algorithms and cable news networks tear us apart. They divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion so we don’t notice that they’re closing our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves while they raise taxes on all of us.
It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. **But we will not be conquered.**
[**If you agree and you’re ready to change this, please contribute to build our people-powered movement. Every dollar helps us take back power for working people.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251007-1-ak&t=1&akid=99%2E1347274%2EEodKZz)
Winning this race and taking back Texas would be a fundamental shift in our politics — not just in Texas but across the country.
Let’s make it happen.
James
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251007-1-ak&t=2&akid=99%2E1347274%2EEodKZz)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Healthcare costs are about to skyrocket for millions of Americans.
body:
|
#
Friend, Millions of Americans are opening letters this month telling them their health insurance premiums are going up because Republicans are choosing not to renew the Affordable Care Act tax credits for working families – instead, they’re prioritizing tax breaks for billionaires. **With costs already far too high for everyday Americans, we cannot in good conscience rubber-stamp a reckless budget that _drastically_ raises healthcare costs. [_Learn more about how I’m fighting back by clicking here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116811521/574511886/-602776912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWIxYmE0MS1jZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gg9pgY23l3q81fmNMwEm7FQKsB_80a7pORlpvO49RLo=&emci=18fea62a-99a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f1b1ba41-cfa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116811522/574511887/-602776912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWIxYmE0MS1jZmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gg9pgY23l3q81fmNMwEm7FQKsB_80a7pORlpvO49RLo=&emci=18fea62a-99a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f1b1ba41-cfa3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=27257697) Without action right now, health insurance premiums on the individual marketplace are projected to more than double, or even triple next year – hitting families with hundreds or even thousands of dollars in extra costs they simply can’t afford. When healthcare costs go up, families in our community have to make impossible choices: Do you skip health insurance altogether, or cut back to a bare-bones plan that doesn’t really cover what you need, just to save money? Do you pay for medicine or protein? All of this, as tariffs are driving up the cost of everyday goods like food and gas – and MAGA Republicans cut food assistance from hungry kids and seniors. It doesn’t have to be this way. Congress can – and must – come together to pass a budget that lowers costs and keeps families secure. Americans deserve healthcare without breaking the bank, and every family deserves the security of knowing they can keep a roof over their heads and food on the table. That’s why I’m working around the clock to find a way to end this shutdown by passing a budget that works for the American people. Thank you, Kristen
---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Trump just pulled the rug out from under farmers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10352%2E434096%2ElBxpG9 ]John Fetterman

Hey, Derek – we had to reach out because Trump just pulled the rug out from under farmers in PA + across the country. 🤬

Here's what's happening:

1. Trump and his crew *illegally* cut USDA programs that our farmers rely on.

And it's hitting us right here in PA: They killed one of the programs that was helping keep small farms afloat and support their partnerships with local food banks. We're pissed.

2. So John joined a multi-state lawsuit against the Trump administration to fight back against these reckless cuts.

John's doing what he's always done – and that's standing up for our farmers, small towns, and rural communities.

3. Now, we're compiling a petition of 10,000 signatures from folks like you, Derek, who know how important it is that we sound the alarm about the Trump administration's disastrous cuts and stand with the farmers being impacted.

Our petition closes at midnight, so will you take 10 seconds to sign now and join John in support of farmers in PA + across the country?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51763?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10352%2E434096%2ElBxpG9

Thanks for lending your voice to this fight.

Team Fetterman 💛

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Before you hit the hay…
body:
There’s something I need to tell you...

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._7FW6sg)Hey, Peter. It’s Marsha.
I know it’s late, and you’re probably getting settled for the night, but I need to tell you something that can’t wait until the morning.
I’m just **$231** short of today's fundraising goal. I know this doesn’t seem like a lot. But trust me when I say every single dollar counts when it comes to defeating the Democrats and protecting our GOP Majority.
If we fall short of our goal tonight, it will set the stage for a complete Democrat takeover. Every GOP victory in the past few weeks will be gone overnight!
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-RVw)[This is why failure is not an option here, Peter. I’m calling on every patriot reading this email to chip in $4. Nothing more. Nothing less. Just $4.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[Chip In $4
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-Sk1V980EaQ)If everyone reading this email contributes just $4 or more, we’ll EASILY surpass our fundraising goal and have the resources necessary to stop the Democratic takeover.
_If not, we’re doomed..._[ Chip In $4
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._Q1HxEb5MGX1W0lQTg)God Bless you, and have a good night,
Marsha Blackburn| | |

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support](https://substack.com/redirect/792f2e50-e731-4215-8646-9a0f98673f4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): **_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/792f2e50-e731-4215-8646-9a0f98673f4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I just wrapped a must-watch live session with **Dan Pfeiffer** from MessageBox. We dove deep into the shutdown, the messaging failures of Democratic leadership, and why it's time to stop treating economic anxiety and authoritarian threats like separate issues. If you're wondering how we break through the noise in 2025, this one's worth the watch.
* **[00:01:02]** Dan explains why he thinks Trump--not Democrats--is losing the shutdown battle, and how polling backs it up.
* **[00:03:18]** We rate how Dems are handling the messaging war--and why there's still a AAA team stuck behind the bench.
* **[00:10:42]** Dan outlines two possible endgames to the shutdown--and how Trump's polling panic could flip the whole script.
* **[00:13:00]** Why Marjorie Taylor Greene breaking with House Republicans might be a turning point--and how personal politics shapes public outcomes.
* **[00:27:00]** We talk about why Americans feel like Democrats fight for "someone else," and how the party's age gap worsens the disconnect.

Don't miss this conversation if you care about the future of progressive media, the pitfalls of Democratic strategy, or just want clarity on what the hell is happening in Washington.
**[Endless Urgency is here to cut through the noise--and we need your support to keep doing it. Become a paid subscriber today to help us build something bolder.](https://substack.com/redirect/792f2e50-e731-4215-8646-9a0f98673f4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We’re listening, Peter
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251007-1560-foote&t=1001&akid=1560%2E342411%2EN9u4ju ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

At the Squad Victory Fund, everything we do is powered by people like you.
Your voices, your concerns, and your questions drive our work — because
we’re not just fighting for progressive change, we’re fighting alongside
you.

We want to make sure you have a direct line to us. That’s why we’re
opening the door for you to send us any questions you have — about the
Squad, our priorities, our campaigns, or our movement.

No question is too big or too small. When you reach out, you’re helping
shape the movement we’re building together.

That’s what the Squad Victory Fund embodies: people-powered politics, bold
progressive change, and standing up for our communities every single day.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/ask-us-anything-oct-2025/?source=em20251007-1560&t=1002&akid=1560%2E342411%2EN9u4ju ]Submit your question to the Squad Victory Fund today.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/ask-us-anything-oct-2025/?source=em20251007-1560&t=1003&akid=1560%2E342411%2EN9u4ju ]SUBMIT YOUR QUESTION

Thank you for being part of this movement. We’re excited to hear from you
— and we’ll be sending a follow-up note answering some of the questions we
get most often.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

P.S. Every contribution helps grow our progressive movement and ensures
the Squad has the resources to keep fighting for our communities. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251007-movement.-R9wHz&refcode=em20251007-1560&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1560%2E342411%2EN9u4ju ]Chip
in today to stand with us.

body:
I had to reach out as soon as I could:

Hey, I had to reach out as soon as I could: **_Reuters: US judge blocks Trump from sending any National Guard troops to Portland for now_** Over the weekend, a Trump-appointed federal judge BLOCKED the president from sending troops to Portland. **This ruling confirms what I’ve been saying all along: we didn’t ask for this and we don’t need this.** Again and again, we’ve seen Trump try to pit Americans against Americans by sending troops into our cities. _That is simply un-American._ [_**I’m continuing to do everything I can to stand up to the president’s abuse of power and protect our community. This attack on Oregon comes just months after the president deployed the National Guard in Los Angeles and in our nation’s capital.
**Now, he’s trying to use the National Guard as his toy soldiers AGAIN by sending them into Portland. We won’t accept this cowardly abuse of power.**
I’ve held 18 town halls across Oregon’s 5th District this year and met with over 42,000 constituents. Not once has anyone said we need Trump to send troops into our city.
That’s why I’m standing up for Oregonians and pushing back on Trump’s attacks. I’m fighting to stop the president from deploying troops in Portland and to keep our community safe.
[_**This is a critical moment for our state and our country, so if you’re ready to take a stand against Trump and protect our city, I’m personally asking you to chip in a few bucks today to stand up for Oregon.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116812769/574515757/1565084121?refcode=email_100725_portland&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM1N2UwYmYtZDJhMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jLwx5xWSP6D7No2U-kLUEBVy8ZhkWpW9X14JE6TeV-0=)

name: GOTV PAC
subject: This 2025 election will shape the 2028 presidential:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court race this fall might look ordinary, but make no mistake: this is the election that could shape 2028, control future redistricting, and determine who gets to count every vote in America’s most important battleground state.
If even two of the current Democratic justices are voted out, Republicans will have a path to flip the court by 2027 — just in time to tip the scales for the 2028 election.
The Pennsylvania GOP knows exactly what’s at stake. They’re already boasting they’ll “knock off all three.” If that happens, we lose our firewall against election interference before the next presidential race even begins.
This is the kind of under-the-radar fight that GOTV PAC specializes in, and that's why we're stepping up to mobilize voters, counter GOP dark money, and make sure Pennsylvanians know what’s on the line before it’s too late.
Can you chip in $15 or more today to power voter outreach before ballots drop? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10072025]

clean_body: [] Peter , Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court race this fall might look ordinary, but make no mistake: this is the election that could shape 2028, control future redistricting, and determine who gets to count every vote in America’s most important battleground state. If even two of the current Democratic justices are voted out, Republicans will have a path to flip the court by 2027 — just in time to tip the scales for the 2028 election. The Pennsylvania GOP knows exactly what’s at stake. They’re already boasting they’ll “knock off all three.” If that happens, we lose our firewall against election interference before the next presidential race even begins. This is the kind of under-the-radar fight that GOTV PAC specializes in, and that's why we're stepping up to mobilize voters, counter GOP dark money, and make sure Pennsylvanians know what’s on the line before it’s too late. Can you chip in $15 or more today to power voter outreach before ballots drop? [The Kennedy Center Opera House is a historic institution honoring President Kennedy. Slapping Melania’s name on it is nothing but an embarrassing attempt to curry favor with Donald Trump.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69392?t=8&akid=23480%2E4449941%2E8OcSiR)

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Hey, it’s URGENT! 🚨 🚨 🚨
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, organizetexas
body:
Peter,
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton’s latest press release [https://www.texasattorneygeneral.gov/news/releases/attorney-general-ken-paxton-launches-undercover-operations-infiltrate-and-uproot-leftist-terror] is an authoritarian warning shot aimed at our communities and our rights. He’s openly green‐lighting undercover operations to “infiltrate and uproot” any community organizations he brands as “leftist terror cells,” smearing whole movements, including transgender Texans, to justify surveillance, intimidation, and repression. This is not normal. It’s not safety. It’s authoritarian political control.
Here at TOP PAC, we are built for moments like this. We mobilize Black and Latino Texans to protect our people, our votes, and our future — and we don’t flinch. But to meet this escalation head‐on, we need the full strength of supporters like YOU behind us.
PITCH IN now to TOP PAC, where your contribution will help with: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=d710ed4f-d6a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
* Enhanced safety infrastructure so our teams can keep canvassing, engaging, and turning out voters without fear.
* Rapid response communications to counter Paxton’s disinformation and keep our communities informed, connected, and ready to act.
* Voter mobilization in Dallas, Houston, San Antonio, and across Texas. Door‐to‐door, phone banks, and community resilience through civic engagement.

$3 because all we want is a fair chance to take back the House in 2026 — but Republicans are rigging their maps in Texas, Missouri, and other states to rig the next election before a single vote is cast.
$3 because one poll shows us at 48% and another with 51% ... and as you read this ballots are already being cast by voters.
$3 because unless we have the resources to get safely above 50% and do it soon, we could very easily lose this election.
Folks, we know that $3 may not seem like it can do much against what we’re up against, but as you read this lots and lots of people are chipping-in their $3.
Now they hope you’ll do the same. Because there’s only one way we’ll win this election, and that is together.
So what do you say?
[**Can Gavin Newsom and Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute $3 to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California? Do it before our fundraising deadline comes to a close and we're legally required to report what we've raised.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251007-1&refcode2=2646_4767699_72QcMz&akid=2646%2E4767699%2E72QcMz)

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: We have a winner -- and our next giveaway is coming soon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Friend,
I'm really happy to announce the winner of our Makarov giveaway: **Joe from Washington State!**
He donated $100 -- earning twenty tickets -- and it turned out to be his very last ticket that drew the lucky number, winning him a treasured piece of Cold War history.
I want to thank everyone who entered. You're giving me the ammo I need to win this fight and become the next Congressman from the great state of Texas.
We're also putting the finishing touches on our next giveaway -- and it may be our biggest yet. I'll be announcing it soon, and honestly, I'm more excited about this one than any we've done before.
You can make a contribution today, ahead of the announcement, at [BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/sO8v00d53ex1iMfKD56pkQ/6l892mg1icdgK8UHv9Iundcg) to bank your entries early for this truly awesome prize.
Same rules apply: every $5 you donate earns one entry.
Thank you for your continued support!
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera
P.S. Our next giveaway will be announced very soon -- don't wait! Enter early by contributing today at [BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/CQOvjxWmzdluQERv0BH2UQ/6l892mg1icdgK8UHv9Iundcg).

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
This campaign, and the work we’re doing, only exists because of you.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4914%2E400544%2EVtd4kp)
**From the bottom of my heart, thank you.**
Just days ago, I was concerned we might not hit our most important fundraising goal of the year. But when I needed this team the most, thousands of people showed up and had my back — _and I’ll never forget that._
_**Thanks to your support — and the support of all 92,270 grassroots donors who have pitched in to Deb’s campaign — we hit our goal!**_
As you know, I don’t come from a wealthy background, and I don’t have the means to write myself campaign checks. I rely 100% on grassroots supporters. Every dollar you give goes a long way toward building a better future for New Mexico, and together we’re building an undeniable movement across our state.
**I’m proud to share that our campaign made history, securing 2,505 nominating signatures to get on the ballot in less than 24 hours.**
This campaign, and the work we’re doing, only exists because of you. **So from the bottom of my heart, thank you.**
— Deb Haaland
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251007-1&t=2&refcode2=4914_400544_Vtd4kp&akid=4914%2E400544%2EVtd4kp)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4914%2E400544%2EVtd4kp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4914%2E400544%2EVtd4kp)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
